example: I have a dog.
example_zh: 我有一隻狗。

example: I have a few good friends.
example_zh: 我有幾個好朋友。

example: Please add a little sugar.
example_zh: 請加一點糖。

example: She reads a lot.
example_zh: 她讀很多書。

example: The bus leaves at 7 a.m.
example_zh: 公車上午七點出發。

example: They had to abandon the sinking ship quickly.
example_zh: 他們必須迅速棄船。

example: We often abbreviate "Doctor" as "Dr."
example_zh: 我們常把 Doctor 縮寫成 Dr.。

example: I cannot abide such rude behavior.
example_zh: 我無法忍受這種無禮的行為。

example: She has the ability to solve hard problems.
example_zh: 她有解決難題的能力。

example: He is able to swim.
example_zh: 他會游泳。

example: The doctor found abnormal cells in the test.
example_zh: 醫生在檢驗中發現不正常的細胞。

example: All the passengers are already aboard the train.
example_zh: 所有乘客都已經上了火車。

example: The government decided to abolish the old law.
example_zh: 政府決定廢除這條舊法律。

example: Aboriginal people have lived here for centuries.
example_zh: 原住民已在此居住數百年。

example: Abortion remains a controversial topic in many countries.
example_zh: 墮胎在許多國家仍是爭議話題。

example: Fish abound in this clear mountain lake.
example_zh: 這座清澈的高山湖裡魚很多。

example: This book is about animals.
example_zh: 這本書是關於動物的。

example: The plane flies above the clouds.
example_zh: 飛機在雲上飛。

example: My uncle works abroad.
example_zh: 我叔叔在國外工作。

example: His abrupt departure surprised everyone at the party.
example_zh: 他突然離開讓派對上的人都很驚訝。

example: Her absence from class worried the teacher.
example_zh: 她缺課讓老師很擔心。

example: Two students were absent from class today.
example_zh: 今天有兩位學生缺席。

example: I have absolute trust in my best friend.
example_zh: 我對我最好的朋友有絕對的信任。

example: Plants absorb water through their roots.
example_zh: 植物透過根部吸收水分。

example: Freedom is an abstract idea hard to define.
example_zh: 自由是難以定義的抽象概念。

example: Justice is an abstraction that means different things.
example_zh: 正義是個對不同人有不同意義的抽象概念。

example: It sounds absurd, but the story is true.
example_zh: 這聽起來荒謬，但故事是真的。

example: The region enjoys an abundance of fresh fruit.
example_zh: 這地區盛產大量新鮮水果。

example: This forest is rich in abundant wildlife.
example_zh: 這片森林有豐富的野生動物。

example: We must not abuse our natural resources.
example_zh: 我們不可濫用自然資源。

example: Her academic performance improved a lot this year.
example_zh: 她今年的學業表現進步很多。

example: He studies music at a famous academy.
example_zh: 他在一所著名學院學音樂。

example: The car began to accelerate down the hill.
example_zh: 車子開始加速衝下山坡。

example: She speaks English with a slight French accent.
example_zh: 她說英語帶著淡淡的法國口音。

example: She accepted my gift with a big smile.
example_zh: 她帶著大大的笑容接受我的禮物。

example: Your excuse is simply not acceptable to me.
example_zh: 你的藉口對我來說根本無法接受。

example: He waited nervously for the school's acceptance letter.
example_zh: 他緊張地等著學校的錄取通知。

example: Students can access the library database from home.
example_zh: 學生可以在家連上圖書館資料庫。

example: The museum is easily accessible by bus.
example_zh: 這座博物館搭公車很容易到達。

example: She bought a matching accessory for her dress.
example_zh: 她買了一件搭配洋裝的配件。

example: He was hurt in a car accident.
example_zh: 他在車禍中受了傷。

example: The fire was accidental, not started on purpose.
example_zh: 這場火災是意外，不是故意引起的。

example: Critics acclaim the young director's first film.
example_zh: 影評人讚揚這位年輕導演的第一部電影。

example: This hotel can accommodate up to five hundred guests.
example_zh: 這家旅館最多可容納五百位客人。

example: The school provides free accommodation for foreign teachers.
example_zh: 學校為外籍老師提供免費住宿。

example: She asked her brother to accompany her home.
example_zh: 她請哥哥陪她回家。

example: He worked hard to accomplish his goals.
example_zh: 他努力去完成他的目標。

example: His actions accord with his promises.
example_zh: 他的行為與他的承諾一致。

example: We acted in accordance with the rules.
example_zh: 我們依照規定行事。

example: The plan changed, so we adjusted accordingly.
example_zh: 計畫改變了，我們也隨之調整。

example: She opened a new bank account yesterday.
example_zh: 她昨天開了一個新的銀行帳戶。

example: Leaders should be accountable for their decisions.
example_zh: 領導者應為自己的決定負責。

example: The accountant checked the company's yearly budget.
example_zh: 會計師核對公司的年度預算。

example: She is studying accounting at a business school.
example_zh: 她在商學院讀會計。

example: Dust will accumulate if you never clean the room.
example_zh: 你若從不打掃，灰塵就會累積。

example: The accumulation of snow blocked the mountain road.
example_zh: 積雪封住了山路。

example: The test measures the accuracy of your answers.
example_zh: 這測驗評量你答案的準確度。

example: Please give me an accurate report of the accident.
example_zh: 請給我一份關於這起意外的準確報告。

example: He strongly denied the serious accusation against him.
example_zh: 他強烈否認對他的嚴重指控。

example: They accuse him of stealing the money.
example_zh: 他們指控他偷了錢。

example: It took time to accustom myself to the cold.
example_zh: 我花了些時間才習慣寒冷。

example: My legs ache after the long hike.
example_zh: 長途健行後我的腿很痛。

example: You can achieve anything with enough effort.
example_zh: 只要夠努力你就能達成任何事。

example: Lemon juice contains a lot of acid.
example_zh: 檸檬汁含有大量的酸。

example: He refused to acknowledge his own mistake.
example_zh: 他拒絕承認自己的錯誤。

example: Many teenagers worry about acne on their faces.
example_zh: 許多青少年擔心臉上的青春痘。

example: Let me acquaint you with the new rules.
example_zh: 讓我讓你熟悉一下新規定。

example: He is just an acquaintance, not a close friend.
example_zh: 他只是個熟人，不是好朋友。

example: She hopes to acquire new skills this summer.
example_zh: 她希望今年夏天學到新技能。

example: The company announced the acquisition of a rival firm.
example_zh: 公司宣布收購一家競爭對手。

example: They own a large farm of a hundred acres.
example_zh: 他們擁有一座一百英畝的大農場。

example: We walked across the street.
example_zh: 我們走過馬路。

example: The children act in a school play.
example_zh: 孩子們在學校話劇中演出。

example: The movie is full of action.
example_zh: 這部電影充滿動作場面。

example: My grandma is still very active at eighty.
example_zh: 我奶奶八十歲了仍然很有活力。

example: The activist fought for equal rights for years.
example_zh: 這位社運人士為平權奮鬥多年。

example: Our class has many fun activities after school.
example_zh: 我們班放學後有很多有趣的活動。

example: He wants to be an actor.
example_zh: 他想當演員。

example: The actress sings very well.
example_zh: 那位女演員歌唱得很好。

example: The actual cost was higher than we expected.
example_zh: 實際費用比我們預期的還高。

example: Actually, I have never been to Japan.
example_zh: 其實我從來沒去過日本。

example: He felt an acute pain in his chest.
example_zh: 他感到胸口一陣劇痛。

example: Animals must adapt to their changing environment.
example_zh: 動物必須適應變化的環境。

example: The movie is an adaptation of a famous novel.
example_zh: 這部電影改編自一本著名小說。

example: Please add some milk to my tea.
example_zh: 請在我的茶裡加一點牛奶。

example: He became a game addict during the holidays.
example_zh: 假期間他變成了電玩成癮者。

example: Drug addiction can destroy a person's whole life.
example_zh: 毒癮會毀掉一個人的一生。

example: The new library is a great addition to campus.
example_zh: 新圖書館是校園的一大新增設施。

example: We need additional time to finish the project.
example_zh: 我們需要額外的時間完成這個專案。

example: Please write your address on the envelope.
example_zh: 請把你的地址寫在信封上。

example: Make sure you get adequate sleep before exams.
example_zh: 考試前務必睡眠充足。

example: Please adjust the mirror before you drive.
example_zh: 開車前請先調整後照鏡。

example: The nurse will administer the medicine on time.
example_zh: 護理師會按時給藥。

example: The school administration approved the new plan.
example_zh: 學校行政單位批准了新計畫。

example: She handles the administrative work in this office.
example_zh: 她負責這間辦公室的行政工作。

example: The system administrator fixed the network problem.
example_zh: 系統管理員修好了網路問題。

example: Her courage in the crisis was truly admirable.
example_zh: 她在危機中的勇氣真令人欽佩。

example: The admiral commanded the entire fleet at sea.
example_zh: 這位上將指揮海上的整支艦隊。

example: I have deep admiration for my old teacher.
example_zh: 我對我的老師深感欽佩。

example: I admire her courage very much.
example_zh: 我非常欽佩她的勇氣。

example: Admission to the concert is free for students.
example_zh: 學生可免費入場聽這場音樂會。

example: He finally admitted that he was wrong.
example_zh: 他終於承認自己錯了。

example: Many changes happen during a child's adolescence.
example_zh: 孩子在青春期會經歷許多變化。

example: Adolescent students often care about their friends' opinions.
example_zh: 青少年學生常在意朋友的看法。

example: The couple decided to adopt a young child.
example_zh: 這對夫妻決定收養一個小孩。

example: The children adore their kind grandmother.
example_zh: 孩子們很愛他們慈祥的奶奶。

example: Children must come with an adult.
example_zh: 兒童必須由成人陪同前來。

example: Our soldiers slowly began to advance forward.
example_zh: 我們的士兵慢慢開始向前推進。

example: She is taking an advanced English course.
example_zh: 她在上一門高階英語課程。

example: Being tall is an advantage in basketball.
example_zh: 長得高在籃球上是一種優勢。

example: Their trip to the jungle was a real adventure.
example_zh: 他們的叢林之旅是一場真正的冒險。

example: Smoking has adverse effects on your health.
example_zh: 抽菸對你的健康有不良影響。

example: The company will advertise its new phone online.
example_zh: 公司會在網路上宣傳新手機。

example: I saw an advertisement for the new phone.
example_zh: 我看到那支新手機的廣告。

example: My teacher gave me some useful advice.
example_zh: 老師給了我一些有用的建議。

example: The doctor advised him to exercise more.
example_zh: 醫生建議他多運動。

example: My adviser helped me choose the right courses.
example_zh: 我的指導老師幫我選了適合的課程。

example: The committee plays an advisory role only.
example_zh: 這個委員會只扮演諮詢的角色。

example: She is a strong advocate for children's rights.
example_zh: 她是兒童權利的堅定倡導者。

example: The building has great aesthetic value.
example_zh: 這棟建築有很高的美學價值。

example: The meeting dealt with the company's daily affairs.
example_zh: 會議處理公司的日常事務。

example: The weather can affect our mood.
example_zh: 天氣會影響我們的心情。

example: She showed great affection for her students.
example_zh: 她對學生流露出深厚的關愛。

example: He gave his mother an affectionate hug.
example_zh: 他給了媽媽一個充滿愛意的擁抱。

example: The bank has an affiliate in every major city.
example_zh: 這家銀行在各大城市都有分支機構。

example: She affirmed that the news was completely true.
example_zh: 她肯定這則消息完全屬實。

example: We can't afford such an expensive car now.
example_zh: 我們現在買不起這麼貴的車。

example: She is afraid of dogs.
example_zh: 她怕狗。

example: We play after school.
example_zh: 我們放學後玩。

example: I read books in the afternoon.
example_zh: 我下午看書。

example: We had dinner and watched a movie afterward.
example_zh: 我們吃了晚餐，之後看了電影。

example: Please say it again.
example_zh: 請再說一次。

example: We played against the red team last Sunday.
example_zh: 上星期日我們和紅隊比賽。

example: We are the same age.
example_zh: 我們同年齡。

example: She booked the trip through a travel agency.
example_zh: 她透過旅行社訂了這趟行程。

example: The first item on the agenda is the budget.
example_zh: 議程的第一項是預算。

example: A real estate agent showed us the house.
example_zh: 一位房屋仲介帶我們看了這棟房子。

example: The country was accused of military aggression.
example_zh: 該國被指控進行軍事侵略。

example: The dog became aggressive when strangers approached.
example_zh: 陌生人靠近時那隻狗變得有攻擊性。

example: He left ten minutes ago.
example_zh: 他十分鐘前離開了。

example: He was in agony after breaking his leg.
example_zh: 他摔斷腿後痛苦不堪。

example: I agree with you.
example_zh: 我同意你的看法。

zh: 令人愉快的；欣然同意的
example: We spent an agreeable afternoon in the park.
example_zh: 我們在公園度過了愉快的下午。

example: This region depends on agricultural products.
example_zh: 這個地區依賴農產品。

example: Agriculture is important to this small country.
example_zh: 農業對這個小國很重要。

example: The library is just ahead.
example_zh: 圖書館就在前面。

example: The government sent aid to the flood victims.
example_zh: 政府送援助給水災災民。

example: Her aim is to become a doctor.
example_zh: 她的目標是成為醫生。

example: The air is fresh here.
example_zh: 這裡的空氣很新鮮。

example: Please turn on the air conditioner; it is hot.
example_zh: 好熱，請打開冷氣機。

example: The aircraft landed safely despite the storm.
example_zh: 儘管有暴風雨，飛機仍安全降落。

example: This airline offers cheap flights to Japan.
example_zh: 這家航空公司提供飛日本的便宜機票。

example: Which airlines do you like to fly with?
example_zh: 你喜歡搭哪家航空公司的飛機？

example: The airplane flies in the sky.
example_zh: 飛機在天空中飛。

example: We got to the airport early.
example_zh: 我們很早就到了機場。

example: Keep the cookies in an airtight container.
example_zh: 把餅乾放在密封容器裡。

example: The doctor cleared the child's blocked airway.
example_zh: 醫生清通了孩子阻塞的呼吸道。

example: Please don't leave your bags in the aisle.
example_zh: 請不要把包包留在走道上。

example: The fire alarm rang suddenly at noon.
example_zh: 中午火警警報突然響起。

example: My alarm clock rings at six every morning.
example_zh: 我的鬧鐘每天早上六點響。

example: The singer's new album sells very well.
example_zh: 那位歌手的新專輯賣得很好。

example: Drinking too much alcohol harms your body.
example_zh: 喝太多酒精會傷害你的身體。

example: The bar serves both alcoholic and soft drinks.
example_zh: 這家酒吧供應含酒精和無酒精飲料。

example: The guard stayed alert throughout the night.
example_zh: 警衛整夜保持警覺。

example: Many students find algebra difficult at first.
example_zh: 許多學生一開始覺得代數很難。

example: The movie is about an alien from space.
example_zh: 這部電影講的是一個來自太空的外星人。

example: His rude words alienated many old friends.
example_zh: 他無禮的話疏遠了許多老朋友。

example: Please align the pictures along the wall.
example_zh: 請把畫沿著牆對齊。

example: The twin sisters look very much alike.
example_zh: 這對雙胞胎姊妹長得非常像。

example: The old fish in the pond is still alive.
example_zh: 池塘裡那條老魚還活著。

example: All the students are here.
example_zh: 所有學生都在這裡。

example: Reporters allege that the official took bribes.
example_zh: 記者指稱這位官員收受賄賂。

example: She is allergic to cats and flowers.
example_zh: 她對貓和花過敏。

example: He has a serious allergy to peanuts.
example_zh: 他對花生嚴重過敏。

example: The cat ran into a narrow dark alley.
example_zh: 那隻貓跑進了一條又窄又暗的巷子。

example: The two countries formed a strong alliance.
example_zh: 這兩國結成了強大的聯盟。

example: An alligator rested quietly by the river.
example_zh: 一隻短吻鱷靜靜地趴在河邊。

example: The teacher will allocate tasks to each group.
example_zh: 老師會分派任務給每一組。

example: My parents allow me to play games on weekends.
example_zh: 我爸媽允許我週末打電動。

example: His parents give him a weekly allowance.
example_zh: 他父母每週給他零用錢。

example: Britain was a close ally of France.
example_zh: 英國曾是法國的親密盟友。

example: She added some almond to the chocolate cake.
example_zh: 她在巧克力蛋糕裡加了些杏仁。

example: It is almost time for lunch.
example_zh: 差不多是午餐時間了。

example: He likes to travel alone during summer vacation.
example_zh: 他喜歡在暑假獨自旅行。

example: We walk along the river.
example_zh: 我們沿著河邊散步。

example: A small boat sailed alongside the big ship.
example_zh: 一艘小船緊靠著大船航行。

example: Please read the story aloud to the class.
example_zh: 請把故事大聲唸給全班聽。

example: There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet.
example_zh: 英文字母表有二十六個字母。

example: I have already done my homework.
example_zh: 我已經做完功課了。

example: She also likes music.
example_zh: 她也喜歡音樂。

example: You cannot alter the past, only the future.
example_zh: 你無法改變過去，只能改變未來。

example: We visit our grandparents on alternate weekends.
example_zh: 我們每隔一個週末去看祖父母。

example: Is there an alternative route to the airport?
example_zh: 有沒有另一條到機場的路？

example: The plane is flying at a high altitude.
example_zh: 飛機正在高空飛行。

example: There are fifty students in our club altogether.
example_zh: 我們社團總共有五十位學生。

example: The can is made of light aluminum.
example_zh: 這個罐子是用輕巧的鋁製成的。

example: He always gets up early.
example_zh: 他總是很早起床。

example: He is an amateur photographer, not a professional.
example_zh: 他是業餘攝影師，不是專業的。

example: The magic show never fails to amaze children.
example_zh: 這場魔術秀總能讓孩子們驚嘆。

example: The ambassador met the president this morning.
example_zh: 大使今早會見了總統。

example: The contract's ambiguity caused a lot of arguments.
example_zh: 合約的模糊之處引發了許多爭論。

example: His answer was ambiguous and hard to understand.
example_zh: 他的回答含糊不清，難以理解。

example: Her ambition is to become a famous doctor.
example_zh: 她的抱負是成為一名知名醫生。

example: The young man has ambitious plans for the future.
example_zh: 這位年輕人對未來有雄心勃勃的計畫。

example: The ambulance took the sick man to the hospital.
example_zh: 救護車把病人送到醫院。

example: They decided to amend the old contract.
example_zh: 他們決定修改這份舊合約。

example: My cousin lives in America.
example_zh: 我表哥住在美國。

example: He is an American.
example_zh: 他是美國人。

example: She stayed calm amid all the noise.
example_zh: 在一片吵鬧中她依然保持冷靜。

example: She is very popular among her classmates.
example_zh: 她在同學之間很受歡迎。

example: He spent a large amount of money on books.
example_zh: 他花了一大筆錢買書。

example: We have ample time to catch the train.
example_zh: 我們有充裕的時間趕上火車。

example: The speakers amplify the singer's voice.
example_zh: 喇叭把歌手的聲音放大。

example: The clown tried to amuse the tired children.
example_zh: 小丑試著逗那些疲累的孩子開心。

example: The teacher used an analogy to explain the idea.
example_zh: 老師用一個類比來解釋這個概念。

example: The scientist did a careful analysis of the data.
example_zh: 科學家仔細分析了這些數據。

example: The market analyst predicted a drop in prices.

example_zh: 考試不要作弊。

example: Please check your answers again.
example_zh: 請再檢查一次你的答案。

example: He goes to the doctor for a checkup each year.
example_zh: 他每年去看醫生做健康檢查。

example: The cold wind turned her cheeks red.
example_zh: 冷風把她的臉頰吹紅了。

example: The fans cheer loudly for their favorite team.
example_zh: 球迷們大聲為他們喜愛的球隊加油。

example: My sister is a cheer leader at school.
example_zh: 我姊姊是學校的啦啦隊員。

example: She always greets us with a cheerful smile.
example_zh: 她總是以愉快的微笑向我們打招呼。

example: The mouse loves cheese.
example_zh: 老鼠很愛起司。

example: The chef cooked a wonderful meal for us.
example_zh: 主廚為我們煮了一頓美味的餐點。

example: Some cleaning products contain strong chemicals.
example_zh: 有些清潔用品含有強烈的化學物質。

example: The chemist mixed the liquids very carefully.
example_zh: 化學家非常小心地混合這些液體。

example: We did an interesting experiment in chemistry class today.
example_zh: 我們今天在化學課做了一個有趣的實驗。

example: We should cherish the time with our family.
example_zh: 我們應該珍惜與家人相處的時光。

example: She placed a red cherry on top of the cake.
example_zh: 她在蛋糕上放了一顆紅櫻桃。

example: I play chess with my dad.
example_zh: 我和爸爸下西洋棋。

example: He felt a slight pain in his chest.
example_zh: 他感覺胸口有一點痛。

example: We roasted chestnuts over the warm fire.
example_zh: 我們在溫暖的火上烤栗子。

example: You should chew your food slowly and well.
example_zh: 你應該慢慢地把食物嚼碎。

example: We had chicken for dinner.
example_zh: 我們晚餐吃了雞肉。

example: Safety is the chief concern of the school.
example_zh: 安全是學校最主要的考量。

example: The child is playing in the park.
example_zh: 那個小孩正在公園裡玩。

example: Grandma often talks about her happy childhood.
example_zh: 奶奶常常談起她快樂的童年。

example: Stop being so childish and say sorry to her.
example_zh: 別再這麼幼稚了，去跟她道歉。

example: The old artist still has a childlike love for drawing.
example_zh: 那位老畫家對繪畫仍保有孩子般的熱愛。

example: He added some red chili to make it spicy.
example_zh: 他加了一些紅辣椒讓它變辣。

example: A sudden chill made the children shiver.
example_zh: 突然的寒意讓孩子們發抖。

example: The morning air felt chilly in late autumn.
example_zh: 深秋的清晨空氣感覺微寒。

example: Smoke rose slowly from the old chimney.
example_zh: 煙從老舊的煙囪緩緩升起。

example: The chimpanzee used a stick to catch insects.
example_zh: 黑猩猩用樹枝抓昆蟲。

example: He rested his chin on his hand and thought.
example_zh: 他用手托著下巴思考。

example: The Great Wall is in China.
example_zh: 長城在中國。

example: We have Chinese class every day.
example_zh: 我們每天都有國文課。

example: We get red envelopes on Chinese New Year.
example_zh: 我們在農曆新年拿紅包。

example: This computer runs on a tiny silicon chip.
example_zh: 這台電腦靠一片微小的矽晶片運作。

example: Birds chirp happily in the early morning.
example_zh: 鳥兒在清晨愉快地啁啾鳴叫。

example: She gave me a box of chocolate.
example_zh: 她給了我一盒巧克力。

example: You made a good choice to join the club.
example_zh: 你選擇加入這個社團是個好決定。

example: She sings in the school choir every week.
example_zh: 她每週在學校合唱團裡唱歌。

example: Eating too fast may make you choke.
example_zh: 吃太快可能會讓你噎住。

example: Too much fatty food raises your cholesterol.
example_zh: 太多油膩食物會提高你的膽固醇。

example: You can choose one gift from the box.
example_zh: 你可以從盒子裡選一個禮物。

example: Please chop the onions into small pieces.
example_zh: 請把洋蔥切成小塊。

example: He learned to eat rice with chopsticks.
example_zh: 他學會用筷子吃飯。

example: I eat noodles with chopsticks.
example_zh: 我用筷子吃麵。

example: She played a soft chord on the piano.
example_zh: 她在鋼琴上彈了一個柔和的和弦。

example: Washing dishes is my daily chore at home.
example_zh: 洗碗是我在家每天的家事。

example: Everyone sang the chorus of the happy song.
example_zh: 大家一起唱這首歡樂歌曲的副歌。

example: We sing songs at Christmas.
example_zh: 我們在聖誕節唱歌。

example: He suffers from a chronic pain in his knee.
example_zh: 他的膝蓋有慢性的疼痛。

example: The chubby baby smiled at everyone in the room.
example_zh: 那個圓嘟嘟的寶寶對房間裡的每個人微笑。

example: She cut a big chunk of cheese for the soup.
example_zh: 她切了一大塊起司放進湯裡。

example: They go to church on Sundays.
example_zh: 他們星期日上教堂。

example: The old man smoked a cigar after dinner.
example_zh: 那位老人晚餐後抽了一根雪茄。

example: Smoking a cigarette is bad for your health.
example_zh: 抽香菸對你的健康有害。

example: We watched a funny movie at the cinema.
example_zh: 我們在電影院看了一部好笑的電影。

example: Draw a circle on the paper.
example_zh: 在紙上畫一個圓圈。

example: A broken circuit stopped the machine from working.
example_zh: 斷掉的電路讓機器無法運作。

example: The children sat around a circular table.
example_zh: 孩子們圍著一張圓桌坐著。

example: Blood circulates through the whole body.
example_zh: 血液在全身循環。

example: Exercise improves the circulation of your blood.
example_zh: 運動能改善你的血液循環。

example: We must decide based on the current circumstances.
example_zh: 我們必須根據目前的情況做決定。

example: The children laughed at the clowns in the circus.
example_zh: 孩子們被馬戲團的小丑逗笑了。

example: The student cited a famous poem in her essay.
example_zh: 這名學生在文章中引用了一首著名的詩。

example: Every citizen has the right to vote.
example_zh: 每位公民都有投票的權利。

example: He gained citizenship after living here for years.
example_zh: 他在這裡住了多年後取得公民身分。

example: Taipei is a big city.
example_zh: 台北是一個大城市。

example: Voting is an important civic duty.
example_zh: 投票是一項重要的公民責任。

example: Everyone should learn about their civil rights.
example_zh: 每個人都應該了解自己的公民權利。

example: Many civilians left the city during the war.
example_zh: 許多平民在戰爭期間離開了城市。

example: Ancient Egyptian civilization built amazing pyramids.
example_zh: 古埃及文明建造了驚人的金字塔。

example: Education helps to civilize young minds.
example_zh: 教育有助於教化年輕的心靈。

example: He claims that he saw a ghost last night.
example_zh: 他聲稱昨晚看到了鬼。

example: We dug for clams on the sandy beach.
example_zh: 我們在沙灘上挖蛤蜊。

example: We clap our hands to the music.
example_zh: 我們隨著音樂拍手。

example: Could you clarify what you mean by that?
example_zh: 你能澄清一下你那句話的意思嗎？

example: She explained the plan with great clarity.
example_zh: 她非常清晰地說明了這個計畫。

example: The two groups had a serious clash yesterday.
example_zh: 這兩群人昨天發生了嚴重的衝突。

example: She clasped her mother's hand tightly.
example_zh: 她緊緊握住母親的手。

example: There are thirty students in my class.
example_zh: 我們班有三十個學生。

example: Our class leader helps the teacher a lot.
example_zh: 我們的班長常幫老師很多忙。

example: This novel is a classic loved by many readers.
example_zh: 這本小說是許多讀者喜愛的經典。

example: My mother enjoys listening to classical music at night.
example_zh: 我媽媽喜歡在晚上聽古典音樂。

example: The classification of animals helps us study them.
example_zh: 動物的分類有助於我們研究牠們。

example: Scientists classify plants into different groups.
example_zh: 科學家把植物分類成不同的群組。

example: Amy is my best classmate.
example_zh: 艾咪是我最要好的同班同學。

example: Our classroom is clean and bright.
example_zh: 我們的教室既乾淨又明亮。

example: Please read every clause of the contract carefully.
example_zh: 請仔細閱讀合約的每一條條款。

example: The cat sharpened its claws on the tree.
example_zh: 貓在樹上磨爪子。

example: The children made small animals out of clay.
example_zh: 孩子們用黏土做成小動物。

example: We clean the classroom after school.
example_zh: 我們放學後打掃教室。

example: The cleaner mopped the floor after school.
example_zh: 清潔工在放學後拖了地板。

example: The sky is clear today.
example_zh: 今天天空很晴朗。

example: The store held a clearance sale last week.
example_zh: 這家店上週舉辦了清倉大拍賣。

example: The clerk helped me find the book.
example_zh: 店員幫我找到了那本書。

example: The clever girl solved the hard problem quickly.
example_zh: 那個聰明的女孩很快解出了那道難題。

example: Click the button to start the game.
example_zh: 點擊按鈕就能開始遊戲。

example: The lawyer met his client at the office.
example_zh: 律師在辦公室與他的客戶會面。

example: The old lighthouse stands on a cliff above the sea.
example_zh: 古老的燈塔矗立在海邊的懸崖上。

example: The climate in Taiwan is warm and wet.
example_zh: 台灣的氣候溫暖潮濕。

example: The movie reached its exciting climax in the final scene.
example_zh: 這部電影在最後一幕達到了刺激的高潮。

example: The boy can climb the tree fast.
example_zh: 那個男孩爬樹爬得很快。

example: The frightened child clung tightly to her mother's arm.
example_zh: 受驚的孩子緊緊抓住媽媽的手臂。

example: She visited the clinic to get her flu shot.
example_zh: 她去診所打流感疫苗。

example: The new drug passed several clinical trials last year.
example_zh: 這款新藥去年通過了數次臨床試驗。

example: He used a clip to hold the papers together.
example_zh: 他用一個夾子把文件夾在一起。

example: The clock on the wall is slow.
example_zh: 牆上的時鐘慢了。

example: Turn the key clockwise to lock the door.
example_zh: 把鑰匙順時針轉來鎖門。

example: Scientists managed to clone a sheep in the lab.
example_zh: 科學家成功在實驗室複製了一隻羊。

example: Please close the door.
example_zh: 請把門關上。

example: She hung her new dress in the closet.
example_zh: 她把新洋裝掛進衣櫥裡。

example: The factory's closure left many workers without jobs.
example_zh: 工廠關閉使許多工人失去了工作。

example: She wiped the table with a clean cloth.
example_zh: 她用一塊乾淨的布擦桌子。

example: The charity works hard to clothe homeless children.
example_zh: 這個慈善機構努力為無家可歸的孩子提供衣物。

example: I wear warm clothes in winter.
example_zh: 我冬天穿保暖的衣服。

example: Please bring warm clothing for the mountain trip.
example_zh: 請為這趟登山之旅帶上保暖衣物。

example: The dark clouds tell us it may rain soon.
example_zh: 烏雲告訴我們可能快下雨了。

example: It is cloudy today.
example_zh: 今天是陰天。

example: The clown made all the children laugh at the party.
example_zh: 小丑在派對上逗得所有孩子哈哈大笑。

example: I join the music club at school.
example_zh: 我在學校參加音樂社。

example: The detective found an important clue at the scene.
example_zh: 偵探在現場找到了一條重要的線索。

example: He is so clumsy that he often drops his cup.
example_zh: 他很笨拙，常常摔破自己的杯子。

example: A cluster of stars shone brightly in the sky.
example_zh: 一群星星在天空中明亮地閃爍。

example: Our coach teaches us how to play basketball well.
example_zh: 我們的教練教我們如何打好籃球。

example: The old train ran on coal many years ago.
example_zh: 多年前這輛老火車是燒煤的。

example: The two parties formed a coalition to win the election.
example_zh: 兩個政黨組成聯盟以贏得選舉。

example: The blanket felt coarse against her soft skin.
example_zh: 這條毯子貼著她柔嫩的皮膚感覺很粗糙。

example: We drove along the coast and enjoyed the view.
example_zh: 我們沿著海岸開車，欣賞風景。

example: Taiwan has a beautiful coastline worth visiting.
example_zh: 台灣有值得一遊的美麗海岸線。

example: Put on your coat before you go out.
example_zh: 出門前穿上你的外套。

example: Selling cocaine is a serious crime in every country.
example_zh: 販賣古柯鹼在每個國家都是重罪。

example: The cock crows loudly every morning at dawn.
example_zh: 公雞每天清晨都會大聲啼叫。

example: My sister screamed when she saw a cockroach.
example_zh: 我妹妹看到蟑螂時尖叫了起來。

example: She ordered a fruit cocktail at the beach bar.
example_zh: 她在海灘酒吧點了一杯水果雞尾酒。

example: A cup of hot cocoa warmed me on the cold night.
example_zh: 一杯熱可可在寒冷的夜裡溫暖了我。

example: We drank fresh coconut water on the tropical island.
example_zh: 我們在熱帶島嶼上喝新鮮的椰子水。

example: You need a secret code to open this door.
example_zh: 你需要一組密碼才能打開這扇門。

example: Dad drinks coffee every morning.
example_zh: 爸爸每天早上喝咖啡。

example: They carried the coffin slowly to the graveyard.
example_zh: 他們緩緩地把棺材抬向墓地。

example: Reading books improves a child's cognitive skills.
example_zh: 閱讀書籍能增進孩子的認知能力。

example: She gave a clear and coherent answer to the question.
example_zh: 她對這個問題給出清晰又連貫的回答。

example: He saves coins in a little pink pig.
example_zh: 他把硬幣存進一隻粉紅小豬撲滿裡。

example: Meeting my teacher here was a total coincidence.
example_zh: 在這裡遇見我的老師完全是個巧合。

example: I want a glass of cola.
example_zh: 我想要一杯可樂。

example: It is very cold in winter.
example_zh: 冬天非常冷。

example: The song was a collaboration between two famous singers.
example_zh: 這首歌是兩位知名歌手合作的成果。

example: The old bridge collapsed during the heavy storm.
example_zh: 那座舊橋在暴風雨中倒塌了。

example: He turned up his collar against the cold wind.
example_zh: 他豎起衣領抵擋寒風。

example: My colleague helped me finish the report on time.
example_zh: 我的同事幫我準時完成了報告。

example: I like to collect stamps.
example_zh: 我喜歡收集郵票。

example: He showed us his large collection of old stamps.
example_zh: 他向我們展示了他大量的舊郵票收藏。

example: The team made a collective decision to work harder.
example_zh: 團隊做出了更努力工作的集體決定。

example: The art collector bought several rare paintings.
example_zh: 那位藝術收藏家買下了數幅珍稀畫作。

example: My brother will go to college next year.
example_zh: 我哥哥明年要上大學。

example: The collision between two cars blocked the road.
example_zh: 兩車相撞把道路堵住了。

example: This phrase is too colloquial for a formal essay.
example_zh: 這個詞語對正式作文來說太口語了。

example: The town still has many old colonial buildings.
example_zh: 這座城鎮仍保有許多古老的殖民時期建築。

example: This country was once a British colony.
example_zh: 這個國家曾是英國的殖民地。

example: What color do you like best?
example_zh: 你最喜歡什麼顏色？

example: The garden is full of colorful flowers in spring.
example_zh: 春天時花園裡開滿了五彩繽紛的花。

example: She writes a weekly column for the newspaper.
example_zh: 她為報社寫一個每週專欄。

example: The columnist shared his opinion on the new policy.
example_zh: 那位專欄作家分享了他對新政策的看法。

example: She combs her hair every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上梳頭髮。

example: Doctors work hard to combat the deadly disease.
example_zh: 醫生們努力對抗這種致命的疾病。

example: This dish is a tasty combination of sweet and sour.
example_zh: 這道菜是酸甜可口的組合。

example: We combined our ideas to solve the difficult problem.
example_zh: 我們結合彼此的想法來解決這個難題。

example: Please come to my birthday party.
example_zh: 請來參加我的生日派對。

example: The comedian told jokes that made everyone laugh.
example_zh: 那位喜劇演員講的笑話逗得大家哈哈大笑。

example: We watched a funny comedy at the cinema last night.
example_zh: 我們昨晚在電影院看了一部好笑的喜劇。

example: A bright comet appeared in the night sky.
example_zh: 一顆明亮的彗星出現在夜空中。

example: She hugged the crying boy to comfort him.
example_zh: 她抱住哭泣的男孩來安慰他。

example: This sofa is very comfortable.
example_zh: 這張沙發非常舒服。

example: I read comic books after school.
example_zh: 我放學後看漫畫書。

example: Remember to put a comma between the two clauses.
example_zh: 記得在兩個子句之間加上逗號。

example: The general gave the command to move forward.
example_zh: 將軍下令前進。

example: The commander ordered his soldiers to move forward.
example_zh: 指揮官命令他的士兵向前推進。

example: The teacher wrote a kind comment on my report.
example_zh: 老師在我的報告上寫了一句親切的評語。

example: The reporter gave live commentary during the game.
example_zh: 記者在比賽中做了現場實況報導。

example: The sports commentator explained every play clearly.
example_zh: 那位體育評論員把每一次進攻都解說得很清楚。

example: The city has become a center of trade and commerce.
example_zh: 這座城市已成為貿易與商業的中心。

example: This TV commercial promotes a new brand of shoes.
example_zh: 這則電視廣告在宣傳一個新的鞋子品牌。

example: The government set up a commission to study the problem.
example_zh: 政府成立了一個委員會來研究這個問題。

example: He would never commit such a terrible crime.
example_zh: 他絕不會犯下如此可怕的罪行。

example: Marriage is a serious commitment between two people.
example_zh: 婚姻是兩個人之間認真的承諾。

example: The committee will meet to discuss the new rules.
example_zh: 委員會將開會討論新規則。

example: Rice is an important commodity in many Asian countries.
example_zh: 米在許多亞洲國家是重要的商品。

example: Lin is a common family name in Taiwan.
example_zh: 林是台灣常見的姓氏。

example: Smartphones have become commonplace in daily life.
example_zh: 智慧型手機在日常生活中已很平常。

example: Australia is a member of the Commonwealth.
example_zh: 澳洲是大英國協的一員。

example: We use email to communicate with foreign clients.
example_zh: 我們用電子郵件與國外客戶溝通。

example: Good communication is the key to a happy family.
example_zh: 良好的溝通是幸福家庭的關鍵。

example: She is friendly and communicative with new students.
example_zh: 她對新同學友善又健談。

example: The book explains the history of communism.
example_zh: 這本書解釋了共產主義的歷史。

example: He studied the ideas of the communist party.
example_zh: 他研究了共產黨的思想。

example: Our community held a party in the local park.
example_zh: 我們社區在當地公園辦了一場派對。

example: I commute to work by train every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上搭火車通勤上班。

example: The station was full of tired commuters.
example_zh: 車站裡滿是疲憊的通勤者。

example: She bought a compact car that is easy to park.
example_zh: 她買了一輛容易停放的小型車。

example: The dog has been his faithful companion for years.
example_zh: 這隻狗多年來一直是他忠實的同伴。

example: My father works for a computer company in Hsinchu.
example_zh: 我爸爸在新竹一家電腦公司工作。

example: The two phones are comparable in price and quality.
example_zh: 這兩支手機在價格和品質上相當。

example: We made a comparative study of the two cultures.
example_zh: 我們對這兩種文化做了比較研究。

example: Don't compare yourself with others all the time.
example_zh: 不要總是拿自己和別人比較。

example: In comparison with last year, sales have grown.
example_zh: 與去年相比，銷售額成長了。

example_zh: 登山者用羅盤來辨認方向。

example: She showed great compassion toward the poor.
example_zh: 她對窮人展現了極大的同情。

example: The nurse was gentle and compassionate with patients.
example_zh: 那位護士對病人溫柔又有同情心。

example: This printer is compatible with most computers.

example: Bad weather compelled us to cancel the trip.
example_zh: 惡劣的天氣迫使我們取消了旅行。

example: The company will compensate workers for the extra hours.
example_zh: 公司會補償員工加班的時數。

example: He received compensation for the damage to his car.
example_zh: 他因車子的損壞獲得了補償。

example_zh: 許多學生競爭同一份獎學金。

example_zh: 她的英文能力讓經理印象深刻。

example_zh: 我們需要一位有能力的領導者來帶領團隊。

example: She won first prize in the singing competition.
example_zh: 她在歌唱比賽中贏得了第一名。

zh: 競爭激烈的；有競爭力的
example: The job market is very competitive these days.
example_zh: 現今的就業市場競爭非常激烈。

example_zh: 我們最大的競爭者降低了價格。

example_zh: 老師彙整了一份實用網站清單。

example_zh: 他總是抱怨天氣熱。

example_zh: 那位顧客針對冷掉的食物提出抱怨。

example_zh: 紅色圍巾與她的黑色洋裝相得益彰。

example_zh: 你必須在晚餐前完成功課。

example_zh: 這道數學題對我來說太複雜了。

example_zh: 她有著乾淨又健康的膚色。

example_zh: 這項計畫的複雜程度令大家吃驚。

example_zh: 這家工廠依法運作。

example: She gave me a nice compliment about my speech.

example_zh: 所有駕駛都必須遵守交通規則。

example: I use the computer to do homework.

example_zh: 圖書館決定把館藏紀錄電腦化。

example_zh: 請安靜，好讓我能專注於工作。

example_zh: 老師把重力的概念解釋得很清楚。

example_zh: 父母總是對孩子表現出極大的關心。

example_zh: 我有幾個關於新計畫的問題。

example_zh: 我們上週末欣賞了一場精彩的音樂會。

example_zh: 工人們在罷工後爭取到了讓步。

example_zh: 你的報告應該清楚又簡潔。

example_zh: 講者以一個笑話結束了她的演講。

example_zh: 請給我一個關於這問題的具體例子。

example_zh: 許多人譴責這種殘忍的行為。

example_zh: 他把這個長故事濃縮成一段簡短的摘要。

example_zh: 這棟房子以其屋齡而言狀況良好。

example_zh: 那位科學家明天將進行一項實驗。

example_zh: 指揮充滿活力地帶領著管弦樂團。

example_zh: 小孩開心地舔著她的冰淇淋甜筒。

example_zh: 數個州為了防衛而組成邦聯。

example_zh: 科學家們參加了一場國際會議。

example_zh: 他終於坦承是自己打破了窗戶。

example_zh: 她的坦白讓全班都很吃驚。

example: These documents are strictly confidential.
example_zh: 這些文件是嚴格保密的。

example_zh: 生病的男孩被限制臥床一週。

example_zh: 請在星期五之前確認你的預訂。

example: New students must conform to the school rules.

example_zh: 那場會議在憤怒的對抗中結束。

example_zh: 那個難題讓所有學生都感到困惑。

example: The sudden change caused great confusion.

example: I want to congratulate you on your success.
example_zh: 我想恭喜你的成功。

example: Congratulations on winning the first prize!
example_zh: 恭喜你贏得第一名！

example: The congress passed a new law last week.
example_zh: 國會上週通過了一項新法律。

example_zh: 那位國會議員投票支持新的教育法案。

example: This road connects the two small towns.
example_zh: 這條路連接了這兩個小鎮。

example: There is a close connection between the two events.
example_zh: 這兩個事件之間有密切的關聯。

example: The army tried to conquer the whole region.
example_zh: 那支軍隊試圖征服整個地區。

example_zh: 征服這片土地花了許多年。

example_zh: 他愧疚的良心使他夜裡難以入睡。

example_zh: 她是個認真盡責、從不漏交作業的學生。

example_zh: 上週一連下了三天的雨。

example_zh: 這個專案花了相當多的時間。

example_zh: 你幫助那位老先生真是體貼。

example_zh: 這支隊伍由十名技術純熟的球員組成。

example_zh: 她的成績整年來都保持一致。

example_zh: 贏得第二名算是個小小的安慰。

example: The letter B stands for a consonant sound.
example_zh: 字母 B 代表一個子音。

example_zh: 警方揭發了一個危險的陰謀。

example: Twelve months constitute a year.
example_zh: 十二個月構成一年。

example_zh: 這個國家的憲法保障言論自由。

example: The new law raised a constitutional question.
example_zh: 這條新法引發了一個憲法問題。

example: Time constraints forced us to work faster.
example_zh: 時間的限制迫使我們加快工作速度。

example: Workers will construct a new bridge next year.
example_zh: 工人們明年將建造一座新橋。

example: The construction of the school took two years.
example_zh: 這所學校的建造花了兩年。

example_zh: 她針對我的作文給了一些建設性的建議。

example: You should consult a doctor about your headache.
example_zh: 你應該就你的頭痛去諮詢醫生。

example_zh: 公司聘請了一位顧問來提升銷售。

example: These old machines consume too much electricity.

example_zh: 如果你有任何問題請聯絡我。

example_zh: 她現在戴隱形眼鏡而不戴眼鏡了。

example_zh: 這個盒子裝著我所有的舊照片。

example_zh: 她把餅乾放在一個塑膠容器裡。

example_zh: 他靜靜地坐著沉思自己的未來。

example_zh: 這間博物館展示許多當代畫作。

example_zh: 她以深深的輕蔑看著那個說謊者。

example_zh: 兩支隊伍將爭奪冠軍。

example_zh: 他的主要論點是這項計畫並不公平。

example_zh: 她贏得了學校的寫作比賽。

example_zh: 試著從上下文猜出這個字的意思。

example_zh: 非洲是一塊廣大又美麗的大陸。

example_zh: 他們在飯店享用了歐陸式早餐。

example_zh: 不斷的降雨毀了我們的假期計畫。

example_zh: 這個故事從頭到尾維持著連貫性。

example_zh: 那位歌手和音樂公司簽了合約。

example: The contractor promised to finish the house on time.

example: There is a contradiction between the two reports.
example_zh: 這兩份報告之間存在矛盾。

example_zh: 這兩幅畫之間有強烈的對比。

example_zh: 許多人每年捐錢給這個慈善機構。

example_zh: 她對科學的貢獻真的非常了不起。

example: You should learn to control your temper.
example_zh: 你應該學著控制自己的脾氣。

example_zh: 他把遊戲控制器插進主機裡。

example: The film caused a great deal of controversy.
example_zh: 這部電影引起了很大的爭議。

example: The chairman decided to convene a meeting next week.
example_zh: 主席決定下週召開一場會議。

example: For your convenience, the store opens all night.
example_zh: 為了方便您，這家店整夜營業。

example: I bought a drink at the convenience store nearby.
example_zh: 我在附近的便利商店買了一瓶飲料。

example: Taking the MRT is fast and convenient.

example: Shaking hands is a common social convention.

example_zh: 比起新點子，她偏好傳統的方法。

example_zh: 我們愉快地聊了暑假的計畫。

example_zh: 他們在房間角落輕聲交談。

example: The conversion from dollars to euros took a minute.
example_zh: 從美元換成歐元花了一分鐘。

example_zh: 他們打算把舊穀倉改建成房子。

example_zh: 光靠言語無法傳達我有多感激。

example: The jury voted to convict him of the crime.
example_zh: 陪審團投票裁定他有罪。

example: I tried hard to convince him to stay.
example_zh: 我努力想說服他留下來。

example: Mom cooks dinner for us every day.
example_zh: 媽媽每天為我們煮晚餐。

example: My mother bought a new rice cooker yesterday.
example_zh: 我媽媽昨天買了一個新的電鍋。

example: Grandma baked cookies for us.
example_zh: 奶奶為我們烤了餅乾。

example: The weather is cool in fall.
example_zh: 秋天的天氣很涼爽。

example: The two teams agreed to cooperate on the project.
example_zh: 兩支團隊同意在這個專案上合作。

example: Thank you for your cooperation during the event.
example_zh: 謝謝你們在活動期間的合作。

example: The children were friendly and very cooperative.
example_zh: 孩子們友善又非常配合。

example_zh: 她協助協調整趟校外教學。

example: He found it hard to cope with the pressure.
example_zh: 他覺得很難應付這種壓力。

example: The old coins were made of copper.
example_zh: 那些舊硬幣是用銅做的。

example: Please copy the words on the board.
example_zh: 請抄下黑板上的字。

example: This song is protected by copyright law.
example_zh: 這首歌受著作權法保護。

example_zh: 色彩繽紛的魚在珊瑚礁周圍游動。

example: Please don't trip over the power cord.
example_zh: 請別被電源線絆倒。

example: Trust lies at the core of any friendship.

example: The farmer grows corn in his big field.
example_zh: 農夫在他的大田裡種玉米。

example: The store is on the corner.
example_zh: 那家店在轉角處。

example: She works in the corporate office downtown.
example_zh: 她在市中心的企業辦公室工作。

example: He founded a large corporation in his thirties.
example_zh: 他三十幾歲時創立了一家大公司。

example_zh: 警方在河邊發現了一具屍體。

example_zh: 你的答案是正確的。

example: There is a clear correlation between sleep and health.
example_zh: 睡眠與健康之間有明顯的關聯。

example_zh: 他們多年來一直保持通信。

example_zh: 學生們沿著學校走廊奔跑。

example_zh: 那名貪腐的官員終於被逮捕了。

example: The new leader promised to fight corruption.
example_zh: 新領導人承諾要打擊貪腐。

example: The changes were merely cosmetic, not real.
example_zh: 這些改變只是表面的，並不實質。

example: She spends a lot of money on cosmetics.
example_zh: 她花很多錢買化妝品。

example_zh: 這個袋子要價三百元。

example: Repairing the old car proved very costly.
example_zh: 修理那輛舊車結果非常昂貴。

example: She wore a beautiful costume to the party.

example_zh: 學生們將針對學校制服進行辯論。

example_zh: 糖會讓你的牙齒蛀蝕。

example_zh: 這家店會從售價中扣除十美元。

example: The court deemed the evidence unreliable.

example_zh: 今天外面有三十度。

example_zh: 大雨造成機場長時間的延誤。

example_zh: 每所學校派了一名代表出席會議。

example: We should protect the environment.
example_zh: 我們應該保護環境。

example: We must pay attention to environmental protection.
example_zh: 我們必須重視環境保護。

example: She envisions a future full of new possibilities.
example_zh: 她展望一個充滿新可能的未來。

example: I envy her beautiful voice.
example_zh: 我羨慕她美妙的嗓音。

example: The flu epidemic spread quickly through the city.
example_zh: 流感疫情迅速在城市中蔓延。

example: I can't wait to watch the next episode.
example_zh: 我等不及要看下一集了。

example: Everyone has an equal chance to win.
example_zh: 每個人都有同等的獲勝機會。

example: Many people fought for equality and justice.
example_zh: 許多人為了平等與正義而奮鬥。

example: The new rules aim to equalize chances for everyone.
example_zh: 新規則旨在使每個人的機會均等。

example: Do not equate money with happiness.
example_zh: 不要把金錢和快樂畫上等號。

example: The student solved the math equation quickly.
example_zh: 這名學生很快解出了這道數學方程式。

example: The gym is well equipped with modern machines.
example_zh: 這間健身房配備了現代化的器材。

example: The policy aims to promote equity in education.
example_zh: 這項政策旨在促進教育的公平。

example: One dollar is roughly equivalent to thirty dollars.
example_zh: 一美元大約等於三十元台幣。

example: We are living in the era of the internet.
example_zh: 我們生活在網際網路的時代。

example: He used a rubber to erase the wrong answer.
example_zh: 他用橡皮擦擦掉錯誤的答案。

example: May I borrow your eraser?
example_zh: 我可以借你的橡皮擦嗎？

example: Workers began to erect a new statue in the park.
example_zh: 工人開始在公園裡豎立一座新雕像。

example: My mother sent me on an errand to the store.
example_zh: 我媽媽叫我去商店辦點事。

example: There is an error in your answer.
example_zh: 你的答案裡有一個錯誤。

example: The volcano may erupt at any moment.
example_zh: 這座火山隨時可能爆發。

example: We took the escalator up to the second floor.
example_zh: 我們搭手扶梯上二樓。

example: The prisoner tried to escape from the jail.
example_zh: 那名囚犯試圖從監獄逃跑。

example: Police cars will escort the president to the airport.
example_zh: 警車將護送總統到機場。

example: I love fruit, especially mangoes.
example_zh: 我愛吃水果，尤其是芒果。

example: She wrote an essay about her summer vacation.
example_zh: 她寫了一篇關於暑假的文章。

example: Kindness is the essence of true friendship.
example_zh: 善良是真正友誼的本質。

example: Water is essential to all living things.
example_zh: 水對所有生物都是必要的。

example: They plan to establish a new school in the town.
example_zh: 他們計畫在鎮上設立一所新學校。

example: He inherited a large estate from his grandfather.
example_zh: 他從祖父那裡繼承了一大片地產。

example: The old teacher is held in high esteem.
example_zh: 這位老教師深受眾人尊敬。

example: Experts estimate that the bridge will cost millions.
example_zh: 專家估計這座橋將耗資數百萬。

example: They promised each other eternal love.
example_zh: 他們向彼此許下永恆的愛。

example: Waiting for the results felt like an eternity.
example_zh: 等待結果的感覺像是永恆那麼久。

example: A strong work ethic helped him succeed.
example_zh: 強烈的職業道德幫助他成功。

example: Doctors must make ethical decisions every day.
example_zh: 醫生每天都必須做出合乎道德的決定。

example: This city is home to many ethnic groups.
example_zh: 這座城市是許多族群的家園。

example: The teacher told us to evacuate the building quickly.
example_zh: 老師要我們迅速撤離大樓。

example: Teachers evaluate students' progress every term.
example_zh: 老師每學期評估學生的進步。

example: The manager gave each worker a fair evaluation.
example_zh: 經理對每位員工做出公正的評估。

example: We had a big dinner on New Year's Eve.
example_zh: 我們在除夕夜吃了一頓大餐。

example: Even a child can do it.
example_zh: 連小孩子都會做。

example: We take a walk in the evening.
example_zh: 我們傍晚去散步。

example: The school sports day is a big event.
example_zh: 學校運動會是一項盛大的活動。

example: Hard work led to his eventual success.
example_zh: 努力帶來了他最終的成功。

example: Have you ever been to Japan?
example_zh: 你去過日本嗎？

example: Pine trees are evergreen and stay green all year.
example_zh: 松樹是常綠植物，一年到頭都是綠的。

example: Every student needs a pencil.
example_zh: 每位學生都需要一枝鉛筆。

example: Everyone loves the new teacher.
example_zh: 每個人都喜歡新老師。

example: Everything is ready for the party.
example_zh: 派對的一切都準備好了。

example: I looked everywhere for my keys.
example_zh: 我到處找我的鑰匙。

example: The police found new evidence at the scene.
example_zh: 警方在現場發現了新的證據。

example: It was evident that she had been crying.
example_zh: 很明顯她剛剛哭過。

example: The story has an evil witch.
example_zh: 這個故事裡有一個邪惡的女巫。

example: The old song can evoke happy childhood memories.
example_zh: 這首老歌能喚起快樂的童年回憶。

example: We learned about the evolution of birds in class.
example_zh: 我們在課堂上學到鳥類的演化。

example: Languages slowly evolve over many years.
example_zh: 語言會隨著多年而慢慢演變。

example: Can you tell me the exact time now?
example_zh: 你能告訴我現在確切的時間嗎？

example: He likes to exaggerate his fishing stories.
example_zh: 他喜歡誇大他釣魚的故事。

example: To say he is a genius is no exaggeration.
example_zh: 說他是天才一點也不誇張。

example: I studied hard for the math exam.
example_zh: 我為數學考試用功讀書。

example: She studied hard for the final examination.
example_zh: 她為了期末考努力讀書。

example: The doctor will examine you in a moment.
example_zh: 醫生馬上就會為你檢查。

example: Each examinee must show an ID card at the door.
example_zh: 每位應試者都必須在門口出示身分證。

example: The examiner asked the student a few questions.
example_zh: 主考官問了學生幾個問題。

example: Please give me an example.
example_zh: 請給我一個例子。

example: Do not exceed the speed limit on this road.
example_zh: 在這條路上不要超速。

example: She excels in both music and sports.
example_zh: 她在音樂和運動方面都很出色。

example: The school is known for its excellence in teaching.
example_zh: 這所學校以卓越的教學聞名。

example: Her English is excellent.
example_zh: 她的英文非常好。

example: Everyone came except John.
example_zh: 除了約翰，大家都來了。

example: Everyone must follow the rules with no exception.
example_zh: 每個人都必須遵守規則，沒有例外。

example: She has an exceptional talent for painting.
example_zh: 她有繪畫的傑出天分。

example: The teacher read an excerpt from the famous novel.
example_zh: 老師朗讀了那本名著的一段節選。

example: An excess of sugar is bad for your health.
example_zh: 糖分攝取過量對健康有害。

example: Excessive use of phones can hurt your eyes.
example_zh: 過度使用手機會傷害你的眼睛。

example: The students exchange gifts at the party.
example_zh: 學生們在派對上交換禮物。

example: The good news excited all the fans.
example_zh: 這個好消息讓所有粉絲都很興奮。

example: The kids are excited about the trip.
example_zh: 孩子們對這趟旅行感到很興奮。

example: The game is very exciting.
example_zh: 這場比賽非常刺激。

example: "We won!" the children began to exclaim happily.
example_zh: 孩子們開心地驚呼：「我們贏了！」

example: The price does not exclude the service fee.
example_zh: 這個價格並未排除服務費。

example: His exclusion from the team made him sad.
example_zh: 被排除在隊伍之外讓他很難過。

example: The club is exclusive to its members.
example_zh: 這家俱樂部只對會員開放。

example: Excuse me, where is the park?
example_zh: 不好意思，請問公園在哪裡？

example: The team worked hard to execute the plan.
example_zh: 團隊努力執行這項計畫。

example: The success depends on the careful execution of the plan.
example_zh: 成功取決於這項計畫的謹慎執行。

example: She is a busy executive at a large company.
example_zh: 她是一家大公司裡忙碌的主管。

example: Students under six are exempt from the fee.
example_zh: 六歲以下的學童免收費用。

example: I exercise every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上運動。

example: Parents can exert a strong influence on children.
example_zh: 父母對孩子能產生強大的影響。

example: The long hike will exhaust everyone in the group.
example_zh: 這趟長途健行會讓每個人都筋疲力盡。

example: The gallery will exhibit works by young artists.
example_zh: 這間畫廊將展出年輕藝術家的作品。

example: We visited an art exhibition last weekend.
example_zh: 我們上週末參觀了一場藝術展覽。

example: The writer lived in exile for many years.
example_zh: 這位作家流亡海外多年。

example: Do ghosts really exist in the world?
example_zh: 世界上真的有鬼存在嗎？

example: Few people knew about the existence of the cave.
example_zh: 很少人知道這個洞穴的存在。

example: The exit is on your right.
example_zh: 出口在你的右邊。

example: The market sells many exotic fruits from abroad.
example_zh: 這個市場賣許多來自國外的奇特水果。

example: The company hopes to expand into new markets.
example_zh: 這家公司希望擴展到新市場。

example: The rapid expansion of the city changed everything.
example_zh: 城市的快速擴張改變了一切。

example: I expect to see you at the party.
example_zh: 我期待在派對上見到你。

example: The show went beyond all our expectations.
example_zh: 這場表演超出了我們所有的期望。

example: The team went on an expedition to the North Pole.
example_zh: 這支隊伍前往北極進行探險。

example: The government tried to cut public expenditure.
example_zh: 政府試圖削減公共支出。

example: Travel is a big expense for our family.
example_zh: 旅行對我們家是一大筆花費。

example: This watch is too expensive.
example_zh: 這支手錶太貴了。

example: The trip was a great experience.
example_zh: 這趟旅行是很棒的經驗。

example: The students did a fun science experiment today.
example_zh: 學生們今天做了一個有趣的科學實驗。

example: The band tried a new experimental style of music.
example_zh: 這個樂團嘗試了一種新的實驗性音樂風格。

example: She is an expert in ancient Chinese history.
example_zh: 她是中國古代史的專家。

example: We need someone with technical expertise for this job.
example_zh: 這份工作需要具備技術專業的人。

example: Always check the expiration date on food packages.
example_zh: 請隨時檢查食品包裝上的有效期限。

example: My passport will expire next month.
example_zh: 我的護照下個月就要到期了。

example: Can you explain this word to me?
example_zh: 你可以跟我解釋這個字嗎？

example: The teacher gave a clear explanation of the problem.
example_zh: 老師對這個問題做了清楚的解釋。

example: She gave us explicit instructions before the trip.
example_zh: 出發前她給了我們明確的指示。

example: The old bomb could explode at any time.
example_zh: 這顆舊炸彈隨時可能爆炸。

example: Some companies exploit their workers for profit.
example_zh: 有些公司為了利潤而剝削員工。

example: Space exploration has always fascinated scientists.
example_zh: 太空探索一直令科學家著迷。

example: We love to explore new places on holidays.
example_zh: 假日時我們喜歡探索新地方。

example: A loud explosion woke everyone in the neighborhood.
example_zh: 一聲巨大的爆炸吵醒了鄰里所有人。

example: The workers handled the explosive materials carefully.
example_zh: 工人們小心地處理這些爆炸性物質。

example: This country exports rice to many nations.
example_zh: 這個國家把稻米出口到許多國家。

example: Do not expose your skin to the strong sun.
example_zh: 不要讓你的皮膚暴露在強烈的陽光下。

example: Too much exposure to the sun can be harmful.
example_zh: 過度曝曬陽光可能有害。

example: It is hard to express my feelings in words.
example_zh: 用言語表達我的感受很難。

example: A smile is an expression of happiness.
example_zh: 微笑是快樂的一種表達。

example: The dancer's movements were very expressive.
example_zh: 這位舞者的動作非常有表現力。

example: They decided to extend the deadline by one week.
example_zh: 他們決定把截止日期延長一週。

example: She asked for an extension to finish the report.
example_zh: 她要求延期以完成報告。

example: He has extensive knowledge of world history.
example_zh: 他對世界歷史有廣泛的知識。

example: To some extent, I agree with your opinion.
example_zh: 在某種程度上，我同意你的看法。

example: The exterior of the house needs fresh paint.
example_zh: 這棟房子的外部需要重新粉刷。

example: This medicine is for external use only.
example_zh: 這種藥只供外用。

example: Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.
example_zh: 恐龍在數百萬年前就絕種了。

example: Do you have an extra pen for me?
example_zh: 你有多的筆可以給我嗎？

example: The dentist had to extract his bad tooth.
example_zh: 牙醫必須拔掉他的蛀牙。

example: Sports clubs are popular extracurricular activities at school.
example_zh: 運動社團是學校裡受歡迎的課外活動。

example: She showed extraordinary courage during the fire.
example_zh: 她在火災中展現了非凡的勇氣。

example: The desert has extreme heat during the day.
example_zh: 沙漠白天有極端的高溫。

example: She has big brown eyes.
example_zh: 她有一雙棕色的大眼睛。

example: She raised one eyebrow in surprise.
example_zh: 她驚訝地揚起一邊眉毛。

example: An eyelash fell into her eye and hurt.
example_zh: 一根睫毛掉進她的眼睛裡，很痛。

example: His eyelids grew heavy as he got sleepy.
example_zh: 他愈來愈睏，眼皮變得沉重。

example: Reading in the dark can harm your eyesight.
example_zh: 在暗處看書會傷害你的視力。

example: The teacher read us a fable about a fox.
example_zh: 老師念了一則關於狐狸的寓言給我們聽。

example: This dress is made of soft cotton fabric.
example_zh: 這件洋裝是用柔軟的棉布做的。

example: We had a fabulous time at the beach.
example_zh: 我們在海灘玩得非常開心。

example: Wash your face before bed.
example_zh: 睡前要洗臉。

example: Her facial expression showed that she was worried.
example_zh: 她的臉部表情顯示她很擔心。

example: Good tools can facilitate learning in the classroom.
example_zh: 好的工具能促進課堂上的學習。

example: The new sports facility opened last month.
example_zh: 這座新的運動設施上個月開幕了。

example: In fact, I like dogs a lot.
example_zh: 事實上，我很喜歡狗。

example: The party split into two rival factions.
example_zh: 這個政黨分裂成兩個對立的派系。

example: Price is an important factor when we buy things.
example_zh: 價格是我們買東西時的重要因素。

example: My uncle works in a factory.
example_zh: 我叔叔在工廠工作。

example: The whole faculty attended the morning meeting.
example_zh: 全體教職員都出席了早上的會議。

example: The colors of the old photo began to fade.
example_zh: 這張舊照片的顏色開始褪色。

example: Water boils at 212 degrees Fahrenheit.
example_zh: 水在華氏 212 度時沸騰。

example: Don't be afraid to fail.
example_zh: 不要害怕失敗。

example: Failure is often the first step toward success.
example_zh: 失敗往往是通往成功的第一步。

example: She felt so hot that she almost fainted.
example_zh: 她熱到差點昏倒。

example: The rules of the game are fair to everyone.
example_zh: 這個遊戲的規則對每個人都很公平。

example: The test was fairly easy for most students.
example_zh: 這次考試對大多數學生來說相當簡單。

example: My little sister loves reading fairy tales.
example_zh: 我的妹妹喜歡讀童話故事。

example: She never lost faith in her dream.
example_zh: 她從未對自己的夢想失去信念。

example: A dog is a faithful friend to humans.
example_zh: 狗是人類忠實的朋友。

example: The bag turned out to be a cheap fake.
example_zh: 這個包包原來是便宜的仿冒品。

example: Leaves fall from the trees.
example_zh: 葉子從樹上掉下來。

example: Is this sentence true or false?
example_zh: 這個句子是對還是錯？

example: Her voice did not falter as she read the poem aloud.
example_zh: 她朗讀那首詩時，聲音沒有動搖。

example: The scientist won fame for her work on clean energy.
example_zh: 這位科學家因潔淨能源的研究而聞名。

example: The song sounded familiar to everyone in the class.
example_zh: 這首歌對班上每個人來說都很熟悉。

example: Her familiarity with the topic helped her write the report.
example_zh: 她對這個主題的熟悉幫助她寫出報告。

example: There are three people in my family.
example_zh: 我家有三個人。

example: This night market is very famous.
example_zh: 這個夜市非常有名。

example: Please turn on the fan.
example_zh: 請打開電風扇。

example: They had dinner at a fancy restaurant.
example_zh: 他們在一家高級餐廳吃晚餐。

example: The movie last night was fantastic.
example_zh: 昨晚的電影棒極了。

example: The novel is a fantasy about a world without gravity.
example_zh: 這本小說是關於一個沒有重力世界的幻想。

example: My school is not far from home.
example_zh: 我的學校離家不遠。

example: The bus fare went up by five dollars this year.
example_zh: 今年公車票價漲了五塊錢。

example: We said farewell to our teacher on the last day.
example_zh: 最後一天我們向老師道別。

example: There are many cows on the farm.
example_zh: 農場上有很多牛。

example: The farmer grows rice and corn.
example_zh: 這位農夫種稻米和玉米。

example: The library is farther from here than the park.
example_zh: 圖書館比公園離這裡更遠。

example: Stars in the night sky fascinate many young students.
example_zh: 夜空中的星星讓許多年輕學生著迷。

example: His fascination with insects led him to study biology.
example_zh: 他對昆蟲的著迷讓他去研究生物學。

example: Clothing fashion changes from year to year.
example_zh: 服裝的流行趨勢年年變化。

example: She likes to wear fashionable clothes.
example_zh: 她喜歡穿時髦的衣服。

example: He runs very fast.
example_zh: 他跑得非常快。

example: Fast food is not good for you.
example_zh: 速食對你不好。

example: We ate lunch at a fast food restaurant.
example_zh: 我們在速食店吃午餐。

example: Please fasten your seat belt before the trip.
example_zh: 出發前請繫好安全帶。

example: The cat is fat and cute.
example_zh: 這隻貓又胖又可愛。

example: A small mistake in the plan proved fatal to the project.
example_zh: 計畫中的一個小錯誤對這個專案是致命的。

example: Many stories are about a hero fighting against fate.
example_zh: 許多故事都是關於英雄與命運抗爭。

example: My father is a teacher.
example_zh: 我的爸爸是老師。

example: We made a card for Father's Day.
example_zh: 我們做了一張父親節卡片。

example: Long hours of study can lead to fatigue.
example_zh: 長時間讀書可能導致疲勞。

example: Please turn off the faucet after washing your hands.
example_zh: 洗完手後請關掉水龍頭。

example: It was my fault that we were late.
example_zh: 我們遲到是我的錯。

example: Could you do me a favor and close the window?
example_zh: 你可以幫我一個忙，把窗戶關上嗎？

example: The weather was favorable for the outdoor class.
example_zh: 天氣很適合上戶外課。

example: Blue is my favorite color.
example_zh: 藍色是我最喜歡的顏色。

example: The office sent the form by fax this morning.
example_zh: 辦公室今天早上用傳真把表格寄出。

example: She has a great fear of snakes.
example_zh: 她非常害怕蛇。

example: The child was fearful of the loud thunder.
example_zh: 這個孩子害怕響亮的雷聲。

example: The team studied whether the plan was feasible.
example_zh: 團隊研究這個計畫是否可行。

example: The family shared a feast during the festival.
example_zh: 這家人在節慶時共享一頓盛宴。

example_zh: 他們打算在新房間裡擺上一張書桌。

example_zh: 我每天喝一杯牛奶。

example_zh: 氣候變遷是每個人都面臨的全球問題。

example_zh: 老師在地球儀上指出台灣。

example_zh: 下雨天，房間裡瀰漫著一股陰鬱。

example_zh: 我用膠水做卡片。

example_zh: 守門員用雙手擋下了球。

example_zh: 山羊在山坡上吃草。

example_zh: 她說了再見就回家了。

example: The two nations exchanged gifts as a gesture of goodwill.
example_zh: 兩國互贈禮物以表達善意。

example_zh: 一隻巨大的大猩猩安靜地坐在玻璃牆後。

example_zh: 農夫把穀物存放在大穀倉裡過冬。

example_zh: 他們舉辦了一場盛大的派對慶祝開幕。

example_zh: 學校給了她一筆補助金去出國讀書。

example_zh: 我每天早上早餐吃半顆葡萄柚。

example_zh: 報告中附了一張色彩鮮明的資料圖表。

example: It took me a while to grasp the main idea.

example_zh: 牛吃草。

example_zh: 一隻綠色的蚱蜢跳過陽光下的田野。

example: I am grateful for all the help you gave me.
example_zh: 我很感激你給我的一切幫助。

example_zh: 她用一張溫暖的字條表達感激之情。

example: Gravity pulls all falling objects toward the ground.

example: The sky is gray today.
example_zh: 今天的天空灰灰的。

example: The mechanic wiped the grease off his hands.
example_zh: 技工把手上的油脂擦掉。

example: The fried food left a greasy mark on the plate.
example_zh: 炸物在盤子上留下油膩的痕跡。

example: That's a great idea!
example_zh: 那是個很棒的點子！

example: His greed for money destroyed his friendships.
example_zh: 他對金錢的貪婪毀了他的友誼。

example: The greedy man wanted all the gold.
example_zh: 那個貪心的男人想要所有的黃金。

example: The leaves are green.
example_zh: 葉子是綠色的。

example: They grow tomatoes in a greenhouse during winter.
example_zh: 他們冬天在溫室裡種番茄。

example: The teacher greets us with a smile every morning.
example_zh: 老師每天早上微笑跟我們打招呼。

example: She gave me a friendly greeting at the door.
example_zh: 她在門口友善地跟我打招呼。

example: He was filled with grief after losing his dog.
example_zh: 他在失去他的狗之後充滿了悲傷。

example: It takes time to grieve for a lost friend.
example_zh: 為逝去的朋友哀悼是需要時間的。

example: Dad likes to grill fish in the backyard.
example_zh: 爸爸喜歡在後院烤魚。

example: The news about the storm sounded very grim.
example_zh: 關於暴風雨的消息聽起來非常嚴峻。

example: He gave a wide grin when he won the prize.
example_zh: 他得獎時咧嘴笑得很開心。

example: The machine can grind coffee beans into powder.
example_zh: 這台機器可以把咖啡豆磨成粉。

example_zh: 她緊緊地握住欄杆。

example: He let out a groan when he saw the homework.

example: I need to buy milk at the grocery store.
example_zh: 我需要去雜貨店買牛奶。

example: The company's gross income rose sharply this year.
example_zh: 公司今年的總收入大幅上升。

example_zh: 球在地上。

example_zh: 我們四人一組進行活動。

example: Plants need water to grow.

example_zh: 那隻狗開始對陌生人咆哮。

example_zh: 工人們開始抱怨工時太長。

example_zh: 這家店為所有手機提供一年保固。

example_zh: 她的阿姨成了她的法定監護人。

example_zh: 我午餐後吃一顆芭樂。

example_zh: 你能猜出我的年紀嗎？

example_zh: 今晚我們有客人要來吃晚餐。

example_zh: 學生在選擇職業時需要指導。

example_zh: 導遊帶我們參觀了老城區。

example: The teacher gave us a clear guideline for the project.

example: He felt deep guilt for forgetting her birthday.
example_zh: 他為忘記她的生日感到深深的內疚。

example: The court found the man guilty of the crime.
example_zh: 法庭認定那名男子有罪。

example_zh: 他放學後彈吉他。

example_zh: 許多船每天航行穿越這座海灣。

example: Please do not chew gum during the exam.
example_zh: 考試時請不要嚼口香糖。

example_zh: 那位警察帶著一把槍。

example: Trust your gut when you make a big decision.

example_zh: 那個傢伙是我哥哥。

example_zh: 我們在體育館打籃球。

example: Our school built a new gymnasium last year.
example_zh: 我們學校去年蓋了一座新體育館。

example: Reading is a good habit.
example_zh: 閱讀是個好習慣。

example: Pollution is destroying the natural habitat of many birds.
example_zh: 污染正在摧毀許多鳥類的自然棲息地。

example_zh: 他是個習慣性閱讀的人，每週讀完一本書。

example_zh: 一名駭客入侵了公司的電腦系統。

example: Heavy hail damaged the cars parked outside.
example_zh: 強烈的冰雹損壞了停在外面的車子。

example: She has long black hair.
example_zh: 她有一頭黑色長髮。

example: The hair dresser gave me a new look.
example_zh: 美髮師幫我換了新造型。

example: You look great with your new haircut.
example_zh: 你的新髮型看起來很棒。

example: My hairdresser gave me a shorter haircut today.
example_zh: 我的美髮師今天幫我剪了較短的髮型。

example_zh: 我吃了一半的披薩。

example: The train came to a sudden halt at the station.
example_zh: 火車在車站突然停了下來。

example: I like ham and eggs for breakfast.
example_zh: 我早餐喜歡吃火腿和蛋。

example: He ate a big hamburger for lunch.
example_zh: 他午餐吃了一個大漢堡。

example: Dad used a hammer to fix the chair.
example_zh: 爸爸用鎚子修理椅子。

example_zh: 壞天氣可能會妨礙我們的旅行計畫。

example: Raise your hand to answer.
example_zh: 要回答請舉手。

example_zh: 他從碗裡抓了一把堅果。

example: She sells beautiful handicraft made from local wood.

example: He wiped his face with a handkerchief.
example_zh: 他用手帕擦臉。

example: Don't worry; I can handle this problem by myself.
example_zh: 別擔心，我可以自己處理這個問題。

example: My father is tall and handsome.
example_zh: 我爸爸又高又帥。

example: Her neat handwriting is easy to read.
example_zh: 她工整的筆跡很容易閱讀。

example: This small tool is very handy for quick repairs.
example_zh: 這個小工具對快速維修很方便。

example: Please hang your jacket here.
example_zh: 請把你的外套掛在這裡。

example: Put your shirt on a hanger in the closet.
example_zh: 把你的襯衫掛在衣櫥裡的衣架上。

example: What happened to your leg?
example_zh: 你的腿怎麼了？

example: They must not harass others on social media.
example_zh: 他們不可以在社群媒體上騷擾別人。

example: Several boats rested quietly in the harbor.
example_zh: 幾艘船安靜地停在港口裡。

example: This question is very hard.
example_zh: 這個問題很難。

example: She is a hard-working student.
example_zh: 她是個用功的學生。

example: The clay will harden after it dries in the sun.

example: I could hardly hear you on the phone.
example_zh: 電話裡我幾乎聽不到你的聲音。

example_zh: 這家人在戰爭期間經歷了極大的困苦。

example: You need better hardware to run this new game.
example_zh: 你需要更好的硬體才能執行這款新遊戲。

example: Too much sun can harm your skin.
example_zh: 過多的陽光會傷害你的皮膚。

example: Smoking is harmful to both you and others.
example_zh: 抽菸對你和別人都有害。

example: He played a sad tune on his harmonica.
example_zh: 他用口琴吹了一首悲傷的曲子。

example: The neighbors live together in peace and harmony.
example_zh: 鄰居們和睦相處，充滿和諧。

example: Engineers try to harness the power of the wind.
example_zh: 工程師試著利用風的力量。

example: The teacher's harsh words made the boy cry.
example_zh: 老師嚴厲的話讓那個男孩哭了。

example: Farmers harvest their rice in the early autumn.
example_zh: 農夫在初秋收割稻米。

example: In his haste, he forgot to lock the door.
example_zh: 他匆忙之中忘了鎖門。

example: She hastened to finish her work before noon.
example_zh: 她趕著在中午前完成工作。

example_zh: 別做出你可能會後悔的草率決定。

example: He wears a hat on sunny days.
example_zh: 晴天時他會戴帽子。

example_zh: 雛鳥很快就會從蛋裡孵出來。

example: I hate rainy days.

example: Everyone dislikes his hateful and rude behavior.
example_zh: 大家都討厭他可恨又無禮的行為。

example: His heart was full of hatred toward his enemy.
example_zh: 他的心中充滿對敵人的憎恨。

example: The workers had to haul the boxes upstairs.
example_zh: 工人們必須把箱子拖上樓。

example: Bad memories still haunt him at night.
example_zh: 不好的回憶夜裡仍縈繞著他。

example: I have two pens.
example_zh: 我有兩枝筆。

example: A hawk flew high above the quiet valley.
example_zh: 一隻鷹在寧靜的山谷上空高飛。

example: The farmer stored the hay in the wooden barn.
example_zh: 農夫把乾草存放在木造穀倉裡。

example: Wet floors are a common hazard in the kitchen.
example_zh: 濕滑的地板是廚房裡常見的危險。

example: He is my brother.
example_zh: 他是我哥哥。

example: My head hurts.
example_zh: 我的頭好痛。

example: I have a headache today.
example_zh: 我今天頭痛。

example_zh: 這則醜聞成了每份報紙的頭條。

example: She wears headphones while studying every night.
example_zh: 她每晚讀書時都戴著耳機。

example: The company's headquarters is in downtown Taipei.

example: The wound will heal within a week.
example_zh: 傷口會在一週內痊癒。

example: Exercise is good for your health.
example_zh: 運動對你的健康有益。

example: Fresh fruit is a healthful choice for a snack.
example_zh: 新鮮水果是有益健康的點心選擇。

example: Eating vegetables keeps you healthy.
example_zh: 吃蔬菜讓你保持健康。

example: A heap of leaves lay in the corner of the yard.
example_zh: 院子角落堆著一堆落葉。

example: Can you hear the birds?
example_zh: 你聽得到鳥叫聲嗎？

example: My heart beats fast when I run.
example_zh: 我跑步時心跳得很快。

example: We enjoyed a hearty breakfast before the trip.
example_zh: 我們在旅途前享用了豐盛的早餐。

example: We turn on the heater in cold winter.
example_zh: 寒冷的冬天我們會開暖氣機。

example_zh: 有些人相信善良的靈魂會上天堂。

example_zh: 這個箱子對我來說太重了。

example_zh: 一排整齊的樹籬隔開兩座花園。

example_zh: 她在晨跑時弄傷了腳跟。

example: What is the height of that tall building?
example_zh: 那棟高樓的高度是多少？

example: The music heightened the tension in the film.
example_zh: 音樂加強了影片中的緊張氣氛。

example: The young prince is the heir to the throne.
example_zh: 那位年輕王子是王位的繼承人。

example_zh: 一架直升機正飛過城市上空。

example: The soldiers said the battle felt like hell.
example_zh: 士兵們說那場戰役如同地獄。

example: Hello! Nice to meet you.
example_zh: 哈囉！很高興認識你。

example: Always wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.
example_zh: 騎機車時一定要戴安全帽。

example: Can you help me with my homework?
example_zh: 你可以幫我做功課嗎？

example: The map is very helpful.
example_zh: 這張地圖很有幫助。

example: Australia lies in the southern hemisphere.
example_zh: 澳洲位於南半球。

example: The hen is eating on the farm.
example_zh: 母雞正在農場裡吃東西。

example: He was ill; hence, he missed the meeting.
example_zh: 他生病了，因此錯過了會議。

example: This is her book.
example_zh: 這是她的書。

example: This herb adds a fresh taste to the soup.
example_zh: 這種香草為湯增添了清新的味道。

example: A herd of cattle crossed the quiet road.
example_zh: 一群牛穿過寧靜的道路。

example: Please come here.
example_zh: 請過來這裡。

example: The old town is proud of its cultural heritage.
example_zh: 這座古鎮以其文化遺產為傲。

example: The firefighter became a hero in our town.
example_zh: 那位消防員成了我們鎮上的英雄。

example: The firefighter made a heroic effort to save the child.
example_zh: 那位消防員英勇地努力救出孩子。

example: The police found heroin hidden in the truck.
example_zh: 警方在卡車裡發現藏匿的海洛因。

example: Don't hesitate to ask if you need help.
example_zh: 如果你需要幫忙，別猶豫，儘管問。

example: She answered the question without any hesitation.
example_zh: 她毫不猶豫地回答了問題。

example: The survey asked both heterosexual and gay couples.
example_zh: 這份調查詢問了異性戀與同性戀伴侶。

example: Hey, look at this!
example_zh: 嘿，看看這個！

example: Hi, how are you?
example_zh: 嗨，你好嗎？

example: The cat likes to hide under the bed.
example_zh: 貓喜歡躲在床底下。

example: The army has a strict hierarchy of ranks.
example_zh: 軍隊有嚴格的階級制度。

example: That mountain is very high.
example_zh: 那座山很高。

example: Please highlight the important words in the text.
example_zh: 請把課文中的重要字詞標示出來。

example: She is a highly skilled violin player.
example_zh: 她是一位技術非常高超的小提琴手。

example: There are many cars on the highway today.
example_zh: 今天公路上有很多車。

example: Two men tried to hijack the bus at night.
example_zh: 兩名男子晚上試圖劫持這輛巴士。

example: We hike in the mountains every Sunday.
example_zh: 我們每個星期天去山上健行。

example: There is a big tree on the hill.
example_zh: 小山上有一棵大樹。

example: Give me a hint about the surprise gift.
example_zh: 給我一點關於驚喜禮物的提示吧。

example: She put her hands on her hips and smiled.
example_zh: 她雙手叉腰，露出微笑。

example: The hippo is swimming in the river.
example_zh: 河馬正在河裡游泳。

example: A large hippopotamus rested in the muddy river.
example_zh: 一隻大河馬在泥濘的河裡休息。

example: The store will hire two new workers this summer.
example_zh: 這家店今年夏天會僱用兩名新員工。

example: That is his bike.
example_zh: 那是他的腳踏車。

example: The historian studied letters from the old war.
example_zh: 這位歷史學家研究了那場舊戰爭的信件。

example: The peace treaty was a truly historic event.
example_zh: 這份和平條約是真正具歷史意義的事件。

example: The library keeps many historical maps.
example_zh: 這間圖書館保存了許多歷史地圖。

example: I like to read about history.
example_zh: 我喜歡閱讀歷史。

example: Don't hit the ball too hard.
example_zh: 不要把球打得太用力。

example: The bees returned to their hive before the rain.
example_zh: 蜜蜂在下雨前回到蜂巢。

example: Her voice was hoarse after the long concert.
example_zh: 漫長的音樂會後，她的聲音變得沙啞。

example: My hobby is drawing.
example_zh: 我的嗜好是畫畫。

example: They play ice hockey every winter weekend.
example_zh: 他們每個冬季週末都打冰上曲棍球。

example: Please hold my hand.
example_zh: 請握住我的手。

example: The ticket holder may enter the hall first.
example_zh: 持票者可以先進入大廳。

example: The dog dug a hole in the yard.
example_zh: 狗在院子裡挖了一個洞。

example: Chinese New Year is my favorite holiday.
example_zh: 農曆新年是我最喜歡的節日。

example: The children hid inside the hollow tree trunk.
example_zh: 孩子們躲進中空的樹幹裡。

example: Many people visit this holy temple each year.
example_zh: 每年有許多人參訪這座神聖的廟宇。

example: I go home at five.
example_zh: 我五點回家。

example: The soldiers longed to return to their homeland.
example_zh: 士兵們渴望回到自己的祖國。

example: He felt homesick during his first week abroad.
example_zh: 出國的第一週他覺得很想家。

example: She often talks about her small hometown.
example_zh: 她常提起她的小家鄉。

example: I do my homework after dinner.
example_zh: 我晚餐後寫功課。

example: The law now protects homosexual couples' rights.
example_zh: 法律現在保障同性戀伴侶的權利。

example: She is an honest girl.
example_zh: 她是個誠實的女孩。

example: Honesty is the best policy.
example_zh: 誠實為上策。

example: Bees make sweet honey.
example_zh: 蜜蜂製造甜甜的蜂蜜。

example: They spent their honeymoon on a quiet island.
example_zh: 他們在一座寧靜的小島上度蜜月。

example: It is an honor to meet such a great writer.
example_zh: 能見到這麼偉大的作家是我的榮幸。

example: He is an honorable man who keeps his promises.
example_zh: 他是個信守承諾、值得敬重的人。

example: The university gave her an honorary degree.
example_zh: 大學頒給她一個名譽學位。

example: Hang your coat on the hook by the door.
example_zh: 把你的外套掛在門邊的鉤子上。

example: The rabbit can hop very fast.
example_zh: 兔子可以跳得很快。

example: I hope you can come to my party.
example_zh: 我希望你能來我的派對。

example: We are hopeful that the weather will improve.
example_zh: 我們對天氣好轉抱有希望。

example: The sun slowly sank below the horizon.
example_zh: 太陽慢慢沉入地平線下。

example: Draw a horizontal line across the page.
example_zh: 在頁面上畫一條水平線。

example: This hormone controls how fast children grow.
example_zh: 這種荷爾蒙控制孩子成長的速度。

example: The driver pressed the horn to warn the boy.
example_zh: 駕駛按喇叭來警告那個男孩。

example: The weather was horrible during our trip.
example_zh: 我們旅行時天氣糟透了。

example: The violent scene may horrify young viewers.
example_zh: 暴力的畫面可能會嚇壞年幼的觀眾。

example: She screamed in horror at the sight.
example_zh: 她看到那景象時嚇得尖叫。

example: The horse runs fast.
example_zh: 這匹馬跑得很快。

example: He used a hose to water the garden.
example_zh: 他用一條水管澆花園。

example: The villagers were warm and hospitable to us.
example_zh: 村民對我們既熱情又好客。

example: My mom works in a hospital.
example_zh: 我媽媽在醫院工作。

example: We thanked our host for her kind hospitality.
example_zh: 我們感謝主人親切的款待。

example: Doctors had to hospitalize him after the crash.
example_zh: 車禍後醫生必須讓他住院。

example: He was the host of the party last night.
example_zh: 他是昨晚派對的主人。

example: The soldiers freed every hostage safely.
example_zh: 士兵們安全地釋放了每一名人質。

example: We stayed in a cheap hostel during our trip.
example_zh: 我們旅途中住在一間便宜的青年旅館。

example: The crowd grew hostile toward the referee.
example_zh: 群眾對裁判變得充滿敵意。

example: There was clear hostility between the two teams.
example_zh: 兩隊之間有明顯的敵意。

example: It is very hot today.
example_zh: 今天非常熱。

example: I ate a hot dog for lunch.
example_zh: 我午餐吃了一份熱狗。

example: We stayed at a hotel by the sea.
example_zh: 我們住在海邊的一家旅館。

example: I read for an hour every day.
example_zh: 我每天閱讀一小時。

example: The buses run on an hourly schedule.
example_zh: 公車依每小時一班的時刻表行駛。

example: My house has a small garden.
example_zh: 我的房子有一個小花園。

example: Every household in the village has a garden.
example_zh: 村裡每一戶人家都有一座花園。

example: Their housekeeper cleans the rooms every morning.
example_zh: 他們的管家每天早上打掃房間。

example: My aunt is a housewife.
example_zh: 我阿姨是家庭主婦。

example: We share the housework at home.
example_zh: 我們在家一起分擔家事。

example: The city needs more affordable housing for families.
example_zh: 這座城市需要更多讓家庭負擔得起的住房。

example: A helicopter began to hover above the building.
example_zh: 一架直升機開始在大樓上方盤旋。

example: How do you go to school?
example_zh: 你怎麼去上學？

example: It was raining; however, we still went out.
example_zh: 雖然下著雨，我們還是出門了。

example: The wolves began to howl at the full moon.
example_zh: 狼群開始對著滿月嚎叫。

example: She gave her mother a warm hug.
example_zh: 她給了媽媽一個溫暖的擁抱。

example: They live in a huge house near the lake.
example_zh: 他們住在湖邊一棟巨大的房子裡。

example: She likes to hum a tune while cooking.
example_zh: 她喜歡一邊做飯一邊哼著曲子。

example: Humans need water to live.
example_zh: 人類需要水才能生存。

example: The disaster brought out the best in humanity.
example_zh: 這場災難激發出人性中最美好的一面。

example: He stays humble even after winning many prizes.
example_zh: 即使得了很多獎，他仍然很謙虛。

example: Summer in Taiwan is hot and humid.
example_zh: 台灣的夏天又熱又潮濕。

example: The high humidity made the afternoon feel hotter.
example_zh: 高濕度讓那個下午感覺更悶熱。

example: He did not want to humiliate her in public.
example_zh: 他不想在公開場合羞辱她。

example: A good teacher needs a sense of humor.
example_zh: 好老師需要幽默感。

example: His humorous stories always make us laugh.
example_zh: 他幽默的故事總是讓我們大笑。

example: I have a hunch that it will rain soon.
example_zh: 我有種預感很快就會下雨。

example: There are one hundred students in the hall.
example_zh: 大廳裡有一百個學生。

example: Many people in the world still suffer from hunger.
example_zh: 世界上仍有許多人受飢餓之苦。

example: I am hungry. Let's eat.
example_zh: 我餓了，我們吃飯吧。

example: Lions hunt at night.
example_zh: 獅子在夜間獵食。

example: The hunter walked quietly through the forest.
example_zh: 獵人安靜地走過森林。

example: Learning the language was her biggest hurdle.
example_zh: 學習這門語言是她最大的障礙。

example: The hurricane destroyed many homes near the coast.
example_zh: 颶風摧毀了沿岸許多房屋。

example: Hurry up, or we will be late.
example_zh: 快一點，不然我們會遲到。

example: I fell down and hurt my knee.
example_zh: 我跌倒弄傷了膝蓋。

example: Her husband is a doctor.
example_zh: 她的丈夫是醫生。

example: A sudden hush fell over the crowded room.
example_zh: 擁擠的房間裡突然一片安靜。

example: They spent the night in a small wooden hut.
example_zh: 他們在一間小木屋裡過夜。

example: This hybrid car uses both gas and electricity.
example_zh: 這輛油電混合車同時使用汽油與電力。

example: Water is made of hydrogen and oxygen.
example_zh: 水是由氫和氧組成的。

example: Good hygiene helps prevent many diseases.
example_zh: 良好的衛生習慣有助於預防許多疾病。

example: He is a hypocrite who never keeps his word.
example_zh: 他是個從不守信用的偽君子。

example: The scientist tested her hypothesis in the lab.
example_zh: 那位科學家在實驗室裡驗證她的假設。

example: I am a student.
example_zh: 我是學生。

example: I like ice in my juice.
example_zh: 我喜歡在果汁裡加冰塊。

example: Ice cream is my favorite dessert.
example_zh: 冰淇淋是我最喜歡的甜點。

example: The huge ship struck a floating iceberg.
example_zh: 那艘大船撞上了一座漂浮的冰山。

example: Click the small icon to open the program.
example_zh: 點擊那個小圖示來開啟程式。

example: Drivers should be careful on the icy road.
example_zh: 駕駛在結冰的路上應該小心。

example: That's a good idea!
example_zh: 那真是個好主意！

example: This quiet beach is an ideal place to relax.
example_zh: 這片寧靜的海灘是放鬆的理想地點。

example: The twins wore identical blue shirts.
example_zh: 那對雙胞胎穿著一模一樣的藍襯衫。

example: You need identification to enter the office.
example_zh: 你需要身分證明才能進入辦公室。

example: Can you identify the man in this photo?
example_zh: 你能辨認出這張照片裡的男子嗎？

example: The thief tried to hide his real identity.
example_zh: 小偷試圖隱藏自己真正的身分。

example: The two parties follow a very different ideology.
example_zh: 這兩個政黨遵循非常不同的意識形態。

example: This idiom is hard for foreign students to understand.
example_zh: 這個慣用語對外國學生來說很難理解。

example: Don't call your brother an idiot.
example_zh: 別叫你弟弟白痴。

example: The machines stood idle during the holiday.
example_zh: 假期期間這些機器都閒置著。

example: That singer is a popular idol among teenagers.
example_zh: 那位歌手是青少年間受歡迎的偶像。

example: If it rains, we will stay home.
example_zh: 如果下雨，我們就待在家裡。

example: His mistake came from pure ignorance, not evil.
example_zh: 他的錯誤源於純粹的無知，而非惡意。

example: She was completely ignorant of the danger ahead.
example_zh: 她對前方的危險完全一無所知。

example: Don't ignore the teacher's advice.
example_zh: 不要忽視老師的建議。

example: He stayed home because he was ill.
example_zh: 他因為生病待在家裡。

example: Bright lamps illuminate the entire stage.
example_zh: 明亮的燈光照亮了整個舞台。

example: The magician created a clever illusion on stage.

example: Let me illustrate this idea with a simple story.
example_zh: 讓我用一個簡單的故事來說明這個概念。

example: The book has a colorful illustration on every page.
example_zh: 這本書每一頁都有色彩鮮明的插圖。

example: The company worked hard to improve its image.
example_zh: 公司努力改善自己的形象。

example: The child has an imaginary friend named Sam.

example: Reading stories can develop a child's imagination.
example_zh: 閱讀故事能培養孩子的想像力。

example: She wrote an imaginative story about flying cats.
example_zh: 她寫了一個關於飛天貓的富想像力故事。

example: Can you imagine a world without phones?
example_zh: 你能想像沒有手機的世界嗎？

example: Young children often imitate their parents' actions.
example_zh: 小孩子常常模仿父母的動作。

example_zh: 這個包包是名牌的廉價仿製品。

example_zh: 醫生給了病人立即的照護。

example_zh: 他們在這棟房子上花了一大筆錢。

example_zh: 這名新移民很快就學會了當地語言。

example: Her family decided to immigrate to Canada.
example_zh: 她的家人決定移民到加拿大。

example: He waited in a long line at immigration.
example_zh: 他在入境查驗處排了很長的隊。

example: Dark clouds warned of an imminent storm.
example_zh: 烏雲預示著即將來臨的暴風雨。

example: Vaccines help make people immune to the disease.
example_zh: 疫苗有助於使人對這種疾病免疫。

example_zh: 新政策對學生造成巨大影響。

example: It is imperative that we finish the report today.
example_zh: 我們今天務必完成報告。

example_zh: 那座皇宮每年吸引許多遊客。

example_zh: 學校下週將實施新規定。

example: The decision has serious implications for our future.
example_zh: 這個決定對我們的未來有嚴重影響。

example_zh: 她的沉默是對計畫的默許。

example: His tone seemed to imply that he disagreed.
example_zh: 他的語氣似乎暗示他不同意。

example: It is impolite to talk loudly in the library.
example_zh: 在圖書館大聲說話是不禮貌的。

example: Taiwan imports oil from many countries.
example_zh: 台灣從許多國家進口石油。

example: The teacher talked about the importance of reading.
example_zh: 老師談到閱讀的重要性。

example: Breakfast is an important meal.
example_zh: 早餐是重要的一餐。

example: The government will impose new taxes on cars.
example_zh: 政府將對汽車徵收新稅。

zh: 壯觀的；使人印象深刻的
example: The imposing castle stood on top of the hill.
example_zh: 那座壯觀的城堡矗立在山頂。

example: It is impossible to finish this work in one day.
example_zh: 一天內完成這項工作是不可能的。

example: Her speech deeply impressed the whole audience.
example_zh: 她的演講深深打動了全場觀眾。

example: He made a good impression on his new boss.
example_zh: 他給新老闆留下好印象。

example: The young pianist gave an impressive performance.
example_zh: 那位年輕鋼琴家表演令人印象深刻。

example: The judge decided to imprison the thief for years.
example_zh: 法官決定將小偷監禁數年。

example: Practice every day, and your English will improve.
example_zh: 每天練習，你的英文就會進步。

example: She bought the dress on a sudden impulse.
example_zh: 她一時衝動買下那件洋裝。

example: The garden is in back of the house.

example: There is a park in front of my school.
example_zh: 我學校前面有一座公園。

example: Bonuses are a strong incentive to work harder.
example_zh: 獎金是更努力工作的強烈誘因。

example_zh: 那起奇怪的事件發生在深夜。

example: I incline to agree with your opinion.
example_zh: 我傾向同意你的意見。

example_zh: 這個價格包含早餐和晚餐。

example: Everyone came, including my little brother.
example_zh: 每個人都來了，包括我弟弟。

example: The price is inclusive of all meals.
example_zh: 這價格已包含所有餐點。

example: He saves half of his income every month.
example_zh: 他每個月把一半的收入存起來。

example: We will incorporate your ideas into the plan.
example_zh: 我們會把你的想法納入計畫。

example: The number of students will increase next year.
example_zh: 明年學生人數會增加。

example: The view from the mountain was incredible.
example_zh: 從山上看的景色令人難以置信。

example: Careless spending may incur heavy debts.
example_zh: 隨意花錢可能招致沉重債務。

example: She is independent and lives by herself.
example_zh: 她很獨立，自己一個人住。

example: Check the index at the back of the book.
example_zh: 查看書後面的索引。

example_zh: 這個標誌顯示道路封閉。

example: His indifference to others hurt many friends.
example_zh: 他對別人的冷漠傷了許多朋友。

example_zh: 她對這則悲傷的消息似乎漠不關心。

example: Many indigenous plants grow in this forest.
example_zh: 這座森林裡生長許多本土植物。
