example_zh: 他對這不公的決定感到憤慨。

example: Water is indispensable to all living things.
example_zh: 水對所有生物都不可或缺。

example: Each individual has the right to speak freely.
example_zh: 每個人都有自由發言的權利。

example: We enjoy indoor games on rainy days.
example_zh: 下雨天我們喜歡玩室內遊戲。

example: Let's stay indoors until the storm passes.
example_zh: 我們待在室內直到暴風雨過去。

example: Warm milk can induce sleep at night.
example_zh: 溫牛奶能在夜裡引人入睡。

example: He likes to indulge in sweet desserts.
example_zh: 他喜歡沉溺於甜點。

example: This city is a major industrial center.
example_zh: 這座城市是重要的工業中心。

example: The country began to industrialize in the 1960s.
example_zh: 這個國家在1960年代開始工業化。

example: The film industry creates many jobs.
example_zh: 電影產業創造許多工作機會。

example: Change is inevitable in every person's life.
example_zh: 改變在每個人的生活中不可避免。

example_zh: 嬰兒在她懷裡安靜地睡著。

example: The virus can infect people very quickly.
example_zh: 這病毒能很快傳染給人。

example: Wash your hands to prevent infection.
example_zh: 勤洗手以預防感染。

example: Her laughter is warm and infectious.
example_zh: 她的笑聲溫暖又有感染力。

example: We can infer his mood from his face.
example_zh: 我們能從他的表情推斷他的心情。

example: This cheap phone feels inferior to mine.
example_zh: 這支便宜手機感覺比我的差。

example: The universe seems almost infinite in size.
example_zh: 宇宙的大小似乎近乎無限。

example: Rising inflation makes daily life more expensive.
example_zh: 上升的通膨使日常生活更昂貴。

example: The storm inflicted great damage on the town.
example_zh: 暴風雨對小鎮造成嚴重損害。

example: Parents have a great influence on their children.
example_zh: 父母對孩子有很大的影響。

example: She is one of the most influential leaders.
example_zh: 她是最有影響力的領袖之一。

example: Please inform me if the meeting changes.
example_zh: 若會議有變請通知我。

example: You can find more information on the website.
example_zh: 你可以在網站上找到更多資訊。

zh: 提供資訊的；增長見聞的
example: The lecture was clear and very informative.
example_zh: 這場演講清楚又很有資訊價值。

example: Good roads are part of a city's infrastructure.
example_zh: 良好的道路是城市基礎建設的一部分。

example: Sugar is a key ingredient in this cake.
example_zh: 糖是這蛋糕的主要材料。

example: Many rare birds inhabit this island.
example_zh: 許多稀有鳥類棲息在這座島上。

example: The small village has few inhabitants.
example_zh: 這座小村莊居民很少。

example: Curiosity is inherent in most children.
example_zh: 好奇心是多數孩子與生俱來的。

example: She will inherit the house from her aunt.
example_zh: 她將從姑姑那繼承這棟房子。

example: My initial reaction was one of surprise.
example_zh: 我最初的反應是驚訝。

example: The teacher will initiate a new reading program.
example_zh: 老師將發起一項新的閱讀計畫。

example: She showed great initiative in solving the problem.
example_zh: 她在解決問題上展現極大的主動性。

example: The nurse will inject the medicine slowly.
example_zh: 護士會慢慢注射藥物。

example: The doctor gave him an injection for the pain.
example_zh: 醫生為他打了一針止痛。

example: He fell and injured his left knee.
example_zh: 他跌倒傷了左膝。

example: The player left the game due to injury.
example_zh: 那名球員因受傷退出比賽。

example: They fought against social injustice for years.
example_zh: 他們多年來對抗社會不公。

example: My pen ran out of ink.
example_zh: 我的筆沒墨水了。

example: The river flows far inland from the coast.
example_zh: 這條河從海岸向內陸流很遠。

example: We spent the night at a small country inn.
example_zh: 我們在鄉間小客棧過了一夜。

example: She finally found inner peace after the trip.
example_zh: 旅行後她終於找到內心的平靜。

example: Our team scored three runs in the last inning.
example_zh: 我們隊在最後一局得了三分。

example: The lawyer proved the man's innocence in court.
example_zh: 律師在法庭上證明那人的清白。

example: The court found the young man innocent.
example_zh: 法院判定這名年輕人無罪。

example: The company is famous for its technology innovation.
example_zh: 這家公司以科技創新聞名。

example: Her innovative design won the first prize.
example_zh: 她的創新設計贏得首獎。

example: Innumerable stars shine in the night sky.
example_zh: 無數的星星在夜空中閃耀。

example: We need your input before making the decision.
example_zh: 做決定前我們需要你的意見。

example: She called to inquire about the job.
example_zh: 她打電話詢問那份工作。

example: The police began an inquiry into the accident.
example_zh: 警方開始調查這起事故。

example: Driving that fast is completely insane.
example_zh: 開那麼快實在太瘋狂了。

example: A bee is a small insect.
example_zh: 蜜蜂是一種小昆蟲。

example: Insert the coin into the slot to start.
example_zh: 把硬幣插入投幣孔即可開始。

example: It is warm inside the house.
example_zh: 房子裡面很溫暖。

example: The book gives deep insight into human nature.
example_zh: 這本書對人性有深刻的洞察。

example: She insisted on paying for the meal.
example_zh: 她堅持要付這頓飯的錢。

example: At his insistence, we changed the plan.
example_zh: 在他的堅持下，我們改了計畫。

example: Workers inspect each car before it leaves.
example_zh: 工人在每輛車出廠前檢查它。

example: The building passed the safety inspection.
example_zh: 這棟建築通過了安全檢查。

example: The inspector checked the kitchen carefully.
example_zh: 檢查員仔細檢查了廚房。

example: Nature is a great source of inspiration.
example_zh: 大自然是靈感的絕佳來源。

example: The story inspired many young people.
example_zh: 這個故事激勵了許多年輕人。

example: Please install the app on your phone first.
example_zh: 請先在手機上安裝這個應用程式。

example: The installation of the machine took two hours.
example_zh: 這台機器的安裝花了兩小時。

example: This is a clear instance of hard work paying off.
example_zh: 這是努力有回報的明顯例子。

example: Instant food is quick but not always healthy.
example_zh: 速食食品很快，但不一定健康。

example: He cooked instant noodles for a late-night snack.
example_zh: 他煮了泡麵當宵夜。

example: He didn't cry; instead, he smiled.
example_zh: 他沒有哭，反而笑了。

example: Animals rely on instinct to survive.
example_zh: 動物依靠本能求生。

example: Her instinctive reaction was to run away.
example_zh: 她本能的反應是逃跑。

example: He studies at a famous research institute.
example_zh: 他在一所著名的研究機構就讀。

example: The bank is a trusted financial institution.
example_zh: 這家銀行是值得信賴的金融機構。

example: The coach will instruct us on the new rules.
example_zh: 教練會指導我們新規則。

example: Read the instructions before using the machine.
example_zh: 使用機器前先閱讀說明。

example: Our swimming instructor is very patient.
example_zh: 我們的游泳教練很有耐心。

example: Can you play any musical instrument?
example_zh: 你會演奏任何樂器嗎？

example: His rude words were a clear insult.
example_zh: 他無禮的話明顯是種侮辱。

example: Car insurance can protect you from big losses.
example_zh: 汽車保險能保護你免於重大損失。

example: The old vase remained intact after the move.
example_zh: 搬家後那只古花瓶依然完好無缺。

example: Reduce your salt intake for better health.
example_zh: 減少鹽的攝取量以促進健康。

example: The school helps new students integrate quickly.
example_zh: 學校幫助新生快速融入。

example: The integration of the two systems went smoothly.
example_zh: 兩個系統的整合進行得很順利。

example: People trust her because of her integrity.
example_zh: 人們因為她的正直而信任她。

example: His sharp intellect impressed all the teachers.
example_zh: 他敏銳的才智令所有老師印象深刻。

example: The debate was a real intellectual challenge.
example_zh: 這場辯論是真正的智力挑戰。

example: Artificial intelligence is changing our lives.
example_zh: 人工智慧正在改變我們的生活。

example: Dolphins are intelligent animals.
example_zh: 海豚是聰明的動物。

example: We intend to visit Japan next summer.
example_zh: 我們打算明年夏天去日本。

example: The summer heat was almost too intense.
example_zh: 夏天的酷熱幾乎令人難以承受。

example: The wind began to intensify before the storm.
example_zh: 暴風雨前風勢開始增強。

example: The intensity of the fire shocked everyone.
example_zh: 火勢的猛烈程度震驚了每個人。

example: She took an intensive English course this summer.
example_zh: 她今夏上了一堂密集英語課。

example: His intent was to help, not to hurt.
example_zh: 他的用意是幫忙，而非傷害。

example: I had no intention of hurting your feelings.
example_zh: 我無意傷害你的感情。

example: Children learn as they interact with others.
example_zh: 孩子在與他人互動中學習。

example: Good interaction makes the class more fun.
example_zh: 良好的互動讓課堂更有趣。

example: She shows great interest in music.
example_zh: 她對音樂展現高度的興趣。

example: I am interested in English.
example_zh: 我對英文感興趣。

example: This book is very interesting.
example_zh: 這本書很有趣。

example: Please don't interfere in my private affairs.
example_zh: 請不要干涉我的私事。

example: The radio signal suffered from interference.
example_zh: 無線電信號受到干擾。

example: The interior of the house is warm and cozy.
example_zh: 這棟房子的內部溫暖舒適。

example: She is in the intermediate English class.
example_zh: 她在中級英語班。

example: The company solved its internal problems quietly.
example_zh: 公司悄悄地解決了內部問題。

example: She works for an international company in Taipei.
example_zh: 她在台北一家國際公司工作。

example: I search for news on the Internet.
example_zh: 我在網路上搜尋新聞。

example: Everyone may interpret the poem differently.
example_zh: 每個人對這首詩的詮釋可能不同。

example: Her interpretation of the song was moving.
example_zh: 她對這首歌的詮釋很動人。

example: The interpreter helped the two leaders talk.
example_zh: 口譯員幫助兩位領袖交談。

example: Please don't interrupt me when I am speaking.
example_zh: 我說話時請不要打斷我。

example: We finished the meeting without any interruption.
example_zh: 我們順利開完會，沒有任何中斷。

example: Turn left at the next intersection.
example_zh: 在下個十字路口左轉。

example: The buses arrive at ten-minute intervals.
example_zh: 公車每隔十分鐘到站。

example: The teacher had to intervene in the fight.
example_zh: 老師不得不介入這場打鬥。

example: Quick medical intervention saved his life.
example_zh: 及時的醫療介入救了他的命。

example: He has a job interview tomorrow.
example_zh: 他明天有一場工作面試。

example: True friendship needs time and intimacy.
example_zh: 真正的友誼需要時間與親密。

example: They shared an intimate talk by the fire.
example_zh: 他們在爐火邊親密地聊天。

example: The bully tried to intimidate younger students.
example_zh: 那個惡霸試圖恐嚇年幼的學生。

example: The boy jumped into the pool.
example_zh: 男孩跳進游泳池裡。

example: Her rising intonation showed she was asking.
example_zh: 她上揚的語調顯示她在發問。

example: The mystery novel really intrigued me.
example_zh: 這本推理小說深深引起我的興趣。

example: Let me introduce my best friend to you.
example_zh: 讓我向你介紹我最好的朋友。

example: The book's introduction explains the main idea.
example_zh: 這本書的引言說明了主旨。

example: I'm sorry to intrude on your dinner.
example_zh: 抱歉打擾你們用晚餐。

example: The dog barked at the intruder loudly.
example_zh: 那隻狗對著闖入者大聲吠叫。

example: Her intuition told her something was wrong.
example_zh: 她的直覺告訴她有些不對勁。

example: The enemy tried to invade the small country.
example_zh: 敵人試圖入侵那個小國。

example: Your advice has been invaluable to me.
example_zh: 你的建議對我而言極其寶貴。

example: He is invariably late for morning meetings.
example_zh: 他早會總是遲到。

example: The country prepared to resist the invasion.
example_zh: 這個國家準備抵抗入侵。

example: Edison invented the light bulb.
example_zh: 愛迪生發明了電燈泡。

example: The phone is one of history's great inventions.
example_zh: 電話是歷史上偉大的發明之一。

example: Edison was a famous American inventor.
example_zh: 愛迪生是著名的美國發明家。

example: The store checks its inventory every month.
example_zh: 這家店每月盤點存貨。

example: They decided to invest their savings in stocks.
example_zh: 他們決定把積蓄投資在股票。

example: The police will investigate the strange case.
example_zh: 警方將調查這起奇怪的案件。

example: The investigation lasted for several months.
example_zh: 這項調查持續了數個月。

example: The investigator found an important clue.
example_zh: 調查員發現了一條重要線索。

example: I received an invitation to her birthday party.
example_zh: 我收到她生日派對的邀請函。

example: I want to invite you to my party.
example_zh: 我想邀請你來我的派對。

example: The project will involve the whole class.
example_zh: 這個專案將讓全班參與。

example: The old bridge is made of iron.
example_zh: 這座舊橋是鐵做的。

example: It is ironic that the teacher failed the test.
example_zh: 諷刺的是，那位老師沒通過測驗。

example: There is deep irony in his sad smile.
example_zh: 他悲傷的微笑中有深刻的諷刺。

example: He becomes irritable when he is hungry.
example_zh: 他餓的時候會變得暴躁。

example: The loud noise began to irritate everyone.
example_zh: 那噪音開始惹惱每個人。

example: Taiwan is a beautiful island.

example: It is necessary to drink enough water every day.
example_zh: 每天喝足夠的水是必要的。

example: Clean water is a basic necessity of life.
example_zh: 乾淨的水是生活的基本必需品。

example: The giraffe has a long neck.
example_zh: 長頸鹿有長長的脖子。

example: Mom wore a beautiful necklace to the party.
example_zh: 媽媽戴著漂亮的項鍊去參加派對。

example: He wore a blue necktie to the interview.
example_zh: 他打了一條藍色領帶去面試。

example: I need your help.
example_zh: 我需要你的幫忙。

example: Be careful with the needle when you sew.
example_zh: 縫東西時要小心針。

example: The charity helps needy families every winter.
example_zh: 這個慈善機構每年冬天幫助貧困家庭。

example: Don't be so negative about everything.
example_zh: 不要對每件事都這麼負面。

example: Don't neglect your health for your work.
example_zh: 別為了工作而忽視你的健康。

example: The two sides met to negotiate a deal.
example_zh: 雙方會面協商一項交易。

example: The negotiation lasted for several hours.
example_zh: 這場談判持續了好幾個小時。

example: Our neighbor has a cute dog.
example_zh: 我們的鄰居有一隻可愛的狗。

example: I grew up in a quiet neighborhood.
example_zh: 我在一個安靜的社區長大。

example: Neither of us likes coffee.
example_zh: 我們兩個都不喜歡咖啡。

example: My nephew is in elementary school now.
example_zh: 我姪子現在在讀國小。

example: She didn't have the nerve to speak up.
example_zh: 她沒有勇氣站出來說話。

example: I feel nervous before the big test.
example_zh: 大考前我覺得很緊張。

example: The bird built a nest in the tree.
example_zh: 鳥在樹上築了一個巢。

example: The fisherman caught fish with a net.
example_zh: 漁夫用網子捕魚。

example: The city has a good network of roads.
example_zh: 這座城市有良好的道路網絡。

example: The country stayed neutral during the war.
example_zh: 這個國家在戰爭中保持中立。

example: I never get up late.
example_zh: 我從不晚起。

example: It was raining; nevertheless, we went hiking.
example_zh: 當時正在下雨，儘管如此我們還是去健行了。

example: I have a new bike.
example_zh: 我有一輛新腳踏車。

example: New Year's Day is the first day of the year.
example_zh: 元旦是一年的第一天。

example: We stay up late on New Year's Eve.
example_zh: 我們在跨年夜熬夜。

example: I have good news for you.
example_zh: 我有好消息要告訴你。

example: Grandpa reads the newspaper every morning.
example_zh: 爺爺每天早上看報紙。

example: See you next week.
example_zh: 下星期見。

example: The bank is next to the post office.
example_zh: 銀行在郵局旁邊。

example: She is a nice girl.
example_zh: 她是個友善的女孩。

example: Her brother is a nice-looking young man.
example_zh: 她哥哥是個好看的年輕人。

example: He dropped a nickel into the machine.
example_zh: 他把一枚五分硬幣投進機器裡。

example: His friends gave him the nickname "Tiger."
example_zh: 他的朋友給他取了「老虎」這個綽號。

example: My niece will be ten years old next week.
example_zh: 我姪女下星期就滿十歲了。

example: I sleep eight hours at night.
example_zh: 我晚上睡八個小時。

example: The child woke up crying from a nightmare.
example_zh: 這孩子從惡夢中哭著醒來。

example: I go to bed at nine.
example_zh: 我九點上床睡覺。

example: My cousin is nineteen years old.
example_zh: 我表哥十九歲。

example: My grandma is ninety years old.
example_zh: 我奶奶九十歲。

example: No, I don't like coffee.
example_zh: 不，我不喜歡咖啡。

example: He is a man of noble character.
example_zh: 他是個品格高貴的人。

example: Nobody knows the answer.
example_zh: 沒有人知道答案。

example: She nodded her head and smiled.
example_zh: 她點點頭微笑。

example: Don't make so much noise.
example_zh: 不要製造這麼多噪音。

example: The classroom is too noisy to study in.
example_zh: 教室太吵了，沒辦法讀書。

example: The committee decided to nominate her for the award.
example_zh: 委員會決定提名她角逐這個獎項。

example: She received a nomination for best actress.
example_zh: 她獲得了最佳女主角的提名。

example: Each nominee gave a short speech.
example_zh: 每位被提名人都發表了簡短的演說。

example: None of the students failed the test.
example_zh: 沒有一個學生考不及格。

example: She works for a nonprofit organization.
example_zh: 她在一個非營利組織工作。

example: Stop talking nonsense and be serious.
example_zh: 別再胡說了，認真一點。

example: I eat noodles for lunch.
example_zh: 我午餐吃麵。

example: We eat lunch at noon.
example_zh: 我們中午吃午餐。

example: He can neither sing nor dance.
example_zh: 他既不會唱歌，也不會跳舞。

example: Working from home has become the norm.
example_zh: 在家工作已經成為常態。

example: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
example_zh: 考試前感到緊張是很正常的。

example: Birds fly north in spring.
example_zh: 鳥兒在春天往北飛。

example: Winters are very cold in the northern region.
example_zh: 北方地區的冬天非常寒冷。

example: My nose is small.
example_zh: 我的鼻子小小的。

example: The horse's nostrils flared as it ran.
example_zh: 那匹馬奔跑時鼻孔張得大大的。

example: I am not tired.
example_zh: 我不累。

example: The book made a notable impact on readers.
example_zh: 這本書對讀者產生了顯著的影響。

example: I write a note to Mom.
example_zh: 我寫一張紙條給媽媽。

example: This is my new notebook.
example_zh: 這是我的新筆記本。

example: There is nothing in the box.
example_zh: 箱子裡什麼也沒有。

example: Did you notice the new sign?
example_zh: 你有注意到那個新告示嗎？

example: There was a noticeable change in his mood.
example_zh: 他的情緒有著明顯的變化。

example: Please notify us if your address changes.
example_zh: 如果你的地址有變動，請通知我們。

example: He has a strange notion about success.
example_zh: 他對成功有著奇怪的想法。

example: The area is notorious for its crime.
example_zh: 這個地區以犯罪而惡名昭彰。

example: Good food helps nourish a growing child.
example_zh: 好的食物能滋養成長中的孩子。

example: She is reading an interesting novel about space.
example_zh: 她正在讀一本有趣的太空小說。

example: The famous novelist wrote over twenty books.
example_zh: 這位著名的小說家寫了二十多本書。

example: My birthday is in November.
example_zh: 我的生日在十一月。

example: As a novice, he made a few mistakes.
example_zh: 身為新手，他犯了一些錯誤。

example: We are eating dinner now.
example_zh: 我們現在正在吃晚餐。

example: Nowadays, most people own a smartphone.
example_zh: 如今，大多數人都擁有一支智慧型手機。

example: The lost key was nowhere to be found.
example_zh: 那把遺失的鑰匙到處都找不到。

example: The country relies on nuclear power for electricity.
example_zh: 這個國家仰賴核能來發電。

example: The nucleus lies at the center of the atom.
example_zh: 原子核位於原子的中心。

example: The artist painted a nude figure.
example_zh: 這位藝術家畫了一幅裸體人像。

example: What is your phone number?
example_zh: 你的電話號碼是幾號？

example: She has visited numerous countries around the world.
example_zh: 她造訪過世界各地眾多的國家。

example: The nun spent her life helping the poor.
example_zh: 這位修女一生都在幫助窮人。

example: The nurse helps sick people.
example_zh: 護理師幫助生病的人。

example: They send their baby to a nearby nursery.
example_zh: 他們把寶寶送到附近的托兒所。

example: Parents should nurture their children's talents.
example_zh: 父母應該培育孩子的才能。

example: Squirrels like to eat nuts.
example_zh: 松鼠喜歡吃堅果。

example: Vegetables are full of important nutrients.
example_zh: 蔬菜富含重要的營養素。

example: Good nutrition is essential for children's growth.
example_zh: 良好的營養對孩子的成長至關重要。

example: Fruit makes a nutritious and tasty snack.
example_zh: 水果是有營養又美味的點心。

example: Is it O.K. if I open the window?
example_zh: 我開窗戶可以嗎？

example: It is nine o'clock now.
example_zh: 現在是九點鐘。

example: A huge oak grows beside the old house.
example_zh: 一棵巨大的橡樹長在老屋旁邊。

example: The travelers finally reached an oasis in the desert.
example_zh: 旅人們終於抵達了沙漠中的綠洲。

example: The soldiers took an oath to serve the country.
example_zh: 士兵們宣誓要為國家效力。

example: I usually eat oatmeal for breakfast.
example_zh: 我早餐通常吃燕麥片。

example: The dog was trained for perfect obedience.
example_zh: 這隻狗被訓練得絕對服從。

example: She was an obedient and hardworking student.
example_zh: 她是個順從又用功的學生。

example: We should obey the school rules.
example_zh: 我們應該遵守校規。

example: What is that strange object in the sky?
example_zh: 天空中那個奇怪的物體是什麼？

example: She raised a strong objection to the new plan.
example_zh: 她對這個新計畫提出強烈的反對。

example: Our main objective is to improve student learning.
example_zh: 我們的主要目標是提升學生的學習。

example: Parents have an obligation to care for their children.
example_zh: 父母有照顧子女的義務。

example: The law obliges drivers to wear seat belts.
example_zh: 法律迫使駕駛人繫上安全帶。

example: The meaning of the old poem remains obscure.
example_zh: 這首古詩的意義依然模糊不清。

example: Careful observation helped her solve the puzzle.
example_zh: 仔細的觀察幫助她解開了謎題。

example: Scientists observe the stars through powerful telescopes.
example_zh: 科學家透過強力望遠鏡觀察星星。

example: A keen observer noticed the small mistake at once.
example_zh: 一位敏銳的觀察者立刻注意到那個小錯誤。

example: He obsesses over every tiny detail of his work.
example_zh: 他對工作中每個微小細節都念念不忘。

example: Fear is often the biggest obstacle to success.
example_zh: 恐懼往往是成功最大的障礙。

example: The obstinate child refused to eat his vegetables.
example_zh: 那個頑固的孩子拒絕吃他的蔬菜。

example: You must obtain permission before entering the lab.
example_zh: 進入實驗室前你必須先取得許可。

example: It was obvious that she had been crying.
example_zh: 很明顯她剛剛哭過。

example: We wear formal clothes on special occasions.
example_zh: 在特殊場合我們會穿正式的服裝。

example: We enjoy an occasional trip to the beach.
example_zh: 我們喜歡偶爾去海邊旅行。

example: Please write your name, age, and occupation here.
example_zh: 請在這裡寫下你的姓名、年齡和職業。

example: These books occupy most of the shelf.
example_zh: 這些書占據了書架的大部分空間。

example: The accident occurred late last night.
example_zh: 這場意外發生在昨晚很晚的時候。

example: Earthquakes are a common occurrence in this area.
example_zh: 地震在這個地區是常見的事件。

example: Many fish live in the ocean.
example_zh: 許多魚生活在海洋裡。

example: Halloween is in October.
example_zh: 萬聖節在十月。

example: An octopus can change its color to hide.
example_zh: 章魚能改變顏色來躲藏。

example: There is something odd about his behavior.
example_zh: 他的行為有些奇怪之處。

example: The odds of winning the lottery are very low.
example_zh: 中樂透的機率非常低。

example: A strange odor came from the kitchen.
example_zh: 廚房傳來一股奇怪的氣味。

example: This is a picture of my family.
example_zh: 這是一張我家人的照片。

example: Please turn off the light.
example_zh: 請把燈關掉。

example: I hope my words did not offend you.
example_zh: 我希望我的話沒有冒犯到你。

example: Drunk driving is a serious offense.
example_zh: 酒後駕車是嚴重的犯罪行為。

example: His offensive remarks made everyone angry.
example_zh: 他冒犯的言論讓大家都很生氣。

example: He offered me a cup of hot tea.
example_zh: 他端了一杯熱茶給我。

example: They placed fruit as an offering on the altar.
example_zh: 他們把水果當作供品放在祭壇上。

example: My dad works in an office.
example_zh: 我爸爸在辦公室工作。

example: A police officer stopped the speeding car.
example_zh: 一名警察攔下了超速的汽車。

example: The official results will be announced tomorrow.
example_zh: 官方結果將於明天公布。

example: The country built several offshore wind farms.
example_zh: 這個國家建了幾座離岸風力發電廠。

example: Many animals protect their offspring from danger.
example_zh: 許多動物會保護後代免於危險。

example: I often play basketball after school.
example_zh: 我放學後常常打籃球。

example: Mom cooks with a little oil.
example_zh: 媽媽用一點油做菜。

example: OK, let's go to the park.
example_zh: 好，我們去公園吧。

example: My grandpa is very old.
example_zh: 我爺爺年紀很大了。

example: She added some olive oil to the salad.
example_zh: 她在沙拉裡加了一些橄欖油。

example: You can omit the last question on the test.
example_zh: 考卷上最後一題你可以略過不寫。

example: The book is on the desk.
example_zh: 書在書桌上。

example: I swim once a week.
example_zh: 我一星期游泳一次。

example: I have one brother.
example_zh: 我有一個哥哥。

example: The investigation is still ongoing.
example_zh: 這項調查仍在進行中。

example: Cutting onions always makes me cry.
example_zh: 切洋蔥總是讓我流眼淚。

example: I bought this book from an online store.
example_zh: 我在一家線上商店買了這本書。

example: I have only one dollar.
example_zh: 我只有一塊錢。

example: The cat jumped onto the table.
example_zh: 那隻貓跳到了桌子上。

example: Please open the door.
example_zh: 請打開門。

example: We watched a beautiful opera last weekend.
example_zh: 上週末我們看了一場優美的歌劇。

example: Do you know how to operate this machine?
example_zh: 你知道如何操作這台機器嗎？

example: Grandma needs an operation on her knee.
example_zh: 奶奶的膝蓋需要動手術。

example: The new system is now fully operational.
example_zh: 這個新系統現在已完全可以運作。

example: The new rule becomes operative next month.
example_zh: 這條新規定下個月開始生效。

example: The machine operator checked the safety switch.
example_zh: 機器操作員檢查了安全開關。

example: In my opinion, this movie is great.
example_zh: 依我看，這部電影很棒。

example: She defeated her opponent in the final match.
example_zh: 她在決賽中擊敗了對手。

example: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to learn.
example_zh: 出國留學是很好的學習機會。

example: Many people oppose building a factory here.
example_zh: 許多人反對在這裡蓋工廠。

example: The bank is opposite the post office.
example_zh: 銀行在郵局的對面。

example: The plan met strong opposition from residents.
example_zh: 這項計畫遭到居民強烈的反對。

example: The cruel ruler oppressed his own people.
example_zh: 這個殘暴的統治者壓迫自己的人民。

example: The people finally rose up against oppression.
example_zh: 人民終於起身反抗壓迫。

example: Many students opt to study science.
example_zh: 許多學生選擇研讀科學。

example: Her optimism gave the whole team hope.
example_zh: 她的樂觀給了整個團隊希望。

example: He stays optimistic even in hard times.
example_zh: 即使在艱難時刻他仍保持樂觀。

example: Staying home was not really an option.
example_zh: 待在家裡其實不是一個選項。

example: Attending the extra class is optional.
example_zh: 參加這堂額外的課是可自由選擇的。

example: Do you want tea or coffee?
example_zh: 你要茶還是咖啡？

example: We had an oral exam in English today.
example_zh: 我們今天有一場英文口試。

example: I drink orange juice every morning.
example_zh: 我每天早上喝柳橙汁。

example: The moon orbits the earth once a month.
example_zh: 月球每月繞地球運行一次。

example: We picked apples in the orchard.
example_zh: 我們在果園裡摘蘋果。

example: The orchestra played a lovely piece of music.
example_zh: 這個管弦樂團演奏了一首動聽的樂曲。

example: Surviving the storm was a terrible ordeal.
example_zh: 在暴風雨中生還是一場可怕的折磨。

example: May I order a pizza?
example_zh: 我可以點一個披薩嗎？

example: The students left the room in an orderly way.
example_zh: 學生們有秩序地離開了教室。

example: It was just an ordinary day at school.
example_zh: 那只是在學校平常的一天。

example: The heart is a vital organ in the body.
example_zh: 心臟是人體重要的器官。

example: My mother only buys organic vegetables.
example_zh: 我媽媽只買有機蔬菜。

example: Tiny organisms live in a drop of water.
example_zh: 微小的生物住在一滴水裡。

example: She works for a charity organization.
example_zh: 她在一個慈善組織工作。

example: They organized a party for their teacher.
example_zh: 他們為老師籌辦了一場派對。

example: The event organizer welcomed all the guests.
example_zh: 活動主辦者歡迎所有來賓。

example: New workers need time to orient themselves.
example_zh: 新進員工需要時間來適應環境。

example: The museum displays many oriental paintings.
example_zh: 這座博物館展出許多東方的畫作。

example: New students attend an orientation on Monday.
example_zh: 新生在星期一參加迎新說明會。

example: No one knows the origin of this legend.
example_zh: 沒有人知道這個傳說的起源。

example: This is the original version of the painting.
example_zh: 這是這幅畫的原作。

example: The judges praised the young artist's originality.
example_zh: 評審稱讚這位年輕藝術家的原創性。

example: This dance originated in ancient India.
example_zh: 這種舞蹈起源於古印度。

example: She hung a shiny ornament on the tree.
example_zh: 她在樹上掛了一個閃亮的裝飾品。

example: The kind couple adopted an orphan.
example_zh: 這對善良的夫妻收養了一名孤兒。

example: The children in the orphanage sang together.
example_zh: 孤兒院裡的孩子們一起唱歌。

example: He follows the orthodox teachings of his religion.
example_zh: 他遵循其宗教正統的教義。

example: Where are the other students?
example_zh: 其他的學生在哪裡？

example: Hurry up, otherwise we will miss the bus.
example_zh: 快一點，否則我們會錯過公車。

example: The recipe needs two ounces of butter.
example_zh: 這道食譜需要兩盎司的奶油。

example: This is our classroom.
example_zh: 這是我們的教室。

example: Let's go out and play.
example_zh: 我們出去玩吧。

example: He walked out of the room.
example_zh: 他走出了房間。

example: The flu outbreak closed several schools.
example_zh: 流感的爆發使好幾所學校停課。

example: We are all waiting for the final outcome.
example_zh: 我們都在等待最終的結果。

example: They planned several outdoor activities for summer.
example_zh: 他們為夏天規劃了幾項戶外活動。

example: The children love to play outdoors.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在戶外玩耍。

example: Astronauts explore outer space.
example_zh: 太空人探索外太空。

example: She wore a lovely outfit to the party.
example_zh: 她穿了一套漂亮的服裝去參加派對。

example: Her outgoing personality makes her many friends.
example_zh: 她外向的個性為她交到許多朋友。

example: The class went on an outing to the zoo.
example_zh: 全班去動物園郊遊。

example: The new law outlawed smoking in restaurants.
example_zh: 這條新法律禁止在餐廳吸菸。

example: Sports are a healthy outlet for stress.
example_zh: 運動是紓解壓力的健康出口。

example: Please write an outline before your essay.
example_zh: 寫作文之前請先擬一份大綱。

example: She has a positive outlook on life.
example_zh: 她對人生抱持正面的看法。

example: Girls outnumber boys in our class.
example_zh: 我們班上女生的人數超過男生。

example: The factory increased its output this year.
example_zh: 這家工廠今年提高了產量。

example: The unfair decision caused public outrage.
example_zh: 這個不公平的決定引起了大眾的憤怒。

example: The prices at that store are outrageous.
example_zh: 那家店的價格高得離譜。

example: He rejected the offer outright.
example_zh: 他直截了當地拒絕了這個提議。

example: He was honest with us from the outset.
example_zh: 他從一開始就對我們很誠實。

example: The kids are playing outside.
example_zh: 孩子們正在外面玩。

example: As a new student, he felt like an outsider.
example_zh: 身為新生，他覺得自己像個局外人。

example: They live on the outskirts of the city.
example_zh: 他們住在城市的郊區。

example: She won a prize for her outstanding work.
example_zh: 她因傑出的表現贏得了獎項。

example: His outward calm hid his real fear.
example_zh: 他表面的平靜掩藏了真正的恐懼。

example: The table has an oval shape.
example_zh: 這張桌子是橢圓形的。

example: Mom baked a cake in the oven.
example_zh: 媽媽用烤箱烤了一個蛋糕。

example: The bird flew over the house.
example_zh: 鳥飛過房子上方。

example: The doctor said my dog is a little overweight.
example_zh: 醫生說我的狗有一點過重。

example: The overall quality of the work is good.
example_zh: 這份作品的整體品質很好。

example: He put on a warm overcoat before leaving.
example_zh: 他出門前穿上了一件保暖的大衣。

example: She overcame many difficulties to reach her goal.
example_zh: 她克服了許多困難才達成目標。

example: Don't overdo the exercise, or you'll get hurt.
example_zh: 別運動過度，否則你會受傷。

example: The heavy rain made the river overflow.
example_zh: 大雨使河水氾濫。

example: A plane flew overhead.
example_zh: 一架飛機從頭頂上飛過。

example: I overheard them talking about the surprise party.
example_zh: 我無意間聽到他們談論驚喜派對。

example: Our working hours partly overlap.
example_zh: 我們的工作時間有部分重疊。

example: The teacher overlooked his small mistake.
example_zh: 老師忽略了他的小錯誤。

example: We stayed overnight at a small hotel.
example_zh: 我們在一家小旅館過了一夜。

example: We crossed the busy street on the overpass.
example_zh: 我們走天橋穿越繁忙的街道。

example: My aunt is studying overseas this year.
example_zh: 我阿姨今年在國外讀書。

example: A manager oversees the whole project.
example_zh: 一位經理監督整個專案。

example: The company overtook its rival in sales.
example_zh: 這家公司在銷售上超越了對手。

example: The people tried to overthrow the cruel king.
example_zh: 人民試圖推翻這位殘暴的國王。

example: The strong wind overturned several small boats.
example_zh: 強風使幾艘小船翻覆。

example: The amount of homework overwhelmed the students.
example_zh: 作業的份量讓學生們不知所措。

example: He fell ill because of overwork.
example_zh: 他因為過度勞累而生病了。

example: I still owe my friend fifty dollars.
example_zh: 我還欠朋友五十元。

example: An owl hunts for food at night.
example_zh: 貓頭鷹在夜裡獵食。

example: I have my own room.
example_zh: 我有自己的房間。

example: Who is the owner of this cute dog?
example_zh: 這隻可愛的狗的主人是誰？

example: They argued about the ownership of the land.
example_zh: 他們為這塊土地的所有權爭論。

example: The ox pulls a heavy cart.
example_zh: 那頭公牛拉著沉重的牛車。

example: Plants give off oxygen during the day.
example_zh: 植物在白天釋放氧氣。

example: Fresh oysters are a popular seafood here.
example_zh: 新鮮的牡蠣是這裡受歡迎的海鮮。

example: The ozone layer protects us from the sun.
example_zh: 臭氧層保護我們免受陽光傷害。

example: School ends at four p.m.
example_zh: 學校下午四點放學。

example: She walked at a fast pace to stay warm.
example_zh: 她以快速的步調走路以保暖。

example: Please pack your bag for the trip.
example_zh: 請整理好你的旅行袋。

example: There is a package for you.
example_zh: 有一個給你的包裹。

example: He bought a packet of seeds for the garden.
example_zh: 他買了一包種子要種在花園裡。

example: She wrote the number on a note pad.
example_zh: 她把號碼寫在便條紙上。

example: They paddled the canoe across the lake.
example_zh: 他們划著獨木舟橫渡湖面。

example: Open your book to page ten.
example_zh: 把書翻到第十頁。

example: I felt a pain in my back after the game.
example_zh: 比賽後我覺得背部疼痛。

example: My tooth is so painful that I cannot eat.
example_zh: 我的牙齒痛得讓我吃不下東西。

example: We paint pictures in art class.
example_zh: 我們在美術課畫圖。

example: The painter is drawing a picture of the sea.
example_zh: 那位畫家正在畫一幅海的圖。

example: This painting hangs in the living room.
example_zh: 這幅畫掛在客廳裡。

example: I bought a pair of shoes.
example_zh: 我買了一雙鞋子。

example: I put on my pajamas before going to bed.
example_zh: 我睡覺前穿上睡衣。

example: He met his old pal at the reunion.
example_zh: 他在同學會上遇見了老朋友。

example: The king lived in a huge palace.
example_zh: 國王住在一座巨大的宮殿裡。

example: You look pale. Are you feeling sick?
example_zh: 你的臉色好蒼白，你不舒服嗎？

example: She held the tiny bird in her palm.
example_zh: 她把小鳥捧在手掌裡。

example: Dad fried an egg in the pan.
example_zh: 爸爸用平底鍋煎了一顆蛋。

example: We had pancakes with honey for breakfast.
example_zh: 我們早餐吃了淋蜂蜜的鬆餅。

example: The panda eats bamboo all day long.
example_zh: 貓熊整天都在吃竹子。

example: A panel of experts judged the contest.
example_zh: 一個專家小組評審這場比賽。

example: Don't panic if the lights suddenly go out.
example_zh: 如果燈突然熄滅，別驚慌。

example: These pants are too long.
example_zh: 這條褲子太長了。

example: Papaya milk is my favorite drink.
example_zh: 木瓜牛奶是我最喜歡的飲料。

example: I need a piece of paper.
example_zh: 我需要一張紙。

example: I prefer paperbacks because they are cheaper.
example_zh: 我比較喜歡平裝書，因為比較便宜。

example: The pilot escaped by using a parachute.
example_zh: 飛行員靠降落傘逃生。

example: Crowds gathered to watch the New Year parade.
example_zh: 人群聚集觀看新年遊行。

example: The quiet island felt like paradise.
example_zh: 這座寧靜的小島宛如天堂。

example: It is a paradox that less can be more.
example_zh: 少即是多，這是一種矛盾。

example: Each paragraph should have one main idea.
example_zh: 每個段落應該只有一個主要概念。

example: The two roads run parallel to each other.
example_zh: 這兩條路彼此平行。

example: The accident paralyzed him from the waist down.
example_zh: 這場意外使他腰部以下癱瘓。

example: The mailman delivered a heavy parcel today.
example_zh: 郵差今天送來一個很重的包裹。

example: Pardon? Could you say that again, please?
example_zh: 不好意思，可以請你再說一次嗎？

example: My parents love me a lot.
example_zh: 我的父母非常愛我。

example: We fly kites in the park.
example_zh: 我們在公園放風箏。

example: The parking lot next to the mall is full.
example_zh: 購物中心旁邊的停車場停滿了。

example: The new law was passed by parliament.
example_zh: 這條新法律由國會通過。

example: The parrot can say a few words.
example_zh: 那隻鸚鵡會說幾個字。

example: I like this part of the movie.
example_zh: 我喜歡電影的這個部分。

example: We only got a partial refund for the ticket.
example_zh: 我們只拿回部分的票款。

example: Each participant received a small gift.
example_zh: 每位參與者都收到一份小禮物。

example: All students may participate in the contest.
example_zh: 所有學生都可以參加這場比賽。

example: Your active participation is welcome.
example_zh: 歡迎你的踴躍參與。

example: Tiny particles of dust filled the air.
example_zh: 空氣中充滿了微小的塵埃粒子。

example: Is there any particular book you want?
example_zh: 有沒有你特別想要的書？

example: The accident was partly my fault.
example_zh: 這場意外有部分是我的錯。

example: Please find a partner for the game.
example_zh: 請找一位遊戲搭檔。

example: The two companies formed a strong partnership.
example_zh: 這兩家公司建立了穩固的合夥關係。

example: We had a birthday party for Amy.
example_zh: 我們為艾咪辦了生日派對。

example: Please pass me the salt.
example_zh: 請把鹽遞給我。

example: Read the passage and answer the questions.
example_zh: 閱讀這段文章並回答問題。

example: The bus can carry forty passengers.
example_zh: 這輛公車可以載四十位乘客。

example: She has a real passion for music.
example_zh: 她對音樂有真正的熱情。

example: He is passionate about protecting the environment.
example_zh: 他熱衷於保護環境。

example: He stayed passive and let others decide.
example_zh: 他保持被動，讓別人做決定。

example: Don't forget your passport at the airport.
example_zh: 在機場別忘了帶你的護照。

example: Please keep your password a secret.
example_zh: 請把你的密碼保密。

example: The bus just drove past our school.
example_zh: 公車剛剛開過我們學校。

example: We had pasta with tomato sauce for dinner.
example_zh: 我們晚餐吃了番茄醬義大利麵。

example: Paste the picture on the paper.
example_zh: 把圖片貼在紙上。

example: Reading is her favorite pastime.
example_zh: 閱讀是她最喜歡的消遣。

example: The bakery sells fresh pastries every morning.
example_zh: 這家麵包店每天早上賣新鮮的糕點。

example: She gave the dog a gentle pat.
example_zh: 她輕輕拍了拍那隻狗。

example: He sewed a patch onto his torn jeans.
example_zh: 他在破牛仔褲上縫了一塊補丁。

example: The inventor applied for a patent.
example_zh: 這位發明家申請了專利。

example: We walked along a path in the forest.
example_zh: 我們沿著森林裡的小路走。

example: The lost puppy gave a pathetic cry.
example_zh: 那隻走失的小狗發出可憐的叫聲。

example: Teaching young children requires great patience.
example_zh: 教導幼兒需要很大的耐心。

example: Please be patient and wait for your turn.
example_zh: 請耐心等候，輪到你再上前。

example: He is remembered as a true patriot.
example_zh: 他被人們記為一位真正的愛國者。

example: They sang a patriotic song on the holiday.
example_zh: 他們在假日唱了一首愛國歌曲。

example: Guards patrol the building every night.
example_zh: 警衛每晚巡邏這棟大樓。

example: A rich patron supported the young painter.
example_zh: 一位富有的贊助者支持這位年輕畫家。

example: I like the pattern on your dress.
example_zh: 我喜歡你洋裝上的圖案。

example: Please pause the video for a minute.
example_zh: 請把影片暫停一分鐘。

example: Workers paved the road with new stones.
example_zh: 工人用新石塊鋪設這條路。

example: The cat hurt its front paw.
example_zh: 這隻貓弄傷了前腳掌。

example: I will pay for the tickets.
example_zh: 我來付票錢。

example: We play dodge ball in PE class.
example_zh: 我們在體育課打躲避球。

example: The child refused to eat his peas.
example_zh: 這孩子拒絕吃他的豌豆。

example: Everyone in the world hopes for peace.
example_zh: 全世界的人都盼望和平。

example: The small village is quiet and peaceful.
example_zh: 這個小村莊安靜又祥和。

example: This peach is sweet and juicy.
example_zh: 這顆桃子又甜又多汁。

example: The peacock spread its colorful tail.
example_zh: 孔雀展開了牠色彩繽紛的尾巴。

example: Snow covered the mountain peak.
example_zh: 白雪覆蓋著山頂。

example: Some children are allergic to peanuts.
example_zh: 有些孩子對花生過敏。

example: I ate a pear after dinner.
example_zh: 我晚餐後吃了一顆梨子。

example: She wore a beautiful pearl necklace.
example_zh: 她戴著一條美麗的珍珠項鍊。

example: The peasants worked hard in the rice fields.
example_zh: 農民們在稻田裡辛勤工作。

example: The children threw pebbles into the river.
example_zh: 孩子們把鵝卵石丟進河裡。

example: There was a peculiar smell in the room.
example_zh: 房間裡有一股奇特的氣味。

example: She pedaled her bike up the hill.
example_zh: 她踩著腳踏車上坡。

example: A pedestrian was crossing the busy street.
example_zh: 一位行人正穿越繁忙的街道。

example: The boy peeked through the keyhole.
example_zh: 這男孩從鑰匙孔偷看。

example: Please peel the apple before eating it.
example_zh: 吃蘋果前請先削皮。

example: She peeped at the gift under the tree.
example_zh: 她偷看了樹下的禮物。

example: Teenagers often feel peer pressure.
example_zh: 青少年常常感受到同儕壓力。

example: May I borrow your pen?
example_zh: 我可以借你的筆嗎？

example: The penalty for littering is a heavy fine.
example_zh: 亂丟垃圾的處罰是一筆重罰款。

example: I write with a pencil.
example_zh: 我用鉛筆寫字。

example: My pencil box is full of pens.
example_zh: 我的鉛筆盒裝滿了筆。

example: Your application is still pending.
example_zh: 你的申請仍在等待審核中。

example: Sunlight could not penetrate the thick forest.
example_zh: 陽光無法穿透茂密的森林。

example: Penguins live in very cold places.
example_zh: 企鵝住在非常寒冷的地方。

example: The small town sits on a narrow peninsula.
example_zh: 這座小鎮位於一個狹長的半島上。

example: He saved every penny for a new bike.
example_zh: 他省下每一分錢買一輛新腳踏車。

example: He lives on his monthly pension.
example_zh: 他靠每月的退休金生活。

example: Many people visit the night market.
example_zh: 很多人去逛夜市。

example: Please put some pepper in the soup.
example_zh: 請在湯裡加一點胡椒。

example: The car was moving at sixty miles per hour.
example_zh: 這輛車以每小時六十英里的速度行駛。

example: She quickly perceived the danger in the plan.
example_zh: 她很快察覺到這個計畫中的危險。

example: About ninety percent of students passed the test.
example_zh: 大約百分之九十的學生通過了測驗。

example: A large percentage of the class likes music.
example_zh: 班上很大比例的人喜歡音樂。

example: Colors can change our perception of a room.
example_zh: 顏色能改變我們對房間的感受。

example: A small bird perched on the fence.
example_zh: 一隻小鳥棲息在圍籬上。

example: Today is a perfect day for a picnic.
example_zh: 今天是野餐的完美日子。

example: She practices hard in search of perfection.
example_zh: 她努力練習以追求完美。

example: The students will perform a play tonight.
example_zh: 學生們今晚將演出一齣戲。

example: The audience loved the singer's performance.
example_zh: 觀眾很喜歡這位歌手的表演。

example: The street performer drew a large crowd.
example_zh: 這位街頭表演者吸引了一大群人。

example: She wears a light flower perfume.
example_zh: 她擦著淡淡的花香香水。

example: Perhaps it will rain tomorrow.
example_zh: 也許明天會下雨。

example: The sailors faced great peril at sea.
example_zh: 水手們在海上面臨極大的危險。

example: We have a math test in the second period.
example_zh: 我們第二節課有數學考試。

example: Many plants perish in the cold winter.
example_zh: 許多植物在寒冷的冬天枯死。

example: The accident left a permanent scar.
example_zh: 這場意外留下了永久的疤痕。

example: Smoking is not permissible in this building.
example_zh: 這棟大樓內不允許吸菸。

example: You need your parents' permission to go.
example_zh: 你需要父母的許可才能去。

example: The rules do not permit food in class.
example_zh: 規定不允許在課堂上飲食。

example: If you persevere, you will finally succeed.
example_zh: 只要堅持不懈，你終將成功。

example: She will persist until she reaches her goal.
example_zh: 她會堅持下去，直到達成目標。

example: His persistence finally paid off after years.
example_zh: 多年後，他的堅持終於有了回報。

example: A persistent cough kept him awake all night.
example_zh: 持續的咳嗽讓他整夜無法入睡。

example: She is a kind person.
example_zh: 她是一個善良的人。

example: Don't share your personal information online.
example_zh: 不要在網路上分享你的個人資料。

example: Her warm personality makes everyone feel welcome.
example_zh: 她溫暖的個性讓每個人都感到受歡迎。

example: The company hired new personnel for the project.
example_zh: 公司為這個專案聘用了新員工。

example: Try to see the problem from a new perspective.
example_zh: 試著用新的視角看待這個問題。

example: I tried to persuade him to stay a little longer.
example_zh: 我試著說服他多留一會兒。

example: It took much persuasion to change her mind.
example_zh: 花了許多功夫才說服她改變心意。

example: He gave a persuasive speech about saving energy.
example_zh: 他發表了一場關於節能的有說服力演講。

example: Her pessimism made the whole team lose hope.
example_zh: 她的悲觀讓整個團隊失去了希望。

example: Don't be so pessimistic about the future.
example_zh: 別對未來這麼悲觀。

example: Farmers use nets to keep pests off the crops.
example_zh: 農夫用網子防止害蟲侵害作物。

example: My pet is a small dog.
example_zh: 我的寵物是一隻小狗。

example: They signed a petition to save the old park.
example_zh: 他們簽了請願書來拯救那座舊公園。

example: We stopped to fill the car with petrol.
example_zh: 我們停下來為車子加汽油。

example: Petroleum is used to make plastics and fuel.
example_zh: 石油被用來製造塑膠和燃料。

example: Don't waste time arguing over petty matters.
example_zh: 別浪費時間為瑣事爭吵。

example: The pharmacist explained how to take the medicine.
example_zh: 藥劑師說明了服藥的方法。

example: I bought some cough syrup at the pharmacy.
example_zh: 我在藥局買了一些止咳糖漿。

example: The project is now in its final phase.
example_zh: 這個專案現在進入最後階段。

example: The northern lights are a beautiful natural phenomenon.
example_zh: 北極光是一種美麗的自然現象。

example: The ancient philosopher taught his students to question.
example_zh: 那位古代哲學家教導學生去質疑。

example: He took a philosophical view of his failure.
example_zh: 他以豁達的態度看待自己的失敗。

example: Her philosophy of life is to stay positive.
example_zh: 她的人生觀是保持樂觀。

example: Let's take a photo together.
example_zh: 我們一起拍張照吧。

example: She took a photograph of the sunset.
example_zh: 她拍了一張日落的照片。

example: The photographer captured the perfect moment.
example_zh: 攝影師捕捉到了完美的瞬間。

example: He has a photographic memory for faces.
example_zh: 他對人臉有著照片般精準的記憶。

example: Photography is her favorite hobby.
example_zh: 攝影是她最喜歡的嗜好。

example: Please phrase your question more clearly.
example_zh: 請把你的問題表達得更清楚些。

example: Regular physical exercise keeps you healthy.
example_zh: 規律的身體運動能保持健康。

example: The physician advised her to rest more.
example_zh: 醫師建議她多休息。

example: The physicist explained how light travels.
example_zh: 物理學家解釋了光如何行進。

example: Physics is my favorite subject at school.
example_zh: 物理是我在學校最喜歡的科目。

example: The young pianist played beautifully on stage.
example_zh: 那位年輕鋼琴家在台上彈奏得很美。

example: She plays the piano very well.
example_zh: 她鋼琴彈得很好。

example: Please pick a book you like.
example_zh: 請挑一本你喜歡的書。

example: She added a slice of pickle to the sandwich.
example_zh: 她在三明治裡加了一片醃黃瓜。

example: A pickpocket stole his wallet on the bus.
example_zh: 一名扒手在公車上偷了他的皮夾。

example: He loaded the boxes into his pickup.
example_zh: 他把箱子搬上他的小貨車。

example: We had a picnic in the park.
example_zh: 我們在公園野餐。

example: She drew a picture of a cat.
example_zh: 她畫了一張貓的圖。

example: Mom made an apple pie.
example_zh: 媽媽做了一個蘋果派。

example: May I have a piece of cake?
example_zh: 我可以吃一塊蛋糕嗎？

example: We walked to the end of the pier to fish.
example_zh: 我們走到碼頭盡頭去釣魚。

example: The pig is fat and cute.
example_zh: 這隻豬又胖又可愛。

example: A pigeon is standing on the roof.
example_zh: 一隻鴿子站在屋頂上。

example: There is a pile of books on his desk.
example_zh: 他的書桌上有一堆書。

example: Every year many pilgrims visit the holy city.
example_zh: 每年許多朝聖者造訪這座聖城。

example: Take one pill after each meal.
example_zh: 每餐飯後服用一顆藥丸。

example: Marble pillars support the ancient temple.
example_zh: 大理石柱支撐著這座古老的神廟。

example: This pillow is very soft.

example: The pilot landed the plane safely.
example_zh: 飛行員安全地讓飛機降落。

example: A pimple appeared on her chin before the party.
example_zh: 派對前她的下巴冒出一顆青春痘。

example: Mom fixed the note with a pin.
example_zh: 媽媽用別針把紙條固定住。

example: She gave his arm a gentle pinch.
example_zh: 她輕輕捏了一下他的手臂。

example: Tall pines grew along the mountain trail.
example_zh: 高聳的松樹沿著山徑生長。

example: Pineapple cakes are famous gifts from Taiwan.
example_zh: 鳳梨酥是台灣有名的伴手禮。

example: She likes pink dresses.
example_zh: 她喜歡粉紅色的洋裝。

example: He drank a pint of milk for breakfast.
example_zh: 他早餐喝了一品脫的牛奶。

example: She was a pioneer in computer science.
example_zh: 她是電腦科學領域的先驅。

example: Water runs through the pipe.
example_zh: 水流過水管。

example: Oil flows through the pipeline to the port.
example_zh: 石油經由管線輸送到港口。

example: The pirates buried their treasure on the island.
example_zh: 海盜們把寶藏埋在島上。

example: They dug a deep pit to plant the tree.
example_zh: 他們挖了一個深坑來種樹。

example: He can pitch the ball very fast.
example_zh: 他能把球投得很快。

example: The pitcher threw a perfect strike.
example_zh: 投手投出了一記完美的好球。

example: I felt great pity for the lost puppy.
example_zh: 我對那隻迷路的小狗深感同情。

example: We ordered a large pizza.
example_zh: 我們點了一個大披薩。

example: This is a good place to rest.
example_zh: 這是一個休息的好地方。

example: The placement of the sofa blocks the door.
example_zh: 沙發的擺放位置擋住了門。

example: The plague spread quickly through the town.
example_zh: 瘟疫迅速在鎮上蔓延。

example: She wore a plain white shirt to school.
example_zh: 她穿一件素面的白襯衫上學。

example: What is your plan for the weekend?
example_zh: 你週末有什麼計畫？

example: Earth is a beautiful planet.
example_zh: 地球是一顆美麗的行星。

example: Water the plant every day.
example_zh: 每天幫植物澆水。

example: They grow coffee on a large plantation.
example_zh: 他們在一座大農場種植咖啡。

example: Too much plastic waste harms the ocean.
example_zh: 太多塑膠垃圾傷害海洋。

example: Put the cake on the plate.
example_zh: 把蛋糕放在盤子上。

example: The train will arrive at platform two.
example_zh: 火車即將停靠第二月台。

example: I play games with my friends.
example_zh: 我和朋友一起玩遊戲。

example: He is a great basketball player.
example_zh: 他是一位很棒的籃球員。

example: The playful kitten chased its own tail.
example_zh: 那隻愛玩的小貓追著自己的尾巴。

example: The kids are running on the playground.
example_zh: 孩子們正在操場上跑步。

example: Shakespeare is the most famous English playwright.
example_zh: 莎士比亞是最著名的英國劇作家。

example: Her plea for help moved everyone in the room.
example_zh: 她求助的懇求感動了在場所有人。

example: He pleaded with the judge for mercy.
example_zh: 他懇求法官從輕發落。

example: We had a pleasant trip to Taitung last week.
example_zh: 我們上週去台東玩得很愉快。

example: Please sit down.
example_zh: 請坐下。

example: It's my pleasure to help you.
example_zh: 能幫助你是我的榮幸。

example: They made a pledge to protect the forest.
example_zh: 他們立下誓言要保護森林。

example: Food was plentiful after the good harvest.
example_zh: 豐收後食物很充足。

example: There is plenty of time before the movie.
example_zh: 電影開始前還有很多時間。

example: The novel has an exciting and twisting plot.
example_zh: 這本小說有著刺激又曲折的情節。

example: The farmer used a plow to turn the soil.
example_zh: 農夫用犁翻土。

example: Please plug the phone into the charger.
example_zh: 請把手機插上充電器。

example: She picked a ripe plum from the tree.
example_zh: 她從樹上摘了一顆成熟的李子。

example: The plumber fixed the leaking pipe quickly.
example_zh: 水管工很快修好了漏水的管子。

example: The swimmer plunged into the cold lake.
example_zh: 泳者一躍跳入冰冷的湖中。

example: The plural form of "child" is "children."
example_zh: 「child」的複數形是「children」。

example: Two plus three is five.
example_zh: 二加三等於五。

example: The meeting starts at three pm today.
example_zh: 今天的會議下午三點開始。

example: He was hospitalized with severe pneumonia.
example_zh: 他因為嚴重肺炎住院。

example: The key is in my pocket.
example_zh: 鑰匙在我的口袋裡。

example: She wrote a poem about the moon.
example_zh: 她寫了一首關於月亮的詩。

example: The poet wrote about love and nature.
example_zh: 這位詩人寫下關於愛與自然的作品。

example: The song has a beautiful, poetic quality.
example_zh: 這首歌有著優美詩意的特質。

example: She enjoys reading poetry on quiet evenings.
example_zh: 她喜歡在寧靜的夜晚讀詩。

example: Don't point at other people.
example_zh: 不要用手指著別人。

example: Some mushrooms in the forest have poison in them.
example_zh: 森林裡有些菇類含有毒素。

example: Some wild mushrooms are highly poisonous.
example_zh: 有些野生蘑菇有劇毒。

example: The boy poked the sleeping cat with a stick.
example_zh: 男孩用棍子戳了戳熟睡的貓。

example: Polar bears live in the icy Arctic.
example_zh: 北極熊生活在冰冷的北極。

example: They raised the flag on a tall pole.
example_zh: 他們把旗子升上高高的旗桿。

example: The police arrived at the scene quickly.
example_zh: 警察迅速趕到現場。

example: The police officer helped the lost child.
example_zh: 那位警察幫助了迷路的小孩。

example: The police station is near my house.
example_zh: 警察局在我家附近。

example: A kind policeman helped the child cross the street.
example_zh: 一位親切的警察幫小孩過馬路。

example: The school has a strict no-cheating policy.
example_zh: 學校有嚴格的禁止作弊政策。

example: He polished his shoes until they shone.
example_zh: 他把鞋子擦到發亮。

example: Be polite to your teachers.
example_zh: 對老師要有禮貌。

example: They held a political debate before the election.
example_zh: 選舉前他們舉行了一場政治辯論。

example: The politician promised to lower taxes.
example_zh: 那位政治人物承諾降低稅收。

example: He has been interested in politics since college.
example_zh: 他從大學起就對政治感興趣。

example: A recent poll shows most people support the plan.
example_zh: 最近的民調顯示多數人支持這項計畫。

example: Factories should not pollute the river.
example_zh: 工廠不應該污染河川。

example: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
example_zh: 空氣污染在大城市是嚴重的問題。

example: There are many fish in the pond.
example_zh: 池塘裡有很多魚。

example: She sat by the window to ponder her choices.
example_zh: 她坐在窗邊仔細思考自己的選擇。

example: The little girl rode a brown pony at the farm.
example_zh: 小女孩在農場騎了一匹棕色小馬。

example: We swim in the pool in summer.
example_zh: 我們夏天在游泳池游泳。

example: The poor man has no home.
example_zh: 那個窮人沒有家。

example: She loves listening to pop music.
example_zh: 她喜歡聽流行音樂。

example: Many teenagers enjoy listening to pop music.
example_zh: 許多青少年喜歡聽流行音樂。

example: We eat popcorn at the movies.
example_zh: 我們看電影時吃爆米花。

example: This game is popular at our school.
example_zh: 這個遊戲在我們學校很受歡迎。

example: The show's popularity grew every week.
example_zh: 這個節目的人氣每週都在上升。

example: Farmers were the first to populate the valley.
example_zh: 農民是最早在這山谷定居的人。

example: The population of Taiwan is about twenty-three million.
example_zh: 台灣的人口大約兩千三百萬。

example: The museum displays ancient Chinese porcelain.
example_zh: 博物館展示古老的中國瓷器。

example: They sat on the porch to enjoy the breeze.
example_zh: 他們坐在門廊上享受微風。

example: Mom cooked pork and rice for dinner.
example_zh: 媽媽晚餐煮了豬肉和飯。

example: The ship sailed into the busy port at dawn.
example_zh: 船在黎明時駛入繁忙的港口。

example: She carries a portable speaker on trips.
example_zh: 她旅行時會帶一台手提喇叭。

example: A porter helped us carry our bags upstairs.
example_zh: 一名行李員幫我們把袋子搬上樓。

example: She showed her design portfolio to the client.
example_zh: 她向客戶展示她的設計作品集。

example: A large portion of the cake was left over.
example_zh: 蛋糕剩下了很大一部分。

example: The artist painted a portrait of the queen.
example_zh: 畫家為女王畫了一幅肖像。

example: The film portrays life during the war.
example_zh: 這部電影描繪了戰爭期間的生活。

example: Please pose for the camera and smile.
example_zh: 請對著相機擺個姿勢並微笑。

example: Please put the chair back in its position.
example_zh: 請把椅子放回原來的位置。

example: Keep a positive attitude when things go wrong.
example_zh: 遇到不順利時，要保持正面的態度。

example: He possesses a rare talent for music.
example_zh: 他擁有罕見的音樂天賦。

example: Her most treasured possession is an old watch.
example_zh: 她最珍愛的財產是一只舊手錶。

example: There is a possibility of rain this afternoon.
example_zh: 今天下午有下雨的可能。

example: It is possible to finish today.
example_zh: 今天有可能完成。

example: She will post the letter tomorrow morning.
example_zh: 她明天早上會把信寄出。

example: I mailed the letter at the post office.
example_zh: 我在郵局寄了那封信。

example: The postage for this parcel is quite high.
example_zh: 這個包裹的郵資相當高。

example: She sent me a postcard from Japan.
example_zh: 她從日本寄給我一張明信片。

example: They put up a poster to promote the concert.
example_zh: 他們張貼海報來宣傳演唱會。

example: They had to postpone the trip because of the storm.
example_zh: 他們因為暴風雨不得不延期旅行。

example: Good posture helps prevent back pain.
example_zh: 良好的姿勢有助於預防背痛。

example: The soup is in the pot.
example_zh: 湯在鍋子裡。

example: French fries are made from potatoes.
example_zh: 薯條是用馬鈴薯做的。

example: The medicine is potent, so take a small dose.
example_zh: 這種藥效力很強，所以只需服用小劑量。

example: The young player has great potential.
example_zh: 這位年輕球員有很大的潛力。

example: She learned to make pottery in art class.
example_zh: 她在美術課學會了製作陶器。

example: The farm raises poultry such as chickens and ducks.
example_zh: 這座農場飼養雞、鴨等家禽。

example: The baby weighs eight pounds.
example_zh: 這個寶寶重八磅。

example: Please pour some water into my glass.
example_zh: 請倒些水到我的杯子裡。

example: Many families still live in poverty.
example_zh: 許多家庭仍生活在貧困之中。

example: Mix the milk powder with warm water.
example_zh: 把奶粉和溫水調勻。

example: The storm cut off the power.
example_zh: 暴風雨造成停電。

example: The new engine is far more powerful than the old one.
example_zh: 新引擎比舊的強大許多。

example: She gave me some practical advice for the trip.
example_zh: 她給了我一些實用的旅行建議。

example: I practice the piano every day.
example_zh: 我每天練習鋼琴。

example: He is a skilled practitioner of traditional medicine.
example_zh: 他是一位熟練的傳統醫學從業者。

example: The teacher praised her for her hard work.
example_zh: 老師稱讚她的努力。

example: They pray before dinner.
example_zh: 他們在晚餐前禱告。

example: She said a quiet prayer before the exam.
example_zh: 考試前她默默祈禱。

example: The priest preached about kindness on Sunday.
example_zh: 牧師在星期日佈道談論仁慈。

example: Wear a helmet as a safety precaution.
example_zh: 戴上安全帽作為預防措施。

example: A short speech will precede the awards.
example_zh: 頒獎之前會有一段簡短的致詞。

example: This ruling sets an important legal precedent.
example_zh: 這項裁決樹立了重要的法律先例。

example: Time with family is precious to me.
example_zh: 和家人相處的時光對我來說很珍貴。

example: The scientist took precise measurements.
example_zh: 科學家進行了精確的測量。

example: The parts must be cut with great precision.
example_zh: 這些零件必須以高度精確度切割。

example: The lion is a powerful predator on the plains.
example_zh: 獅子是草原上強大的掠食者。

example: The new manager learned much from her predecessor.
example_zh: 新任經理向前任學到很多。

example: No one can predict the weather perfectly.
example_zh: 沒有人能完美預測天氣。

example: His prediction about the game turned out true.
example_zh: 他對比賽的預測結果成真了。

example: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
example_zh: 我早上比較喜歡喝茶而不是咖啡。

example: She has a strong preference for spicy food.
example_zh: 她非常偏好辣的食物。

example: She stayed healthy throughout her pregnancy.
example_zh: 她在整個孕期都保持健康。

example: His wife is pregnant with their first child.
example_zh: 他的妻子懷了第一個孩子。

example: The cave contains prehistoric paintings.
example_zh: 這個洞穴裡有史前的壁畫。

example: We must fight prejudice against different cultures.
example_zh: 我們必須對抗對不同文化的偏見。

example: The preliminary results look very promising.
example_zh: 初步結果看起來很有希望。

example: It is premature to announce the winner now.
example_zh: 現在宣布贏家還為時過早。

example: The premier met with foreign leaders today.
example_zh: 總理今天會見了外國領袖。

example: Fans lined up for the movie's premiere.
example_zh: 影迷們為電影首映排隊。

example: The whole plan rests on a false premise.
example_zh: 整個計畫建立在錯誤的前提上。

example: You pay a higher premium for better coverage.
example_zh: 你付較高的保費以獲得更好的保障。

example: Careful preparation is the key to success.
example_zh: 充分的準備是成功的關鍵。

example: Mom is preparing dinner now.
example_zh: 媽媽現在正在準備晚餐。

example: The doctor prescribed some medicine for her cold.
example_zh: 醫生為她的感冒開了一些藥。

example: You need a prescription to buy this drug.
example_zh: 你需要處方才能買這種藥。

example: Your presence at the meeting is required.
example_zh: 會議需要你出席。

example: I got a present on my birthday.
example_zh: 我生日收到一份禮物。

example: She gave a clear presentation to the class.
example_zh: 她向全班做了清楚的簡報。

example: The group works for the preservation of old buildings.
example_zh: 這個團體致力於保存古老建築。

example: We must preserve nature for future generations.
example_zh: 我們必須為後代保護大自然。

example: The judge will preside over the trial.
example_zh: 法官將主持這場審判。

example: He won the presidency by a small margin.
example_zh: 他以些微差距贏得總統職位。

example: The president will visit our city next month.
example_zh: 總統下個月將訪問我們的城市。

example: The presidential election is held every four years.
example_zh: 總統選舉每四年舉行一次。

example: Press this button to start the machine.
example_zh: 按下這個按鈕來啟動機器。

example: Students often feel pressure before big tests.
example_zh: 學生在大考前常常感到壓力。

example: The award brought great prestige to the school.
example_zh: 這個獎項為學校帶來崇高的聲望。

example: He is late, presumably because of the traffic.
example_zh: 他遲到了，想必是因為交通。

example: I presume you have finished your homework.
example_zh: 我推測你已經寫完作業了。

example: The children like to pretend they are pirates.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡假裝自己是海盜。

example: She looks pretty in that dress.
example_zh: 她穿那件洋裝很漂亮。

example: In the end, justice will prevail.
example_zh: 最終，正義將會獲勝。

example: Washing hands can prevent many diseases.
example_zh: 洗手可以預防許多疾病。

example: Prevention is better than cure.
example_zh: 預防勝於治療。

example: Doctors stress the value of preventive care.
example_zh: 醫生強調預防保健的價值。

example: We watched a short preview of the new film.
example_zh: 我們看了新片的簡短預告。

example: She had no previous experience in teaching.
example_zh: 她之前沒有教學經驗。

example: The owl swooped down on its prey.
example_zh: 貓頭鷹俯衝撲向牠的獵物。

example: The price of this toy is high.
example_zh: 這個玩具的價格很高。

example: The painting is a priceless work of art.
example_zh: 這幅畫是無價的藝術品。

example: She felt great pride in her son's success.
example_zh: 她為兒子的成功感到十分自豪。

example: The priest spoke to the people in the church.
example_zh: 神父在教堂裡對人們講話。

example: Safety is our primary concern on the trip.
example_zh: 安全是這趟旅行我們最重要的考量。

example: The store is in a prime location downtown.
example_zh: 這家店位於市中心的絕佳地段。

example: The tribe still uses primitive tools.
example_zh: 這個部落仍使用原始的工具。

example: The prince lives in a castle.
example_zh: 王子住在城堡裡。

example: The princess has long hair.
example_zh: 公主有一頭長髮。

example: Our principal gave a speech this morning.
example_zh: 我們的校長今天早上發表演說。

example: Honesty is an important principle in my life.
example_zh: 誠實是我人生中重要的原則。

example: Please print two copies of the report.
example_zh: 請把報告列印兩份。

example: The printer is out of paper again.
example_zh: 印表機又沒紙了。

example: You need prior approval to enter the lab.
example_zh: 進入實驗室需要事先核准。

example: Safety is our top priority at work.
example_zh: 安全是我們工作上的首要之務。

example: The thief was sent to prison for two years.
example_zh: 那名小偷被送進監獄兩年。

example: The prisoner was released after serving his term.
example_zh: 那名囚犯服刑期滿後獲釋。

example: Everyone has a right to personal privacy.
example_zh: 每個人都有個人隱私的權利。

example: This is my private diary, so don't read it.
example_zh: 這是我私人的日記，請不要看。

example: The government decided to privatize the railway.
example_zh: 政府決定將鐵路私有化。

example: It is a privilege to work with such experts.
example_zh: 能與這些專家共事是一種榮幸。

example: She won first prize in the contest.

example: We finally found a solution to the problem.
example_zh: 我們終於找到解決問題的辦法。

example: Can you solve this math problem?
example_zh: 你能解出這道數學題嗎？

example: I have some candy.
example_zh: 我有一些糖果。

example: I hope to visit Japan someday.
example_zh: 我希望有朝一日能造訪日本。

example: We will finish the work somehow.
example_zh: 我們總會設法完成這項工作。

example: Someone is at the door.
example_zh: 有人在門口。

example: I have something to tell you.
example_zh: 我有事要告訴你。

example: Let's meet for coffee sometime next week.
example_zh: 我們下週找個時間喝杯咖啡吧。

example: Sometimes I walk to school.
example_zh: 我有時候走路上學。

example: I was somewhat surprised by the result.
example_zh: 我對這個結果有點驚訝。

example: I left my keys somewhere.
example_zh: 我把鑰匙忘在某個地方了。

example: Their son is ten years old.
example_zh: 他們的兒子十歲。

example: This song is beautiful.
example_zh: 這首歌很好聽。

example: See you soon!
example_zh: 很快再見！

example: Soft music can soothe a crying baby.
example_zh: 輕柔的音樂能安撫哭鬧的嬰兒。

example: The factory uses sophisticated machines.
example_zh: 這家工廠使用精密的機器。

example: He is a sophomore at a local high school.
example_zh: 他是當地一所高中的二年級學生。

example: My legs are sore after the long hike.
example_zh: 長途健行後我的腿很痠痛。

example: I have a sore throat today.
example_zh: 我今天喉嚨痛。

example: Her heart was filled with sorrow.
example_zh: 她的心中充滿悲傷。

example: She gave a sorrowful look and turned away.
example_zh: 她露出悲傷的神情，轉身離去。

example: I am sorry for being late.
example_zh: 我很抱歉遲到了。

example: What sort of music do you like?
example_zh: 你喜歡哪種音樂？

example: Music is good for the soul.
example_zh: 音樂對心靈有益。

example: That sounds like a good idea.
example_zh: 那聽起來是個好主意。

example: The soup is hot.
example_zh: 這碗湯很燙。

example: The lemon tastes very sour.
example_zh: 這顆檸檬嚐起來非常酸。

example: The sun is our main source of energy.
example_zh: 太陽是我們主要的能量來源。

example: Tainan is in the south of Taiwan.
example_zh: 台南在台灣的南部。

example: They moved to a southern city for the warm weather.
example_zh: 他們為了溫暖的天氣搬到南方的城市。

example: I bought a small souvenir from the trip.
example_zh: 我從這趟旅行買了一個小紀念品。

example: Each sovereign nation makes its own laws.
example_zh: 每個主權國家制定自己的法律。

example: The country fought to protect its sovereignty.
example_zh: 這個國家為保護主權而戰。

example: The farmers sow the seeds in spring.
example_zh: 農夫在春天播種。

example: Add some soy-sauce to the noodles.
example_zh: 在麵裡加一點醬油。

example: Soybeans are used to make tofu and soy sauce.
example_zh: 大豆被用來製作豆腐和醬油。

example: I want to travel to space.
example_zh: 我想去太空旅行。

example: The spacecraft landed safely on the moon.
example_zh: 太空船安全降落在月球上。

example: Their new house has a spacious living room.
example_zh: 他們的新房子有個寬敞的客廳。

example: He dug the soil with a heavy spade.
example_zh: 他用一把沉重的鏟子挖土。

example: We had spaghetti for dinner.
example_zh: 我們晚餐吃義大利麵。

example: The bridge spans a wide river.
example_zh: 這座橋橫跨一條寬闊的河流。

example: Can you spare a few minutes to help me?
example_zh: 你能騰出幾分鐘幫我嗎？

example: A single spark started the huge fire.
example_zh: 一個小火花引發了這場大火。

example: Her eyes sparkled with joy.
example_zh: 她的眼睛因喜悅而閃閃發亮。

example: A little sparrow landed on the windowsill.
example_zh: 一隻小麻雀停在窗台上。

example: Do you speak English?
example_zh: 你會說英語嗎？

example: The speaker talked about protecting the environment.
example_zh: 演講者談到保護環境的議題。

example: The hunter carried a long wooden spear.
example_zh: 獵人帶著一支長長的木矛。

example: Today is a special day.
example_zh: 今天是特別的日子。

example: You should see a specialist about your eyes.
example_zh: 你的眼睛應該去看專科醫生。

example: This shop specializes in Italian coffee.
example_zh: 這家店專賣義大利咖啡。

example: Seafood is the specialty of this restaurant.
example_zh: 海鮮是這家餐廳的招牌菜。

example: Many species of birds live in this forest.
example_zh: 許多鳥類物種棲息在這片森林中。

example: Please give me a specific example.
example_zh: 請給我一個明確的例子。

example: Please specify the date and time of the meeting.
example_zh: 請明確指出會議的日期和時間。

example: The scientist collected a rock specimen.
example_zh: 科學家採集了一份岩石標本。

example: The fireworks were an amazing spectacle.
example_zh: 這場煙火是一場驚人的奇觀。

example: We enjoyed a spectacular view from the top.
example_zh: 我們從山頂欣賞壯觀的景色。

example: Thousands of spectators watched the game.
example_zh: 數千名觀眾觀看了這場比賽。

example: The topic covers a wide spectrum of ideas.
example_zh: 這個主題涵蓋廣泛的觀點範圍。

example: Reporters speculate about the reason for his leaving.
example_zh: 記者們推測他離開的原因。

example: She gave a wonderful speech at the meeting.
example_zh: 她在會議上發表了精彩的演講。

example: The train moves at high speed.
example_zh: 火車以高速行駛。

example: How do you spell your name?
example_zh: 你的名字怎麼拼？

example: Please check the spelling of each word.
example_zh: 請檢查每個單字的拼寫。

example: I spend an hour reading every day.
example_zh: 我每天花一小時閱讀。

example: The earth is shaped like a sphere.
example_zh: 地球的形狀像個球體。

example: She added some spice to the soup.
example_zh: 她在湯裡加了一些香料。

example: I love spicy food from Thailand.
example_zh: 我喜歡泰國的辛辣食物。

example: The spider has eight legs.
example_zh: 蜘蛛有八隻腳。

example: Be careful not to spill the milk.
example_zh: 小心別把牛奶灑出來。

example: The dancer began to spin on one foot.
example_zh: 舞者開始以單腳旋轉。

example: Spinach is rich in iron and vitamins.
example_zh: 菠菜富含鐵質和維生素。

example: Good posture keeps your spine straight.
example_zh: 良好的姿勢能讓脊椎保持挺直。

example: The staircase winds up in a spiral.
example_zh: 這座樓梯呈螺旋狀向上盤旋。

example: Our team showed great fighting spirit.
example_zh: 我們的隊伍展現了極佳的戰鬥精神。

example: Music brings her great spiritual comfort.
example_zh: 音樂帶給她極大的心靈慰藉。

example: It is rude to spit on the street.
example_zh: 在街上吐痰是不禮貌的。

example: He passed the exam in spite of his illness.
example_zh: 儘管生病，他還是通過了考試。

example: The kids love to splash water at each other.
example_zh: 孩子們喜歡互相潑水。

example: We had a splendid time at the beach.
example_zh: 我們在海灘度過了美好的時光。

example: Tourists admire the splendor of the palace.
example_zh: 遊客們讚嘆宮殿的壯麗。

example: Let's split the bill between us.
example_zh: 我們來平分帳單吧。

example: Too many gifts may spoil a child.
example_zh: 太多禮物可能會寵壞孩子。

example: The company's spokesperson answered the reporters' questions.
example_zh: 公司的發言人回答了記者的問題。

example: She wiped the table with a wet sponge.
example_zh: 她用濕海綿擦拭桌子。

example: A local company agreed to sponsor the event.
example_zh: 一家當地公司同意贊助這場活動。

example: The team lost its sponsorship this year.
example_zh: 球隊今年失去了贊助。

example: Her spontaneous laughter filled the room.
example_zh: 她自然而然的笑聲充滿了整個房間。

example: I eat soup with a spoon.
example_zh: 我用湯匙喝湯。

example: Basketball is his favorite sport.
example_zh: 籃球是他最喜歡的運動。

example: I really like sports.
example_zh: 我非常喜歡運動。

example: A true sportsman respects his opponents.
example_zh: 真正的運動員會尊重對手。

example: Good sportsmanship matters more than winning.
example_zh: 良好的運動家精神比獲勝更重要。

example: This park is a good spot for a picnic.
example_zh: 這座公園是野餐的好地點。

example: The singer stood alone in the spotlight.
example_zh: 歌手獨自站在聚光燈下。

example: You may bring your spouse to the dinner.
example_zh: 你可以帶配偶一起參加晚宴。

example: She used a spray to water the plants.
example_zh: 她用噴霧器為植物澆水。

example: She spread some jam on the bread.
example_zh: 她在麵包上塗了一些果醬。

example: Flowers bloom in spring.
example_zh: 花在春天開放。

example: Sprinkle some salt over the vegetables.
example_zh: 在蔬菜上撒一些鹽。

example: His success spurred me to work harder.
example_zh: 他的成功激勵我更加努力。

example: The spy secretly passed the documents to the enemy.
example_zh: 間諜暗中把文件交給敵人。

example: The police squad rushed to the scene.
example_zh: 警察小隊迅速趕到現場。

example: A square has four sides.
example_zh: 正方形有四個邊。

example: He accidentally squashed the paper cup.
example_zh: 他不小心壓扁了紙杯。

example: She squatted down to talk to the child.
example_zh: 她蹲下來和孩子說話。

example: Squeeze the lemon to get the juice.
example_zh: 擠壓檸檬以取得汁液。

example: A squirrel ran up the tall tree.
example_zh: 一隻松鼠爬上了高高的樹。

example: He was stabbed in the arm during the fight.
example_zh: 他在打鬥中手臂被刺傷。

example: Political stability helps the economy grow.
example_zh: 政治穩定有助於經濟成長。

example: The medicine helped stabilize the patient's heart rate.
example_zh: 這種藥有助於穩定病人的心跳速率。

example: After the surgery, his condition became stable.
example_zh: 手術後，他的病情變得穩定。

example: She placed a stack of books on the desk.
example_zh: 她把一疊書放在書桌上。

example: Thousands of fans filled the stadium for the game.
example_zh: 數千名球迷擠滿體育場看這場比賽。

example: The hotel staff were friendly and helpful.
example_zh: 這家旅館的員工既友善又樂於助人。

example: The singer walked onto the stage and smiled.
example_zh: 歌手走上舞台，露出微笑。

example: He began to stagger after running the whole race.
example_zh: 跑完整場比賽後，他開始步履蹣跚。

example: The coffee left a dark stain on the carpet.
example_zh: 咖啡在地毯上留下一塊深色污漬。

example: She sat on the top stair and waited for me.
example_zh: 她坐在最上面的樓梯上等我。

example: Be careful on the stairs.
example_zh: 走樓梯要小心。

example: Many jobs are at stake if the factory closes.
example_zh: 如果工廠關閉，許多工作將岌岌可危。

example: The bread turned stale after a few days.
example_zh: 這條麵包過了幾天就變得不新鮮了。

example: We bought fruit from a stall near the market.
example_zh: 我們在市場附近的攤位買了水果。

example: I put a stamp on the letter.
example_zh: 我在信上貼了一張郵票。

example: The government took a firm stance against crime.
example_zh: 政府對犯罪採取了堅定的立場。

example: Please stand up.
example_zh: 請站起來。

example: This product meets our high quality standards.
example_zh: 這項產品符合我們的高品質標準。

zh: 主要產品；用釘書針釘住
example: Rice is a staple food in many Asian countries.
example_zh: 米飯是許多亞洲國家的主食。

example: The stars are bright tonight.
example_zh: 今晚星星很亮。

example: The little boy stared at the huge dinosaur.
example_zh: 小男孩盯著那隻巨大的恐龍看。

example: The movie starts at seven.
example_zh: 電影七點開始。

example: The loud noise startled the sleeping baby.
example_zh: 那巨大的聲響驚醒了熟睡的嬰兒。

example: Many animals died of starvation during the drought.
example_zh: 許多動物在乾旱期間餓死了。

example: Without food, the trapped hikers began to starve.
example_zh: 沒有食物，受困的登山客開始挨餓。

example: California is a big state in America.
example_zh: 加州是美國的一個大州。

example: He is remembered as a wise and honest statesman.
example_zh: 人們記得他是位睿智又誠實的政治家。

example: The train station is near my house.
example_zh: 火車站在我家附近。

example: The car remained stationary at the red light.
example_zh: 那輛車在紅燈前保持靜止。

example: She bought pens and paper at the stationery store.
example_zh: 她在文具店買了筆和紙。

example: I bought pens and erasers at the stationery store.
example_zh: 我在文具店買了筆和橡皮擦。

example: This statistic shows how fast the city is growing.
example_zh: 這項統計數字顯示這座城市成長得多快。

example: The report is based on careful statistical analysis.
example_zh: 這份報告以嚴謹的統計分析為基礎。

example: A tall statue stands in the center of the park.
example_zh: 公園中央矗立著一座高大的雕像。

example: Despite his small stature, he plays basketball well.
example_zh: 儘管身材矮小，他籃球打得很好。

example: Owning a car was once a symbol of high status.
example_zh: 擁有汽車曾經是高社會地位的象徵。

example: The new statute protects workers from unfair pay.
example_zh: 這項新法規保護勞工免於不公平的薪資。

example: You can stay at my house.
example_zh: 你可以住在我家。

example: He kept a steady pace throughout the marathon.
example_zh: 整場馬拉松他都保持穩定的步調。

example: Dad cooked steak for dinner.
example_zh: 爸爸晚餐煮了牛排。

example: It is wrong to steal money from others.
example_zh: 偷別人的錢是不對的。

example: Steam rose from the hot soup.
example_zh: 熱湯冒出了蒸氣。

example: The bridge is built from strong steel and concrete.
example_zh: 這座橋是用堅固的鋼與混凝土建成的。

example: We climbed a steep hill to reach the temple.
example_zh: 我們爬上一座陡峭的山丘才到達廟宇。

example: She learned to steer the boat around the rocks.
example_zh: 她學會駕船繞過那些岩石。

example: Many of his problems stem from a lack of sleep.
example_zh: 他許多問題都源自睡眠不足。

example: Follow the steps to finish the game.
example_zh: 按照步驟完成遊戲。

example: She treats her stepchild as her own son.
example_zh: 她把繼子當成親生兒子般對待。

example: His stepfather taught him how to ride a bike.
example_zh: 他的繼父教他如何騎腳踏車。

example: Her stepmother cooked dinner for the whole family.
example_zh: 她的繼母為全家人煮了晚餐。

example: He turned up the stereo to enjoy the music.
example_zh: 他把音響音量調大，好好享受音樂。

zh: 刻板印象；對…有刻板印象
example: We should not judge people by a simple stereotype.
example_zh: 我們不該以簡單的刻板印象去評斷別人。

example: My mother made a warm beef stew for winter.
example_zh: 我媽媽做了一鍋溫暖的燉牛肉過冬。

example: Please stick this label onto the box.
example_zh: 請把這張標籤黏到箱子上。

example: The children's hands were sticky with candy.
example_zh: 孩子們的手因為糖果而黏答答的。

example: My neck feels stiff after the long flight.
example_zh: 長途飛行後我的脖子感覺很僵硬。

example: He is still sleeping.
example_zh: 他還在睡覺。

example: Good questions can stimulate students to think.
example_zh: 好的問題能刺激學生思考。

example: Babies need plenty of stimulation to learn.
example_zh: 嬰兒需要大量的刺激才能學習。

example: Lower taxes acted as a stimulus for the economy.
example_zh: 降稅成為刺激經濟的因素。

example: A bee can sting you if you get too close.
example_zh: 如果你靠得太近，蜜蜂可能會螫你。

example: The stingy man never shares his food.
example_zh: 那個小氣的人從不分享食物。

example: The old fish began to stink in the hot sun.
example_zh: 那條老魚在烈日下開始發臭。

example: Stir the soup gently so it does not burn.
example_zh: 輕輕攪拌湯，這樣才不會燒焦。

example: The doctor put three stitches in his cut.
example_zh: 醫生在他的傷口上縫了三針。

example: The store keeps a large stock of school supplies.
example_zh: 這家店備有大量的學校用品庫存。

example: She hung a red stocking by the fireplace.
example_zh: 她在壁爐旁掛了一隻紅色長襪。

example: My stomach hurts.
example_zh: 我的肚子痛。

example: I had a stomachache after eating too much.
example_zh: 我吃太多後肚子痛。

example: He threw a stone into the river.
example_zh: 他把一顆石頭丟進河裡。

example: He sat on a wooden stool near the counter.
example_zh: 他坐在櫃台旁的一張木凳上。

example: The bus stops here.
example_zh: 公車停在這裡。

example: The teacher used a stop watch in the race.
example_zh: 老師在賽跑時用碼錶計時。

example: We keep old furniture in a storage room.
example_zh: 我們把舊家具放在儲藏室裡。

example: The store opens at nine.
example_zh: 這家商店九點開門。

example: The storm broke many trees last night.
example_zh: 昨晚的暴風雨吹斷了許多樹。

example: It was a dark and stormy night.
example_zh: 那是一個漆黑的暴風雨夜晚。

example: Grandma tells me a story every night.
example_zh: 奶奶每晚講故事給我聽。

example: Mom is cooking soup on the stove.
example_zh: 媽媽正在爐子上煮湯。

example: Go straight and turn left.
example_zh: 直走然後左轉。

example: Please straighten the picture on the wall.
example_zh: 請把牆上的那幅畫擺正。

example: The instructions were simple and straightforward.
example_zh: 這些說明既簡單又直接明瞭。

example: The long hours put a strain on his health.
example_zh: 長時間工作對他的健康造成負擔。

example: Ships pass through the narrow strait every day.
example_zh: 船隻每天都通過這道狹窄的海峽。

example: The storm left many travelers stranded at the airport.
example_zh: 暴風雨讓許多旅客困在機場。

example: I heard a strange sound.
example_zh: 我聽到奇怪的聲音。

example: Don't talk to strangers.
example_zh: 不要跟陌生人說話。

example: Thick weeds can strangle young plants in the garden.
example_zh: 茂密的雜草會扼殺花園裡的幼苗。

example: Please strap your bag to the back of the seat.
example_zh: 請把你的包用帶子綁在座椅後方。

example: The company made a strategic plan for next year.
example_zh: 公司為明年制定了策略計畫。

example: We need a new strategy to win more customers.
example_zh: 我們需要新策略來贏得更多顧客。

example: She drinks juice with a straw.
example_zh: 她用吸管喝果汁。

example: The strawberry is sweet.
example_zh: 這顆草莓很甜。

example: A stray dog followed us all the way home.
example_zh: 一隻流浪狗一路跟著我們回家。

example: We caught small fish in the stream.
example_zh: 我們在小溪裡抓小魚。

example: There are many cars on the street.
example_zh: 街上有很多車。

example: He lifted the heavy box with great strength.
example_zh: 他用很大的力氣搬起那個重箱子。

example: Exercise can strengthen your heart and muscles.
example_zh: 運動可以強化你的心臟和肌肉。

example: Too much stress can harm your health.
example_zh: 過多的壓力會傷害你的健康。

example: Remember to stretch before you start running.
example_zh: 開始跑步前記得先伸展身體。

example: Our teacher is strict about being on time.
example_zh: 我們老師對準時這件事非常嚴格。

example: He strode across the room with long strides.
example_zh: 他邁著大步走過房間。

example: The workers went on strike for better pay.
