example_zh: 這首歌的節奏快而活潑。

example: He found a temporary job during summer.
example_zh: 他在暑假期間找到一份臨時工作。

example: The smell of cake tempted me to eat more.
example_zh: 蛋糕的香味誘惑我多吃一些。

example: She resisted the temptation to buy the dress.
example_zh: 她抵擋住買那件洋裝的誘惑。

example: I have ten fingers.
example_zh: 我有十根手指。

example: The tenant pays rent at the start of each month.
example_zh: 房客在每個月初繳房租。

example: People tend to relax more on weekends.
example_zh: 人們在週末往往比較放鬆。

example: He has a tendency to talk too fast.
example_zh: 他有說話太快的傾向。

example: The mother gave her baby a tender smile.
example_zh: 母親給了寶寶一個溫柔的微笑。

example: They play tennis on weekends.
example_zh: 他們週末打網球。

example: The players were tense before the final match.
example_zh: 球員在決賽前非常緊張。

example: There was tension between the two teams.
example_zh: 兩隊之間存在著緊張的氣氛。

example: We set up a tent by the river.
example_zh: 我們在河邊搭帳篷。

example: We made a tentative plan for the trip.
example_zh: 我們為這趟旅行訂了一個暫定的計畫。

example: 'Photosynthesis' is a scientific term.
example_zh: 「光合作用」是一個科學術語。

example: We waited for our flight at the airport terminal.
example_zh: 我們在機場航廈等候班機。

example: We had dinner on the terrace at sunset.
example_zh: 我們在黃昏時於露台上吃晚餐。

example: The weather is terrible today.
example_zh: 今天天氣很糟。

example: You did a terrific job on the report.
example_zh: 你的報告做得非常出色。

example: The loud thunder terrified the little boy.
example_zh: 巨大的雷聲嚇壞了那個小男孩。

example: The lion protects its own territory.
example_zh: 獅子會保護自己的領地。

example: Her face was full of terror during the storm.
example_zh: 暴風雨中她臉上滿是恐懼。

example: Many countries work together to fight terrorism.
example_zh: 許多國家攜手對抗恐怖主義。

example: The police stopped a terrorist attack in time.
example_zh: 警方及時阻止了一場恐怖攻擊。

example: We have a math test tomorrow.
example_zh: 我們明天有數學考試。

example: She agreed to testify in court next week.
example_zh: 她同意下週在法庭上作證。

example: Please read the text before the class.
example_zh: 請在上課前閱讀這篇課文。

example: Open your textbook to page ten.
example_zh: 把課本翻到第十頁。

example: This city is famous for its textile industry.
example_zh: 這座城市以紡織業聞名。

example: The cloth has a soft and smooth texture.
example_zh: 這塊布料質地柔軟又光滑。

example: He is taller than me.
example_zh: 他比我高。

example: Thank you for your help.
example_zh: 謝謝你的幫忙。

example: I am thankful for my family's support.
example_zh: 我很感激家人的支持。

example: Americans eat turkey on Thanksgiving.
example_zh: 美國人在感恩節吃火雞。

example: That is my book.
example_zh: 那是我的書。

example: The sun is hot.
example_zh: 太陽很熱。

example: We saw a movie at the theater.
example_zh: 我們在戲院看了一部電影。

example: The police are looking into the theft of the car.
example_zh: 警方正在調查這起偷車案。

example: Their house is big.
example_zh: 他們的房子很大。

example: Love is the main theme of this novel.
example_zh: 愛是這部小說的主要主題。

example: We ate lunch and then played games.
example_zh: 我們吃了午餐，然後玩遊戲。

example: He studied theology at a famous university.
example_zh: 他在一所著名大學研讀神學。

example: His theory is only theoretical for now.
example_zh: 他的理論目前仍只是理論上的。

example: Einstein developed the theory of relativity.
example_zh: 愛因斯坦提出了相對論。

example: The therapist helped him deal with stress.
example_zh: 治療師幫助他處理壓力。

example: She goes to physical therapy twice a week.
example_zh: 她每週去做兩次物理治療。

example: There is a cat under the table.
example_zh: 桌子下有一隻貓。

example: He graduated in June and left the city thereafter.
example_zh: 他六月畢業，此後便離開了這座城市。

example: She saved money, thereby buying her own house.
example_zh: 她省下錢，藉此買下了自己的房子。

example: He was sick; therefore, he stayed home.
example_zh: 他生病了，因此待在家裡。

example: The nurse used a thermometer to check his fever.
example_zh: 護士用體溫計檢查他的發燒情況。

example: These apples are fresh.
example_zh: 這些蘋果很新鮮。

example: She is writing her thesis on climate change.
example_zh: 她正在撰寫關於氣候變遷的論文。

example: They are my friends.
example_zh: 他們是我的朋友。

example: This book is very thick.
example_zh: 這本書很厚。

example: The police caught the thief last night.
example_zh: 警察昨晚抓到了那個小偷。

example: The runner hurt his thigh during the race.
example_zh: 那名跑者在比賽中傷了大腿。

example: The paper is very thin.
example_zh: 這張紙很薄。

example: What is that thing on the table?
example_zh: 桌上那個東西是什麼？

example: I think it will rain today.
example_zh: 我想今天會下雨。

example: My classroom is on the third floor.
example_zh: 我的教室在三樓。

example: After the game, I felt a strong thirst.
example_zh: 比賽結束後，我感到非常口渴。

example: I am thirsty after the game.
example_zh: 比賽後我很口渴。

example: My brother is thirteen years old.
example_zh: 我哥哥十三歲。

example: There are thirty students in my class.
example_zh: 我們班有三十個學生。

example: This is my new bag.
example_zh: 這是我的新書包。

example: The doctor gave him a thorough check-up.
example_zh: 醫生為他做了徹底的檢查。

example: Those apples look sweet.
example_zh: 那些蘋果看起來很甜。

example: Though it was cold, we went out.
example_zh: 雖然天氣很冷，我們還是出門了。

example: She shared her thoughts about the plan with us.
example_zh: 她和我們分享了她對這個計畫的想法。

example: It was thoughtful of you to call her.
example_zh: 你打電話給她真是體貼。

example: This bike costs three thousand dollars.
example_zh: 這輛腳踏車要三千元。

example: She used a needle and thread to fix the button.
example_zh: 她用針線把鈕扣縫好。

example: Pollution is a serious threat to our health.
example_zh: 污染對我們的健康是一大威脅。

example: The dark clouds threaten to bring rain.
example_zh: 烏雲預示著可能要下雨了。

example: I have three pencils.
example_zh: 我有三枝鉛筆。

example: She stood at the threshold of a new career.
example_zh: 她正站在新事業的起點上。

example: The roller coaster gave us a real thrill.
example_zh: 雲霄飛車帶給我們真正的刺激。

example: We watched an exciting thriller last night.
example_zh: 我們昨晚看了一部刺激的驚悚片。

example: Plants thrive in warm and wet weather.
example_zh: 植物在溫暖潮濕的天氣裡生長茂盛。

example: My throat hurts today.
example_zh: 我今天喉嚨痛。

example: The young prince took the throne last year.
example_zh: 年輕的王子去年登上了王位。

example: The train goes through a long tunnel.
example_zh: 火車穿過一條長長的隧道。

example: It rained throughout the whole day.
example_zh: 整天都在下雨。

example: Please throw the ball to me.
example_zh: 請把球丟給我。

example: He thrust the letter into my hand.
example_zh: 他把信硬塞進我手裡。

example: The baby likes to suck her thumb.
example_zh: 這個寶寶喜歡吸她的拇指。

example: The thunder was so loud that I woke up.
example_zh: 雷聲大到把我吵醒了。

example: We have music class on Thursday.
example_zh: 我們星期四有音樂課。

example: He studied hard and thus passed the exam.
example_zh: 他努力用功，因此通過了考試。

example: The clock ticks loudly at night.
example_zh: 時鐘在夜裡滴答作響。

example: I bought a ticket for the movie.
example_zh: 我買了一張電影票。

example: The soft feather tickled her nose.
example_zh: 柔軟的羽毛搔得她鼻子發癢。

example: The children play near the shore at low tide.
example_zh: 孩子們在退潮時到岸邊玩耍。

example: Keep your room tidy.
example_zh: 保持你的房間整齊。

example: Dad wears a tie to work.
example_zh: 爸爸上班時打領帶。

example: The tiger lives in the zoo.
example_zh: 這隻老虎住在動物園裡。

example: These shoes are too tight for me.
example_zh: 這雙鞋對我來說太緊了。

example: Please tighten the screw with this tool.
example_zh: 請用這個工具把螺絲鎖緊。

example: The kitchen floor is covered with white tiles.
example_zh: 廚房地板鋪滿了白色磁磚。

example: We waited till the rain stopped.
example_zh: 我們一直等到雨停。

example: She tilted her head to hear the sound.
example_zh: 她歪著頭去聽那個聲音。

example: The house was built with strong timber.
example_zh: 這棟房子是用堅固的木材建造的。

example: What time is it now?
example_zh: 現在幾點了？

example: Check the timetable before you take the train.
example_zh: 搭火車前先查看時刻表。

example: The timid boy was afraid to speak in class.
example_zh: 那個膽小的男孩不敢在課堂上發言。

example: She opened a tin of tomatoes for the soup.
example_zh: 她打開一罐番茄來煮湯。

example: The baby bird is tiny and cute.
example_zh: 這隻小鳥寶寶又小又可愛。

example: He left a small tip for the waiter.
example_zh: 他留了一點小費給服務生。

example: She walked on tiptoe so as not to wake the baby.
example_zh: 她踮著腳尖走，以免吵醒寶寶。

example: The long walk began to tire the children.
example_zh: 漫長的步行開始讓孩子們感到疲倦。

example: I am tired after school.
example_zh: 放學後我很累。

example: Waiting in line for hours is very tiresome.
example_zh: 排隊等好幾個小時很令人厭煩。

example: She wiped her nose with a soft tissue.
example_zh: 她用柔軟的衛生紙擦鼻子。

example: What is the title of the book?
example_zh: 這本書的書名是什麼？

example: I go to school by bus.
example_zh: 我搭公車去上學。

example: I eat toast for breakfast.
example_zh: 我早餐吃吐司。

example: Smoking tobacco is harmful to your health.
example_zh: 抽菸對你的健康有害。

example: Today is my birthday.
example_zh: 今天是我的生日。

example: I hurt my toe this morning.
example_zh: 我今天早上弄傷了腳趾。

example: My grandmother makes soup with tofu.
example_zh: 我奶奶用豆腐煮湯。

example: We play basketball together.
example_zh: 我們一起打籃球。

example: Excuse me, where is the toilet?
example_zh: 不好意思，請問廁所在哪裡？

example: He gave her a ring as a token of love.
example_zh: 他送她一枚戒指作為愛的象徵。

example: The pain was tolerable after taking the medicine.
example_zh: 吃了藥後疼痛變得可以忍受了。

example: We should show tolerance toward different opinions.
example_zh: 我們應該對不同意見展現寬容。

example: She is tolerant of her students' mistakes.
example_zh: 她對學生的錯誤很寬容。

example: I cannot tolerate rude behavior.
example_zh: 我無法容忍無禮的行為。

example: We paid a toll to cross the bridge.
example_zh: 我們付了通行費才過橋。

example: I like tomato and egg soup.
example_zh: 我喜歡番茄蛋花湯。

example: They visited the ancient king's tomb.
example_zh: 他們參觀了古代國王的陵墓。

example: See you tomorrow!
example_zh: 明天見！

example: The truck can carry ten tons of goods.
example_zh: 這輛卡車能載運十噸貨物。

example: She spoke to me in a gentle tone.
example_zh: 她用溫柔的語氣對我說話。

example: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue.
example_zh: 醫生要我伸出舌頭。

example: We will eat out tonight.
example_zh: 我們今晚要外出用餐。

example: I like dogs, too.
example_zh: 我也喜歡狗。

example: Dad keeps his tools in a box.
example_zh: 爸爸把工具放在箱子裡。

example: I brush my teeth every day.
example_zh: 我每天刷牙。

example: He went to the dentist because of a toothache.
example_zh: 他因為牙痛去看牙醫。

example: I bought a new toothbrush yesterday.
example_zh: 我昨天買了一支新牙刷。

example: The bird is at the top of the tree.
example_zh: 那隻鳥在樹頂上。

example: The topic of today's class is the weather.
example_zh: 今天課堂的主題是天氣。

example: He carried a torch to light the dark cave.
example_zh: 他拿著火把照亮黑暗的洞穴。

example: The bad memory tormented him for years.
example_zh: 那段不好的回憶折磨了他好幾年。

example: A powerful tornado destroyed several houses.
example_zh: 一場強烈的龍捲風摧毀了好幾棟房子。

example: The heavy rain turned the road into a torrent.
example_zh: 大雨把道路變成了一條急流。

example: The tortoise moves slowly across the grass.
example_zh: 那隻陸龜在草地上緩慢地爬行。

example: Waiting for the result was pure torture.
example_zh: 等待結果簡直是一種折磨。

example: He tossed the ball to his little brother.
example_zh: 他把球拋給他的弟弟。

example: The total is one hundred dollars.
example_zh: 總共是一百元。

example: Do not touch the hot pot.
example_zh: 不要摸那個熱鍋子。

example: Losing his job was a tough experience.
example_zh: 失去工作是一段艱難的經歷。

example: We took a tour of the old castle.
example_zh: 我們參觀了那座古老的城堡。

example: Tourism brings a lot of money to the island.
example_zh: 觀光業為這座島嶼帶來大量收入。

example: Many tourists visit the temple every year.
example_zh: 每年有許多觀光客造訪這座寺廟。

example: Our team won the tennis tournament this year.
example_zh: 我們的隊伍今年贏得了網球錦標賽。

example: The truck towed the broken car away.
example_zh: 卡車把故障的汽車拖走了。

example: The little girl ran toward her mother.
example_zh: 小女孩朝她媽媽跑過去。

example: Dry your hands with a towel.
example_zh: 用毛巾把手擦乾。

example: Taipei 101 is a very tall tower.
example_zh: 台北101是一座非常高的塔。

example: My uncle lives in a small town.
example_zh: 我叔叔住在一個小鎮。

example: The factory dumped toxic waste into the river.
example_zh: 那家工廠把有毒廢料倒進河裡。

example: The boy plays with his toy car.
example_zh: 男孩玩他的玩具車。

example: The police traced the call to a small house.
example_zh: 警方追蹤那通電話到一間小房子。

example: The runners raced around the track.
example_zh: 跑者們在跑道上競賽。

example: The two countries trade with each other.
example_zh: 這兩個國家彼此進行貿易。

example: The company registered its new trademark.
example_zh: 這家公司註冊了它的新商標。

example: The trader sells fruit at the morning market.
example_zh: 那名商人在早市賣水果。

example: Eating moon cakes is a tradition in Taiwan.
example_zh: 吃月餅是台灣的傳統。

example: We ate traditional food at the night market.
example_zh: 我們在夜市吃了傳統小吃。

example: The traffic is heavy in the morning.
example_zh: 早上交通很擁擠。

example: The accident was a terrible tragedy.
example_zh: 那場意外是一齣可怕的悲劇。

example: The movie tells a tragic love story.
example_zh: 這部電影訴說一段悲慘的愛情故事。

example: We followed the trail up the mountain.
example_zh: 我們沿著小徑往山上走。

example: We took a train to Taipei.
example_zh: 我們搭火車去台北。

example: Mom waited for me at the train station.
example_zh: 媽媽在火車站等我。

example: Honesty is one of his best traits.
example_zh: 誠實是他最好的特質之一。

example: The soldiers called him a traitor.
example_zh: 士兵們稱他為叛徒。

example: The bank recorded every transaction carefully.
example_zh: 銀行仔細地記錄了每一筆交易。

example: She sent her transcript to the university.
example_zh: 她把成績單寄給了那所大學。

example: He decided to transfer to another school.
example_zh: 他決定轉學到另一所學校。

example: The internet has transformed how we learn.
example_zh: 網路改變了我們學習的方式。

example: The city went through a huge transformation.
example_zh: 這座城市經歷了巨大的轉變。

example: Many people use public transit to work.
example_zh: 許多人搭乘大眾運輸去上班。

example: The transition from high school to college is hard.
example_zh: 從高中到大學的過渡並不容易。

example: She can translate English into Chinese well.
example_zh: 她能把英文流暢地翻譯成中文。

example: The translation of the poem is beautiful.
example_zh: 這首詩的譯文很優美。

example: The translator helped the two sides understand.
example_zh: 翻譯員幫助雙方彼此理解。

example: The transmission of the disease was fast.
example_zh: 這種疾病的傳播速度很快。

example: Radios transmit sound over long distances.
example_zh: 收音機能將聲音傳送到很遠的地方。

example: The water in the lake is clear and transparent.
example_zh: 湖裡的水清澈透明。

example: The patient needs a heart transplant soon.
example_zh: 這名病人很快需要進行心臟移植。

example: Trucks transport goods across the country.
example_zh: 卡車在全國各地運送貨物。

example: Public transportation in this city is convenient.
example_zh: 這座城市的大眾運輸很方便。

example: The farmer set a trap for the mice.
example_zh: 農夫設了一個捕鼠的陷阱。

example: Please take out the trash.
example_zh: 請把垃圾拿出去丟。

example: Put the empty bottle in the trash can.
example_zh: 把空瓶子丟進垃圾桶。

example: The accident left him with deep trauma.
example_zh: 那場意外給他留下了深深的創傷。

example: My family will travel to Japan this summer.
example_zh: 我們家今年夏天要去日本旅行。

example: The tired traveler rested at the small inn.
example_zh: 疲憊的旅行者在小旅館裡休息。

example: The waiter carried the food on a tray.
example_zh: 服務生用托盤端著食物。

example: The pirates hid their treasure on the island.
example_zh: 海盜把寶藏藏在島上。

example: The gold was kept safely in the treasury.
example_zh: 黃金被安全地保存在國庫裡。

example: She treats her dog like a friend.
example_zh: 她把她的狗當朋友對待。

example: The two countries signed a peace treaty.
example_zh: 兩國簽署了一份和平條約。

example: There is a big tree in the park.
example_zh: 公園裡有一棵大樹。

example: They went on a long trek through the forest.
example_zh: 他們展開一段穿越森林的長途跋涉。

example: Her hands began to tremble with fear.
example_zh: 她的雙手因恐懼而開始顫抖。

example: The team made a tremendous effort to win.
example_zh: 這支隊伍付出了巨大的努力去獲勝。

example: Wearing masks became a common trend.
example_zh: 戴口罩成了一種普遍的趨勢。

example: The trial lasted for several days in court.
example_zh: 這場審判在法庭上持續了好幾天。

example: The teacher drew a triangle on the board.
example_zh: 老師在黑板上畫了一個三角形。

example: The dancers wore colorful tribal costumes.
example_zh: 舞者們穿著色彩鮮豔的部落服裝。

example: The tribe has lived in the forest for centuries.
example_zh: 這個部落在森林裡生活了好幾個世紀。

example: They held a concert as a tribute to him.
example_zh: 他們舉辦音樂會以向他致敬。

example: The magic trick was fun.
example_zh: 那個魔術把戲很有趣。

example: This math problem is quite tricky.
example_zh: 這道數學題相當棘手。

example: Do not worry about such a small trifle.

example: We play volleyball on the beach every summer.
example_zh: 我們每年夏天在海邊打排球。

example: Please turn down the volume of the TV.
example_zh: 請把電視的音量調小。

example: Joining the club is completely voluntary.
example_zh: 加入這個社團完全是自願的。

example: Many students volunteer to help the elderly.
example_zh: 許多學生自願去幫助老人。

example: The sick child began to vomit after lunch.
example_zh: 這個生病的孩子午餐後開始嘔吐。

example: The class voted for a new leader.
example_zh: 全班投票選出新的班長。

example: Every voter has the right to choose freely.
example_zh: 每位選民都有自由選擇的權利。

example: I got a gift voucher for the bookstore.
example_zh: 我拿到一張書店的禮券。

example: They made a vow to love each other forever.
example_zh: 他們立下永遠相愛的誓言。

example: The letter 'a' is a common vowel.
example_zh: 字母a是常見的母音。

example: The long sea voyage lasted three months.
example_zh: 這趟漫長的海上航行持續了三個月。

example: Young children are vulnerable to the cold.
example_zh: 幼童容易受寒。

example: The happy dog began to wag its tail.
example_zh: 開心的狗開始搖尾巴。

example: The workers asked for a higher daily wage.
example_zh: 工人們要求更高的日薪。

example: The farmer pulled the wagon full of hay.
example_zh: 農夫拉著裝滿乾草的貨車。

example: She wore a belt around her waist.
example_zh: 她在腰上繫了一條皮帶。

example: Please wait for me here.
example_zh: 請在這裡等我。

example: The waiter brought us the menu.
example_zh: 服務生拿菜單給我們。

example: The waitress is very nice.
example_zh: 那位女服務生人很好。

example: I wake up at six every day.
example_zh: 我每天六點起床。

example: The loud noise wakened the whole family.
example_zh: 巨大的聲響吵醒了全家人。

example: I walk to school with my friend.
example_zh: 我和朋友走路上學。

example: My father listened to music with a walkman.
example_zh: 我爸爸以前用隨身聽聽音樂。

example: There is a clock on the wall.
example_zh: 牆上有一個時鐘。

example: I lost my wallet yesterday.
example_zh: 我昨天弄丟了皮夾。

example: She added some walnut pieces to the cake.
example_zh: 她在蛋糕裡加了一些核桃碎。

example: We like to wander through the old streets.
example_zh: 我們喜歡在老街裡閒逛。

example: I want a glass of water.
example_zh: 我想要一杯水。

example: Many people lost their homes in the war.
example_zh: 許多人在戰爭中失去了家園。

example: The nurse works in the children's ward.
example_zh: 這位護理師在兒童病房工作。

example: She hung her coat in the wardrobe.
example_zh: 她把外套掛進衣櫥裡。

example: The goods are stored in a huge warehouse.
example_zh: 這些貨物存放在一座巨大的倉庫裡。

example: The soup is warm and good.
example_zh: 這碗湯溫熱又好喝。

example: We felt the warmth of the fire at once.
example_zh: 我們立刻感受到爐火的溫暖。

example: The sign warns drivers of falling rocks.
example_zh: 這個標誌警告駕駛人注意落石。

example: The police showed a search warrant at the door.
example_zh: 警察在門口出示了搜索令。

example: This laptop comes with a two-year warranty.
example_zh: 這台筆電附有兩年保固。

example: The brave warrior fought to protect his village.
example_zh: 這位勇敢的戰士為保衛家鄉而戰。

example: Be wary of strangers who ask for money.
example_zh: 對開口要錢的陌生人要提高警覺。

example: Wash your hands before dinner.
example_zh: 晚餐前要洗手。

example: Do not waste water when you brush your teeth.
example_zh: 刷牙時不要浪費水。

example: We watch TV after dinner.
example_zh: 我們晚餐後看電視。

example: Drink more water every day.
example_zh: 每天要多喝水。

example: We took photos in front of the waterfall.
example_zh: 我們在瀑布前拍了照。

example: We saw beautiful waterfalls in the mountains.
example_zh: 我們在山裡看到美麗的瀑布。

example: Watermelon is sweet in summer.
example_zh: 夏天的西瓜很甜。

example: These boots are completely waterproof.
example_zh: 這雙靴子完全防水。

example: The waves are big today.
example_zh: 今天的海浪很大。

example: The candle is made of white wax.
example_zh: 這根蠟燭是用白蠟做的。

example: Can you show me the way home?
example_zh: 你可以告訴我回家的路嗎？

example: We are good friends.
example_zh: 我們是好朋友。

example: He feels weak after being sick.
example_zh: 他生病後覺得很虛弱。

example: Lack of sleep can weaken your body.
example_zh: 睡眠不足會使你的身體變虛弱。

example: He gained great wealth through hard work.
example_zh: 他靠著努力工作累積了大量財富。

example: The wealthy man donated money to the school.
example_zh: 這位富有的人捐錢給學校。

example: The knight carried a sword as his weapon.
example_zh: 這名騎士帶著一把劍作為武器。

example: I wear a hat on sunny days.
example_zh: 晴天時我戴帽子。

example: The travelers felt weary after the long walk.
example_zh: 旅人們走了長路後感到疲倦。

example: The weather is nice today.
example_zh: 今天天氣很好。

example: The old woman can weave beautiful baskets.
example_zh: 這位老婦人能編織出美麗的籃子。

example: A spider spun a web in the corner.
example_zh: 一隻蜘蛛在角落結了張網。

example: You can find more details on our website.
example_zh: 你可以在我們的網站上找到更多細節。

example: They will wed in a small church next month.
example_zh: 他們下個月將在一間小教堂結婚。

example: We went to my cousin's wedding last week.
example_zh: 我們上週去參加表哥的婚禮。

example: We have art class on Wednesday.
example_zh: 我們星期三有美術課。

example: He spent the morning pulling out the weeds.
example_zh: 他花了一整個早上拔雜草。

example: There are seven days in a week.
example_zh: 一星期有七天。

example: The library opens early on weekdays.
example_zh: 圖書館平日很早開門。

example: What do you do on the weekend?
example_zh: 你週末都做什麼？

example: We hold a weekly meeting every Monday.
example_zh: 我們每週一開一次週會。

example: She began to weep when she heard the news.
example_zh: 她一聽到這消息就哭了起來。

example: Please weigh the apples before you pay.
example_zh: 付錢前請先秤一下蘋果的重量。

example: The doctor checked my height and weight.
example_zh: 醫生量了我的身高和體重。

example: I heard a weird sound in the dark room.
example_zh: 我在暗房裡聽到一個怪聲。

example: Welcome to my home!
example_zh: 歡迎來我家！

example: The government cares about people's welfare.
example_zh: 政府關心人民的福祉。

example: She sings very well.
example_zh: 她唱歌唱得很好。

example: The sun sets in the west.
example_zh: 太陽從西邊落下。

example: He enjoys watching old western movies.
example_zh: 他喜歡看老西部片。

example: My shoes are wet from the rain.
example_zh: 我的鞋子被雨淋濕了。

example: The whale is a very big animal.
example_zh: 鯨魚是非常大的動物。

example: The ship was tied up at the wharf.
example_zh: 那艘船繫在碼頭邊。

example: What is your name?
example_zh: 你叫什麼名字？

example: You can order whatever you like.
example_zh: 你想點什麼都可以。

example: She had no money whatsoever in her bag.
example_zh: 她的包包裡一毛錢也沒有。

example: The farmers grow wheat in these fields.
example_zh: 農夫們在這些田地裡種小麥。

example: A bike has two wheels.
example_zh: 腳踏車有兩個輪子。

example: He moved around the hospital in a wheelchair.
example_zh: 他坐著輪椅在醫院裡移動。

example: When is your birthday?
example_zh: 你的生日是什麼時候？

example: Call me whenever you need any help.
example_zh: 無論何時你需要幫忙都可以打給我。

example: Where do you live?
example_zh: 你住在哪裡？

example: Nobody knows the whereabouts of the lost dog.
example_zh: 沒有人知道那隻走失的狗在哪裡。

example: He likes tea, whereas his wife prefers coffee.
example_zh: 他喜歡茶，而他太太比較愛咖啡。

example: I will follow you wherever you go.
example_zh: 無論你去哪裡我都會跟著你。

example: I don't know whether he will come.
example_zh: 我不知道他會不會來。

example: Which color do you like?
example_zh: 你喜歡哪個顏色？

example: Mom cooked dinner while I did my homework.
example_zh: 我寫功課時，媽媽在煮晚餐。

example: The puppy began to whine for food.
example_zh: 小狗開始哀鳴著討食物。

example: The rider cracked his whip in the air.
example_zh: 騎士在空中甩響了鞭子。

example: He poured a glass of whiskey for the guest.
example_zh: 他為客人倒了一杯威士忌。

example: She leaned over to whisper a secret to me.
example_zh: 她湊過來對我低聲說了個祕密。

example: The referee blew his whistle to stop the game.
example_zh: 裁判吹哨中止了比賽。

example: The snow is white.
example_zh: 雪是白色的。

example: Who is that tall boy?
example_zh: 那個高高的男孩是誰？

example: Whoever finishes first will get a prize.
example_zh: 誰先完成誰就有獎品。

example: I read the whole book today.
example_zh: 我今天把整本書讀完了。

example: They buy fruit at wholesale prices.
example_zh: 他們以批發價買水果。

example: The children enjoy a wholesome breakfast.
example_zh: 孩子們享用一頓有益健康的早餐。

example: The man whom you met is my uncle.
example_zh: 你遇到的那個人是我叔叔。

example: Whose bag is this?
example_zh: 這是誰的書包？

example: Why are you late today?
example_zh: 你今天為什麼遲到？

example: The wicked queen wanted to harm the girl.
example_zh: 邪惡的王后想傷害那個女孩。

example: The river is deep and wide.
example_zh: 這條河又深又寬。

example: The city plans to widen this narrow road.
example_zh: 市府計畫拓寬這條窄路。

example: The disease caused widespread fear.
example_zh: 這種疾病引起了普遍的恐慌。

example: The widow raised her children on her own.
example_zh: 這位寡婦獨自扶養孩子長大。

example: Please measure the width of the table.
example_zh: 請量一下這張桌子的寬度。

example: His wife is a teacher.
example_zh: 他的妻子是一位老師。

example: The actor wore a long white wig on stage.
example_zh: 這位演員在台上戴著長長的白色假髮。

example: We saw wild monkeys on the mountain.
example_zh: 我們在山上看到野生的猴子。

example: They got lost in the vast wilderness.
example_zh: 他們在廣闊的荒野中迷路了。

example: The park protects local wildlife.
example_zh: 這座公園保護當地的野生動物。

example: I will call you tonight.
example_zh: 我今晚會打電話給你。

example: She is always willing to help her friends.
example_zh: 她總是願意幫助朋友。

example: Our team will win the game.
example_zh: 我們這隊會贏得比賽。

example: The wind is strong today.
example_zh: 今天風很大。

example: Please open the window.
example_zh: 請打開窗戶。

example: Rain covered the car's windshield.
example_zh: 雨水佈滿了汽車的擋風玻璃。

example: It is windy in Hsinchu.
example_zh: 新竹風很大。

example: They shared a bottle of red wine at dinner.
example_zh: 他們在晚餐時共享了一瓶紅酒。

example: The bird hurt its wing and could not fly.
example_zh: 那隻鳥翅膀受傷，不能飛了。

example: He gave me a friendly wink.
example_zh: 他對我友善地眨了眨眼。

example: The winner of the race got a gold medal.
example_zh: 賽跑的優勝者得到一面金牌。

example: It is cold in winter.
example_zh: 冬天很冷。

example: Please wipe the table after eating.
example_zh: 吃完後請把桌子擦一擦。

example: The electrician fixed the broken wire.
example_zh: 電工修好了斷掉的電線。

example: We can learn much wisdom from old stories.
example_zh: 我們能從古老的故事中學到許多智慧。

example: My grandpa is a wise man.
example_zh: 我爺爺是個有智慧的人。

example: I wish you a happy birthday.
example_zh: 祝你生日快樂。

example: Her quick wit made everyone laugh.
example_zh: 她的機智反應逗得大家哈哈大笑。

example: The witch flew across the sky on a broom.
example_zh: 女巫騎著掃帚飛過天空。

example: I go to school with my sister.
example_zh: 我和妹妹一起上學。

example: I need to withdraw some cash from the bank.
example_zh: 我需要去銀行領一些現金。

example: The flowers began to wither in the heat.
example_zh: 花朵在高溫下開始枯萎。

example: The company decided to withhold his pay.
example_zh: 公司決定暫扣他的薪水。

example: Please finish the test within an hour.
example_zh: 請在一小時內完成測驗。

example: We cannot live without water.
example_zh: 我們沒有水就無法生存。

example: She was the only witness to the accident.
example_zh: 她是這場意外唯一的目擊者。

example: His witty remarks kept us laughing.
example_zh: 他詼諧的話語讓我們笑個不停。

example: The old song is full of woe and sorrow.
example_zh: 這首老歌充滿了悲哀與愁緒。

example: Dad cooked the noodles in a big wok.
example_zh: 爸爸用一個大炒鍋煮麵。

example: The wolf lives in the forest with its family.
example_zh: 這隻狼和牠的家人住在森林裡。

example: That woman is my mother.
example_zh: 那位女士是我的媽媽。

example: The women's room is on the second floor.
example_zh: 女廁在二樓。

example: I wonder why he left so early.
example_zh: 我很好奇他為什麼這麼早就走了。

example: We had a wonderful time at the park.
example_zh: 我們在公園玩得很開心。

example: This table is made of wood.
example_zh: 這張桌子是木頭做的。

example: They sat on a long wooden bench.
example_zh: 他們坐在一張長長的木製長椅上。

example: A woodpecker was tapping on the tree.
example_zh: 一隻啄木鳥正在啄樹幹。

example: We took a walk in the woods yesterday.
example_zh: 我們昨天在樹林裡散步。

example: This warm sweater is made of wool.
example_zh: 這件保暖的毛衣是羊毛做的。

example: I learned a new word today.
example_zh: 我今天學了一個新單字。

example: My dad works in a school.
example_zh: 我爸爸在一所學校工作。

example: Please open your workbook to page ten.
example_zh: 請把作業簿翻到第十頁。

example: The worker is very busy today.
example_zh: 這位工人今天很忙。

example: The factory has a large workforce.
example_zh: 這間工廠有龐大的勞動力。

example: I do a morning workout every day.
example_zh: 我每天早上都做健身鍛鍊。

example: Safety is important in every workplace.
example_zh: 安全在每個工作場所都很重要。

example: She joined a writing workshop last summer.
example_zh: 她去年夏天參加了一場寫作工作坊。

example: I want to see the world.
example_zh: 我想看看這個世界。

example: The bird found a worm in the ground.
example_zh: 那隻鳥在地裡找到一條蟲。

example: Don't worry about the test.
example_zh: 別擔心考試。

example: My cold got worse over the weekend.
example_zh: 我的感冒在週末變得更嚴重了。

example: People come here to worship every Sunday.
example_zh: 人們每個星期天都來這裡做禮拜。

example: This is the worst movie I have ever seen.
example_zh: 這是我看過最爛的電影。

example: This book is worth reading twice.
example_zh: 這本書值得讀兩遍。

example: The long trip was tiring but worthwhile.
example_zh: 這趟長途旅行雖累卻很值得。

example: Her brave act is worthy of our respect.
example_zh: 她勇敢的舉動值得我們尊敬。

example: The doctor cleaned the wound on his leg.
example_zh: 醫生清理了他腿上的傷口。

example: Please wrap the gift in colorful paper.
example_zh: 請用彩色的紙把禮物包起來。

example: The storm turned the ship into a wreck.
example_zh: 暴風雨把那艘船變成了殘骸。

example: The two boys began to wrestle on the grass.
example_zh: 兩個男孩在草地上扭打了起來。

example: Age brought wrinkles to her kind face.
example_zh: 歲月在她慈祥的臉上添了皺紋。

example: She wears a pretty watch on her wrist.
example_zh: 她的手腕上戴著一支漂亮的手錶。

example: I write a letter to my friend.
example_zh: 我寫一封信給我的朋友。

example: The writer has many good books.
example_zh: 這位作家有很多好書。

example: Your answer is wrong.
example_zh: 你的答案是錯的。

example: The rich man sailed his yacht along the coast.
example_zh: 這位富人駕著遊艇沿著海岸航行。

example: My grandma cooked a sweet yam soup.
example_zh: 我奶奶煮了一鍋香甜的山藥湯。

example: The dog plays in the yard.
example_zh: 狗在院子裡玩。

example: He gave a big yawn during the boring class.
example_zh: 他在無聊的課堂上打了個大哈欠。

example: I am ten years old.
example_zh: 我十歲。

example: The company holds a yearly party in winter.
example_zh: 這家公司每年冬天都會辦一場尾牙。

example: They yearn for peace after years of war.
example_zh: 歷經多年戰亂後，他們渴望和平。

example: Please don't yell at your little brother.
example_zh: 請不要對你的弟弟大吼大叫。

example: The banana is yellow.
example_zh: 香蕉是黃色的。

example: Yes, I like ice cream.
example_zh: 是的，我喜歡冰淇淋。

example: I saw a movie yesterday.
example_zh: 我昨天看了一部電影。

example: I am not ready yet.
example_zh: 我還沒準備好。

example: These fields yield a rich harvest each year.
example_zh: 這些田地每年都有豐富的收成。

example: She practices yoga to stay calm and fit.
example_zh: 她練瑜珈來保持平靜與健康。

example: I eat yogurt with fruit for breakfast.
example_zh: 我早餐吃優格配水果。

example: The yolk of the egg is bright yellow.
example_zh: 蛋黃是鮮豔的黃色。

example: You are my best friend.
example_zh: 你是我最好的朋友。

example: My sister is too young to go to school.
example_zh: 我妹妹年紀太小，還不能上學。

example: The youngsters played happily in the park.
example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡開心地玩耍。

example: Is this your book?
example_zh: 這是你的書嗎？

example: My grandfather often talks about his youth.
example_zh: 我爺爺常常談起他的年輕時代。

example: Her youthful smile brightened the room.
example_zh: 她青春的笑容照亮了整個房間。

example: This cake is so yummy!
example_zh: 這個蛋糕好好吃！

example: The zebra is black and white.
example_zh: 斑馬是黑白相間的。

example: Three minus three is zero.
example_zh: 三減三等於零。

example: The zipper on my bag is broken.
example_zh: 我包包上的拉鍊壞了。

example: This is a no-parking zone.
example_zh: 這裡是禁止停車的區域。

example: We see many animals at the zoo.
example_zh: 我們在動物園看到很多動物。

example: The camera can zoom in on distant birds.
example_zh: 這台相機能拉近拍攝遠處的鳥。
